To address these challenges, we propose a locally deployed RAG-based academic advising system grounded in syllabus information. By combining large language models with retrieval from structured syllabus data, the system is designed to support course selection, prerequisite understanding, and personalized study planning in a privacy-preserving manner.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于RAG（检索增强生成）的本地部署学术咨询系统，利用课程大纲数据和大语言模型，帮助学生进行课程选择、理解先修要求及制定个性化学习计划，兼顾隐私保护与资源受限教育机构的实际需求。
AI.motivation: 学生单独规划课程顺序时易受认知局限和信息过载困扰；教育机构则因资源有限难以提供充分的学业指导。
AI.method: 构建一个本地部署的RAG系统，将大语言模型与结构化的课程大纲数据检索相结合，支持课程推荐、先修关系解析和个性化学习路径规划。
AI.result: 该系统在保障数据隐私的前提下，有效辅助学生理解课程依赖关系并制定合理学习序列，同时缓解教育机构的指导压力。
AI.conclusion: 基于RAG的本地化学术咨询系统是一种可行且实用的解决方案，能兼顾学生需求与教育机构资源约束，提升课程规划的科学性与可访问性。

title: The Road Ahead in Autonomous Driving: The KITScenes Multimodal Dataset
summary: Existing autonomous driving datasets have enabled major progress, but fall short in sensor fidelity, map completeness, or geographic diversity. We present KITScenes Multimodal, a European dataset built around high-fidelity sensors and maps. Our fully synchronized sensor suite combines high-resolution global-shutter cameras, long-range lidar beyond 400m, 4D imaging radar, and redundant GNSS/INS localization. Our HD maps are, to our knowledge, the most complete of any sensor dataset, validated through autonomous driving trials on open-source software. For the first time in a public dataset, all driving-relevant traffic elements, such as traffic lights, are mapped in 3D to a reprojection-accurate level with full topological connectivity. Recorded in cities with irregular street layouts and mixed traffic modes, our dataset complements existing datasets by broadening the available geographic diversity. We also introduce four benchmarks, each advancing spatial learning for embodied AI: online HD map construction, long-range depth estimation, novel view synthesis, and end-to-end driving. Project page: https://kitscenes.com/

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了KITScenes Multimodal，一个面向欧洲场景的高保真、多模态自动驾驶数据集，具备高精度传感器、最完整的HD地图（含3D交通要素与拓扑连接）及地理多样性，并提出了四个空间学习新基准。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶数据集在传感器保真度、地图完整性或地理多样性方面存在不足，亟需更高质量、更全面的数据支撑算法发展。
AI.method: 构建了全同步多模态传感器套件（高分辨率全局快门相机、400米以上长距激光雷达、4D成像雷达、冗余GNSS/INS），并制作了经实车验证、包含全3D交通要素与拓扑关系的高精地图；在欧洲不规则路网与混合交通城市中采集数据；设计四个空间学习基准任务。
AI.result: 发布了KITScenes Multimodal数据集，首次在公开数据集中实现交通灯等全部驾驶相关要素的3D精确建模与拓扑连接；支持在线HD地图构建、长距深度估计、新视角合成和端到端驾驶四大基准评测。
AI.conclusion: KITScenes Multimodal填补了高保真传感器、完备HD地图与欧洲地理多样性三方面的空白，为具身AI的空间感知与理解提供了新基准与强数据支撑。

title: Aligning Data-Driven Predictors with Allocation: A Decision-Focused Approach to Survival Analysis
summary: Machine learning predictors have become essential tools for guiding automated decision making. However, a major misalignment persists: predictive models are typically optimized in terms of standard statistical metrics in isolation from the algorithmic tasks they inform. We highlight this incongruity in the high-stakes domain of organ allocation by demonstrating that any algorithm relying on (even highly accurate) survival predictors optimized for standard metrics -- such as the Concordance index (C-index) -- can yield arbitrarily poor outcomes when used for allocation, failing to guarantee utility better than a uniform random selection. To bridge the gap between survival analysis and policy optimization, we introduce a decision-focused learning approach based on optimizing normalized discounted cumulative gain (NDCG), a mainstay metric in information retrieval. We establish the utility of NDCG in survival analysis by proving that it translates to guarantees on the performance of allocation. Empirically, we propose a bootstrapping approach to optimize the NDCG of existing survival models. Unlike prior work, we also address the challenge of right censorship when evaluating ranking. On historical heart transplant data from the US, our method dramatically boosts the NDCG of baseline models by 50-100%, which translates to tens of thousands of additional life years gained annually when deployed for transplant allocation. We anticipate that our framework will find broader applications in decision making with predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向决策的生存分析学习方法，通过优化信息检索中的NDCG指标来提升器官分配等高风险决策任务的效果，解决了传统生存预测模型（如优化C-index）与下游决策目标不一致的问题，并在心脏移植数据上显著提升了排序质量与生命年收益。
AI.motivation: 传统生存预测模型（如优化C-index）虽统计性能好，但与下游决策任务（如器官分配）目标不一致，可能导致严重次优甚至随机水平的决策结果。
AI.method: 提出基于归一化折扣累积增益（NDCG）的决策导向学习框架；理论证明NDCG优化可保证分配效用；提出适用于右删失数据的NDCG引导的自举优化方法，用于改进现有生存模型的排序能力。
AI.result: 在真实美国心脏移植数据上，所提方法将基线模型的NDCG提升50–100%，对应每年可多挽救数万生命年。
AI.conclusion: NDCG作为连接生存分析与政策优化的桥梁，能有效对齐预测目标与实际决策效用；该决策聚焦范式有望推广至其他依赖预测的高风险决策场景。

title: RelGT-AC: A Relational Graph Transformer for Autocomplete Tasks in Relational Databases
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures. Code and model checkpoints available at https://github.com/jiangdmv/graph-transformer
summary: Relational databases underpin modern enterprise, scientific, and healthcare systems, yet predictive machine learning on such data remains challenging due to their multi-table, heterogeneous, and temporal structure. Relational Deep Learning (RDL) addresses this by representing databases as heterogeneous graphs and applying graph neural networks (GNNs) directly. RelBench v2 recently introduced autocomplete tasks -- a practically motivated task type where the goal is to predict an existing column value from relational context, analogous to an intelligent form-filling assistant. We propose RelGT-AC (Relational Graph Transformer for Autocomplete), extending the RelGT architecture with three targeted contributions: (1) a column masking strategy that prevents trivial solutions by masking the target column during subgraph encoding; (2) a unified task head supporting binary classification, multiclass classification, and regression autocomplete tasks within a single model; and (3) a TF-IDF text encoder that automatically detects and encodes free-text columns, recovering strong lexical signal that categorical encoders discard. Across 7 tasks spanning 3 RelBench v2 datasets (rel-trial, rel-f1, rel-stack), RelGT-AC outperforms the GraphSAGE baseline on all 3 regression autocomplete tasks and achieves up to +10 AUROC points on text-heavy eligibility tasks via the TF-IDF encoder.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RelGT-AC模型，用于关系型数据库中的自动补全任务，通过列掩码策略、统一任务头和TF-IDF文本编码器提升性能，在多个数据集上超越基线模型。
AI.motivation: 关系型数据库结构复杂（多表、异构、时序），传统机器学习难以有效建模；RelBench v2引入了实用的自动补全任务，但现有方法在处理文本列和多类型任务上存在不足。
AI.method: 提出RelGT-AC：（1）列掩码策略防止目标列信息泄露；（2）统一任务头支持分类与回归；（3）TF-IDF文本编码器增强自由文本列的语义建模。
AI.result: 在RelBench v2的7个任务（3个数据集）上，RelGT-AC全面优于GraphSAGE基线，尤其在3个回归任务上表现更优，并在文本密集型资格判定任务中AUROC提升达10点。
AI.conclusion: RelGT-AC通过三项针对性设计显著提升了关系型图神经网络在自动补全任务上的泛化性与实用性，尤其强化了对文本列的建模能力。

title: Toward Gripper-Integrated Active Electrosense for Pre-Contact Sensing in Underwater Soft Grippers
comment: Extended abstract accepted to the IEEE ICRA 2026 Workshop on Manipulation Robustness
summary: Underwater manipulation often occurs under degraded visibility due to turbidity, glare, and gripper occlusion, limiting the reliability of vision-based perception during approach and grasping. In such settings, soft grippers are well suited for compliant interaction, but they typically lack an onboard pre-contact cue that can guide approach and closure when vision is unreliable. This extended abstract explores active electrosense as a lightweight sensing modality that can provide a proximity-like signal prior to contact by measuring perturbations of an applied electric field in conductive media. We instrument an octopus-inspired gripper with a discrete electrode layout and record multi-channel sensing voltages using off-the-shelf hardware. Simulation and tank experiments with a suspended conductive sphere show structured, object-dependent changes in the multi-electrode voltage readout relative to empty-water baselines, with detectability varying across excitation of 5 to 20 V and frequencies from 1 mHz to 1 kHz. These findings motivate systematic investigation of gripper-integrated electrosense as a complementary pre-contact cue for underwater soft manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于主动电感知（active electrosense）的水下软体抓取器近距离感知方法，通过测量导电介质中施加电场的扰动，实现视觉受限环境下的非接触式目标探测。
AI.motivation: 水下操作常因浑浊、眩光和夹爪遮挡导致视觉感知不可靠，而软体夹爪虽适合顺应性交互，却缺乏可靠的接触前感知信号。
AI.method: 在章鱼启发式软体夹爪上集成离散电极阵列，利用商用硬件采集多通道电压信号；结合仿真与水箱实验（使用悬浮导电球），分析不同激励电压（5–20 V）和频率（1 mHz–1 kHz）下的电压响应变化。
AI.result: 实验表明，导电目标会引起多电极电压读数相对于空水基线的结构化、目标依赖性变化，且可检测性随激励参数变化；验证了电感知作为预接触线索的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 主动电感知是一种轻量、可行的水下软体操作补充感知模态，有望提升低能见度环境下抓取前的定位与闭合引导能力。

title: Pretraining Language Models on Historical Text
summary: We introduce TypewriterLM, a 7.24B History language model (LM) trained exclusively on English text predating 1913. Developing History LMs requires addressing challenges in data quality and availability, preventing temporal leakage, designing temporally consistent post-training pipelines, and constructing reliable evaluations. To address these issues, we construct TypewriterCorpus, a 54B-token historical corpus collected from diverse archival and linguistically annotated sources with extensive data cleaning and leakage mitigation procedures. Furthermore, we introduce lexically grounded instructing tuning, a post-training framework that constraints responses to remain directly grounded in historical source documents. Using this framework we construct two historical instruction tuning datasets: History-LIMA and History-SelfInstruct. To evaluate capability and temporal consistency, we introduce History-Event, a benchmark suite for evaluating competence, temporal grounding and data leakage. We release TypewriterLM and all associated resources to support future research on historical language models.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了TypewriterLM，一个仅在1913年以前英文文本上训练的7.24B参数历史语言模型，并提出了配套的数据集、训练方法和评估基准，以解决历史语言模型构建中的数据质量、时间泄露、时序一致性及评估等关键挑战。
AI.motivation: 开发历史语言模型面临数据质量与可用性差、时间泄露风险、缺乏时序一致的后训练流程以及难以可靠评估等挑战。
AI.method: 构建了540亿词符的历史语料库TypewriterCorpus；提出基于词汇锚定的指令微调框架（lexically grounded instructing tuning），并据此构建History-LIMA和History-SelfInstruct两个历史指令数据集；设计History-Event评估套件用于测试能力与时序一致性。
AI.result: 成功训练出TypewriterLM模型，并开源模型及全部配套资源（语料、数据集、评估基准），验证了其在历史任务上的能力与时间一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作系统性地解决了历史语言模型构建的关键难题，为未来历史语言建模研究提供了可复现的基础设施与方法论范式。

title: Hand Trajectory Fusion for Egocentric Natural Language Query Grounding
comment: Accepted for the poster session at the Egocentric Vision (EgoVis) Workshop in Conjunction with CVPR 2026
summary: Egocentric Natural Language Query (NLQ) grounding asks a model to localize, in a long first-person video, the temporal interval that answers a free-form text query. Existing methods fuse video appearance with the query but ignore hand motion, despite the fact that roughly 41% of Ego4D NLQ queries are answered at a moment of hand--object manipulation or their immediate outcomes.We propose a hand-trajectory encoder for converting a sequence of hand skeletons into highly-semantic hand kinematic features, which are then aligned and combined with pretrained video--text features through a cross-attention fusion strategy with adaptive gating. On the Ego4D NLQ v2 validation split, the clearest gains appear for Hand-Object Interaction queries (+2.54 R1@IoU=0.3) and Quantity/State queries (+4.32 R1@IoU=0.3), indicating that hand trajectory provides grounding cues beyond appearance alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种手部轨迹编码器，结合预训练视频-文本特征与手部运动学特征，通过自适应门控的跨注意力融合策略，显著提升了第一人称视频中自然语言查询定位的准确性，尤其在手-物交互和数量/状态类查询上效果突出。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽略了手部运动信息，而Ego4D NLQ数据集中约41%的查询与手-物操作或其直接结果相关，手部运动蕴含关键定位线索。
AI.method: 设计手部轨迹编码器将手部骨架序列转化为高语义手部运动学特征，并通过带自适应门控的跨注意力机制将其与预训练视频-文本特征对齐融合。
AI.result: 在Ego4D NLQ v2验证集上，手-物交互类查询R1@IoU=0.3提升2.54，数量/状态类查询提升4.32，验证了手部轨迹的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 引入手部运动学特征能有效补充外观信息，提升NLQ任务中细粒度时间定位的性能，尤其适用于涉及手部操作的查询。

title: Before Fusion, Ask What to Keep: Contextual Calibration of Multimodal Signals
summary: Multimodal systems often benefit from combining information across language, sound, and visual streams, but this benefit is not guaranteed. A modality that is useful for one input may become distracting for another, and local feature responses within the same modality can disagree with evidence from other sources. This work investigates how to adjust multimodal representations before they are merged by a downstream predictor. We develop a compact calibration module that compares each modality with the others at the summary level, extracts cues of cross-source support and conflict, and converts these cues into instance-wise and dimension-wise modulation signals. The calibration is applied to the original modality features rather than to already fused representations, enabling the model to suppress misleading components, preserve weak but useful evidence, and emphasize responses that are better supported by the current multimodal context. The module is designed as a plug-in component and can be attached to different fusion backbones without changing their prediction heads. Across five benchmarks covering sentiment understanding, action recognition, audio-visual event detection, and audio-visual emotion classification, the proposed pre-combination calibration strategy improves performance under both sequence-based and convolutional fusion settings. Additional analyses under modality removal, synthetic corruption, training dynamics, and feature-level visualization show that calibrating signals before fusion can reduce interference from unreliable modalities and produce more stable multimodal optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在多模态融合前对各模态表征进行校准的轻量级模块，通过在摘要层面比较模态间一致性与冲突，生成实例级和维度级调制信号，从而抑制误导性特征、保留弱但有用信号，并提升下游任务性能。该模块即插即用，适用于多种融合架构，在多个基准上均取得提升。
AI.motivation: 多模态融合并非总能带来增益；不同模态或同一模态内局部特征可能相互冲突或干扰，需在融合前动态调整各模态表征的可靠性。
AI.method: 设计一个紧凑的校准模块，在融合前对各模态的摘要级表征进行两两比较，识别跨源支持与冲突线索，并生成实例-维度双重调制信号，作用于原始模态特征而非已融合表示。模块为即插即用式，不修改预测头。
AI.result: 在情感理解、动作识别、音视频事件检测与音视频情绪分类共5个基准上，该预融合校准策略在序列式与卷积式融合设置下均显著提升性能；消融与鲁棒性分析（模态移除、合成噪声、训练动态、特征可视化）表明其可降低不可靠模态干扰、增强优化稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 在多模态融合前对各模态进行上下文感知的细粒度校准，比直接融合更有效；该策略提升了模型对模态不确定性与冲突的鲁棒性，为多模态学习提供了新的建模思路。

title: ToolGate: Token-Efficient Pre-Call Control for Tool-Augmented Vision-Language Agents
summary: Tool-augmented vision-language agents can acquire external perceptual evidence through OCR, detection, segmentation, and other tools, but executing every proposed tool call is costly and sometimes unnecessary. We study the pre-call control problem: after a ReAct-style VLM agent proposes a perceptual tool call, should the call be executed, or skipped before its output enters the context? Across five benchmarks, we find that the baseline agent exhibits poor local selectivity: helpful and harmful calls occur at similar rates (11.8% vs. 9.9%), while most calls do not change the immediate forced-answer prediction. We introduce ToolGate, a lightweight external controller that predicts execute/skip decisions from trajectory text and simple structural features. Across two Qwen3-VL backbones, ToolGate reduces token cost to 64-69% of the unrestricted ReAct baseline while preserving average accuracy in cross-domain settings. With matched-domain trajectory training on Qwen3-VL-30B, it further improves average accuracy by 1.65 points. These results show that tool-augmented VLM agents benefit not only from better perceptual tools, but also from explicit control over when tool outputs are worth paying for.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ToolGate，一种轻量级外部控制器，用于在视觉语言模型（VLM）代理调用感知工具前决定是否执行或跳过该调用，从而在显著降低token成本的同时保持甚至提升准确率。
AI.motivation: 工具增强的视觉语言代理虽能通过OCR、检测、分割等工具获取外部感知证据，但每次调用都代价高昂且常非必要；亟需在调用前进行选择性控制。
AI.method: 提出ToolGate控制器，基于轨迹文本和简单结构特征预测执行/跳过决策，并在多个基准和Qwen3-VL模型上验证其有效性。
AI.result: ToolGate将token成本降至原始ReAct基线的64–69%，跨域设置下准确率不变；在匹配域训练时，Qwen3-VL-30B上平均准确率提升1.65点。
AI.conclusion: 工具增强的VLM代理不仅需要更强的感知工具，更需显式控制何时值得为工具输出付费，ToolGate为此提供了有效解决方案。

title: BotDirector: Robot Storytelling Across the Symmetrical Reality with Multi-modal Interactions
summary: Robot storytelling offers a unique blend of technological innovation and creative expression that engages children in unprecedented ways. However, the technical aspects are often too complicated for children. We propose an interactive system that facilitates robot storytelling with tangible and natural language interactions. Children arrange the playground with their own stuff and create narratives with an LLM agent. The created narratives are transformed into a motion sequence based on the map and characters, and the motions are executed by self-navigating swarm robots. This system enhances robot storytelling with flexible scenarios, enabling young children to create robot dramas with everyday objects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向儿童的交互式机器人讲故事系统，结合实体操作与自然语言交互，利用大语言模型生成叙事，并通过自导航机器人集群执行动作。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人讲故事技术对儿童而言过于复杂，缺乏适合其认知和操作能力的交互方式。
AI.method: 设计了一个融合实物操作（如摆放日常物品构建场景）与自然语言交互的系统；使用大语言模型（LLM）生成故事；基于地图与角色信息将故事转化为动作序列；由自导航机器人集群执行动作。
AI.result: 实现了儿童可自主参与的机器人戏剧创作，支持灵活多变的叙事场景，并成功用日常物品和小型机器人完成故事演绎。
AI.conclusion: 该系统降低了儿童参与机器人 storytelling 的技术门槛，提升了创造力、叙事能力和人机协作体验，为教育机器人提供了新范式。

title: Hint-Guided Diversified Policy Optimization for LLM Reasoning
summary: Recent developments in Large Language Models (LLMs) have showcased impressive reasoning capabilities, with Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) being a promising enhancement strategy. However, existing reward mechanisms are constrained to the outcome-level correctness and lack explicit signals to guide the model to consider diverse solutions. In contrast, human problem solving typically involves evaluating multiple potential approaches and selecting the most reliable solution, a cognitive process that current RLVR frameworks do not explicitly incentivize. Inspired by this, we propose Hint-Guided Diversified Policy Optimization (HDPO), allowing the model to first list all potential candidate solution outlines as hints and then select the most reliable one for further reasoning. HDPO comprises two stages of Cold Start for Structured Reasoning and Hint-Guided Diversified Reinforcement Learning to incentivize the model to generate diverse and reliable solutions following the ``propose-select-think'' trajectory. Experimental results show that HDPO effectively boosts LLM reasoning and enhances the diversity of candidate solutions as well as the LLM's ability to identify reliable solutions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HDPO方法，通过‘提出-选择-思考’范式增强大语言模型的推理能力，鼓励生成多样化且可靠的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）方法仅关注结果正确性，缺乏对多样化解法的显式引导，而人类解题常通过评估多种方案并选择最可靠者，当前框架未对此认知过程建模。
AI.method: 提出Hint-Guided Diversified Policy Optimization（HDPO），包含两个阶段：结构化推理的冷启动与提示引导的多样化强化学习，使模型先列出多个候选解法提纲（hints），再选择最可靠的进行深入推理。
AI.result: 实验表明HDPO显著提升LLM推理性能，同时增强候选解法的多样性及模型识别可靠解法的能力。
AI.conclusion: HDPO通过模拟人类‘多方案评估—择优推理’的认知机制，为LLM推理提供了更符合认知科学原理的优化路径，有效弥补了现有RLVR方法在解法多样性与可靠性判断上的不足。

title: Towards Compact Autonomous Driving Perception with Balanced Learning and Multi-sensor Fusion
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems. https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9712213
summary: We present a novel compact deep multi-task learning model to handle various autonomous driving perception tasks in one forward pass. The model performs multiple views of semantic segmentation, depth estimation, light detection and ranging (LiDAR) segmentation, and bird's eye view projection simultaneously without being supported by other models. We also provide an adaptive loss weighting algorithm to tackle the imbalanced learning issue that occurred due to plenty of given tasks. Through data pre-processing and intermediate sensor fusion techniques, the model can process and combine multiple input modalities retrieved from RGB cameras, dynamic vision sensors (DVS), and LiDAR placed at several positions on the ego vehicle. Therefore, a better understanding of a dynamically changing environment can be achieved. Based on the ablation study, the model variant trained with our proposed method achieves a better performance. Furthermore, a comparative study is also conducted to clarify its performance and effectiveness against the combination of some recent models. As a result, our model maintains better performance even with much fewer parameters. Hence, the model can inference faster with less GPU memory utilization. Moreover, the result tends to be consistent in 3 different CARLA simulation datasets and 1 real-world nuScenes-lidarseg dataset. To support future research, we share codes and other files publicly at https://github.com/oskarnatan/compact-perception.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种紧凑型深度多任务学习模型，可在单次前向传播中同时完成语义分割、深度估计、LiDAR分割和鸟瞰图投影等多种自动驾驶感知任务，并通过自适应损失加权和多模态传感器融合提升性能与效率。
AI.motivation: 解决自动驾驶中多任务感知模型参数量大、计算开销高、多任务学习不平衡以及多模态数据融合困难等问题。
AI.method: 设计紧凑型多任务深度网络；引入自适应损失加权算法缓解任务间学习不平衡；采用数据预处理与中间层传感器融合技术，整合RGB相机、动态视觉传感器（DVS）和多位置LiDAR输入。
AI.result: 在CARLA仿真数据集（3个）和nuScenes-lidarseg真实数据集上验证了模型有效性；相比多个近期单任务模型组合，在更少参数下取得更好或相当的性能；推理更快、GPU内存占用更低；结果具有一致性和泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 该紧凑多任务模型兼顾精度、效率与泛化能力，为车载实时感知提供了可行方案，并开源代码以支持后续研究。

title: Locality Does Not Imply Reachability: Boundary Repair in Block-Sparse Causal Attention
summary: Sparse causal attention is usually described by sequence locality: nearby tokens should remain easy to access, while distant tokens may be dropped to reduce cost. This paper studies a mismatch between sequence locality and attention-graph reachability. In fixed block causal attention, two adjacent tokens can be disconnected in the attention graph at every depth. We formalize this boundary artifact through structural dependency sets: if every attention layer uses the same fixed block causal mask and all remaining operations are positionwise, a target representation can depend only on tokens in its own block prefix. This yields an architecture-level boundary-copy separation for a constructed K-way boundary-copy distribution, with top-1 accuracy upper bound 1/K and expected cross-entropy lower bound log K. We then derive phase-conditioned coverage functions showing that reachability depends on both source-target distance and the target's offset within its block. These coverage laws predict when a sparse pattern should fail, when a repair can help, and why sliding-window attention and boundary repair are not interchangeable. Boundary Bridge Attention is treated as a constructive witness: it preserves the fixed block path and adds zero-additional-parameter auxiliary causal edges near block boundaries using shared projections. Controlled 1024-token experiments show that gains concentrate in coverage-aligned diagnostics. As secondary external-validity evidence, a fixed-checkpoint 8K-token Qwen2.5-7B probe shows the same coverage-incomparability pattern. The contribution is a theory-guided diagnostic framework for locality-reachability mismatch in block-sparse causal attention, together with phase-conditioned coverage analysis and a minimal constructive repair.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了稀疏因果注意力机制中序列局部性与注意力图可达性之间的不匹配问题，提出了结构依赖集的概念，并推导出相位条件覆盖函数来预测稀疏模式的失效情形；进而提出Boundary Bridge Attention作为最小修复方案，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 固定块因果注意力中相邻token在注意力图中可能完全断连，导致模型无法跨块获取信息，暴露了序列局部性假设与实际信息可达性之间的根本矛盾。
AI.method: 形式化定义结构依赖集以刻画块内前缀依赖限制；推导相位条件覆盖函数分析可达性规律；设计Boundary Bridge Attention，在不增加参数的前提下添加边界辅助边；通过可控长度实验与大模型探针实验验证理论预测。
AI.result: 证明了固定块因果注意力下top-1准确率上界为1/K、交叉熵下界为log K；覆盖定律成功预测稀疏模式失效与修复效果；Boundary Bridge Attention在覆盖对齐任务上显著提升性能；8K长程探针证实覆盖不可比性普遍存在。
AI.conclusion: 序列局部性不等于注意力图可达性，需引入相位感知的覆盖分析框架；Boundary Bridge Attention提供了理论可解释、参数零增量的边界修复范式；该工作为块稀疏因果注意力的设计与诊断建立了新理论基准。

title: SkillDAG: Self-Evolving Typed Skill Graphs for LLM Skill Selection at Scale
summary: As LLM agents adopt large skill libraries, selecting the right subset becomes a structural problem rather than a similarity-matching one: skills depend on, conflict with, specialize, or duplicate one another, a structure invisible to both full enumeration and embedding similarity. We present SkillDAG, which models inter-skill relationships as a typed directed graph and exposes it to an LLM agent as an inference-time, agent-callable structural retrieval interface, queried and evolved during execution rather than baked into a fixed retrieval pipeline: each search returns vector matches, typed-edge neighbors, and conflict signals, and a propose-then-commit protocol lets the agent register execution-backed edges so the graph accumulates structure across episodes. On ALFWorld and SkillsBench with MiniMax-M2.7, SkillDAG reaches 67.1% success and 27.3% reward, exceeding the strongest reported Graph-of-Skills baseline by +12.8 and +8.6 points; the advantage ports to gpt-5.2-codex, and intrinsic SkillsBench Ret@K rises from 65.5 to 78.2 under matched queries. These gains trace to isolable mechanisms: candidate ranking that stays robust as the pool grows 10x where a fixed seeding-diffusion pipeline degrades, and set-monotone online edits that enlarge ground-truth recall without evicting prior hits.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkillDAG，一种建模技能间结构关系（依赖、冲突、特化、重复）的有向图方法，通过推理时可调用的结构化检索接口提升LLM智能体在复杂技能选择任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型智能体采用大规模技能库，技能选择已从简单的相似性匹配问题转变为需考虑技能间结构依赖关系的复杂问题；传统方法（如全枚举或嵌入相似度）无法捕捉这些隐含结构。
AI.method: 构建SkillDAG——一个类型化的有向图，显式建模技能间的语义关系，并设计推理时可调用的结构化检索接口；支持返回向量匹配结果、类型化邻接边和冲突信号，并通过‘提议-确认’协议使智能体能在执行中动态更新图结构。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和SkillsBench基准上，SkillDAG显著超越现有Graph-of-Skills基线（+12.8%成功率、+8.6%奖励），且泛化至不同模型（如gpt-5.2-codex）；SkillsBench的Ret@K从65.5提升至78.2；机制分析表明其优势源于鲁棒的候选排序与单调增益的在线图编辑。
AI.conclusion: SkillDAG证明了显式建模技能结构关系并支持执行中演化的图结构接口，是提升LLM智能体技能选择能力的有效范式。

title: GeoAlign: Beyond Semantics with State-Guided Spatial Alignment in VLA Models
summary: Current Vision--Language--Action (VLA) models often optimize for semantic grounding, whereas executable manipulation requires geometry-aware spatial alignment and dynamic affordance selection. We introduce GeoAlign, a state-guided spatial alignment architecture for VLA policy learning. GeoAlign post-trains an RGB geometry branch with robot-domain RGB-D supervision, yielding RGB-derived Geometry-Enhanced Post-Trained (GEP) features for policy rollout. The robot's proprioceptive state queries the GEP feature grid, producing compact, phase-dependent geometry tokens for action prediction. GeoAlign achieves 99.0% on LIBERO, 85.3% across three SimplerEnv-Fractal tasks, and 78.8% on eight geometry-critical real-world ALOHA tasks, with ablations confirming the value of geometry post-training and proprioceptive-state-guided querying.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GeoAlign，一种状态引导的空间对齐架构，通过RGB几何分支后训练和机器人本体感知状态查询，提升视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在几何敏感任务中的执行能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型侧重语义对齐，但可执行操作需几何感知的空间对齐与动态功能选择。
AI.method: GeoAlign引入RGB几何分支并用机器人域RGB-D数据进行后训练，生成几何增强的GEP特征；再利用机器人本体感知状态查询该特征网格，生成相位依赖的紧凑几何token用于动作预测。
AI.result: 在LIBERO、SimplerEnv-Fractal和真实ALOHA任务上分别达到99.0%、85.3%和78.8%成功率，消融实验证明了几何后训练与状态引导查询的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GeoAlign显著提升了VLA模型在几何关键任务中的泛化与执行能力，验证了显式几何建模与状态引导特征融合的重要性。

title: Hallucinations as Orthogonal Noise: Inference-Time Manifold Alignment via Dynamic Contextual Orthogonalization
summary: Hallucination in Large Language Models (LLMs), characterized by the generation of content inconsistent with contextual facts or logical constraints -- remains a persistent challenge for reliable deployment. In this work, we address this issue through a geometric framework rooted in the linear representation hypothesis. We propose that hallucinations manifest as orthogonal noise relative to the semantic manifold of the residual stream. Specifically, we hypothesize that while attention heads ideally propagate information congruent with the context subspace, hallucinations arise when specific heads introduce components orthogonal to this subspace, disrupting the coherence of the latent representation. Based on this formulation, we introduce Dynamic Contextual Orthogonalization (DCO), an inference-time intervention method. DCO utilizes the input residual stream as a dynamic context anchor to perform orthogonal decomposition on attention head outputs. To distinguish between context-aligned semantic updates and divergent noise, DCO employs a layer-wise Z-score suppression mechanism that selectively attenuates outlier orthogonal components based on statistical distributions. Evaluations on Llama-3-8B and 70B across benchmarks such as XSum, NQ-Swap, and IFEval demonstrate that DCO achieves superior contextual faithfulness compared to state-of-the-art intervention baselines. Furthermore, DCO maintains high performance on knowledge-intensive tasks like TriviaQA and TruthfulQA, effectively mitigating the trade-off between hallucination suppression and parametric knowledge retention often observed in existing methods. Our findings validate the geometric interpretation of hallucinations and establish DCO as a computationally efficient approach for enforcing manifold alignment.Our code is available at https://github.com/Harry-Miral/DCO

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于几何视角的推理时干预方法Dynamic Contextual Orthogonalization（DCO），将大模型幻觉建模为残差流语义流形上的正交噪声，并通过动态正交分解与层内Z-score抑制来抑制幻觉，同时保持知识能力。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型中的幻觉问题长期阻碍其可靠部署，现有方法常在抑制幻觉与保留知识之间存在权衡。
AI.method: 基于线性表征假设，将幻觉建模为残差流中偏离语义流形的正交噪声；提出DCO方法：以输入残差流为动态锚点，对注意力头输出做正交分解，并采用层内Z-score统计机制选择性抑制异常正交分量。
AI.result: 在XSum、NQ-Swap、IFEval等基准上显著提升上下文忠实度，同时在TriviaQA和TruthfulQA等知识密集型任务上保持高性能，优于现有干预基线。
AI.conclusion: 验证了幻觉的几何解释合理性，DCO是一种计算高效、兼顾幻觉抑制与知识保留的流形对齐干预方法。

title: MUSE: A Unified Agentic Harness for MLLMs
summary: Despite rapid progress, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) still fail on tasks that humans solve effortlessly, such as navigating a grid maze from a screenshot or selecting the correct puzzle piece. Rather than retraining the model, we ask a complementary question: how much capability can be elicited from a frozen MLLM purely by improving the execution scaffold around it? We introduce MUSE, a multimodal unified structured execution harness that wraps any off-the-shelf MLLM with composable modules for task representation, visual processing, perception tool use, structured parsing, deterministic verification, and verifier-guided repair, without any model retraining. We evaluate MUSE across diverse benchmarks spanning visual spatial planning, visual perception, multimodal reasoning, and fine-grained visual discrimination, using multiple state-of-the-art MLLMs. MUSE delivers consistent gains over the bare model in all settings, with the largest jumps on challenging instances. Further analysis reveals that many MLLM failures arise from harness-level shortcomings rather than fundamental model deficits, and can be addressed through verifier-guided repair without touching the model. These findings highlight the agentic multimodal harness as a critical yet underexplored design dimension, offering an orthogonal avenue for improving MLLMs beyond model-centric optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MUSE框架，通过改进执行架构而非重新训练模型，显著提升冻结多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在视觉空间规划、感知、推理等任务上的性能，揭示了执行层缺陷是MLLM失败主因之一。
AI.motivation: 尽管MLLM快速发展，但在人类易解的视觉任务（如网格迷宫导航、拼图匹配）上仍表现不佳；作者探究是否可通过优化模型外部执行架构（而非重训练）来激发其潜在能力。
AI.method: 提出MUSE——一种无需模型重训练的多模态统一结构化执行框架，包含任务表示、视觉处理、感知工具调用、结构化解析、确定性验证与验证器引导修复等可组合模块，封装任意现成MLLM。
AI.result: 在多个视觉空间规划、感知、多模态推理和细粒度视觉判别基准上，MUSE对多种SOTA MLLM均带来一致且显著提升，尤其在困难样本上增益最大；分析表明多数失败源于执行层缺陷，可经验证器引导修复解决。
AI.conclusion: 执行架构（agentic multimodal harness）是提升MLLM性能的关键但被忽视的设计维度，为超越模型中心化优化提供了正交新路径。

title: Filter, Then Reweight: Rethinking Optimization Granularity in On-Policy Distillation
summary: On-Policy distillation (OPD) in large language models is shifting from full-trace KL supervision toward more selective training paradigms. Recent OPD methods increasingly focus on selecting which trajectories to learn from, which tokens are most informative, and which supervision signals are most reliable. Motivated by this trend, we rethink optimization granularity of OPD and propose \fireicon\ FiRe-OPD (Filter, then Reweight), which jointly adjusts supervision signals at both trajectory and token levels. In details, FiRe-OPD first filters trajectories to remove low-quality rollout samples, and then applies soft reweighting within the retained trajectories to emphasize informative tokens. Compared with hard token selection, FiRe-OPD leverages a soft-weighting mechanism to effectively mitigate information loss and enhance optimization stability, thereby achieving finer-grained OPD optimization. We validate the effectiveness of FiRe-OPD across strong-to-weak, single-teacher, and multi-teacher settings, and demonstrate its superiority over recent token-level OPD methods ( (e.g., +6.25 on AIME 2024 in strong-to-weak, +18.81 on Miner in multi-teacher). Our code is available at https://github.com/YuYingLi0/FiRe-OPD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FiRe-OPD方法，通过先过滤低质量轨迹、再对保留轨迹内token进行软重加权，实现更细粒度的在线策略蒸馏（OPD），在多种设置下显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型的在线策略蒸馏（OPD）正从全轨迹KL监督转向更选择性的训练范式，关注轨迹选择、关键token识别和可靠监督信号筛选；作者由此重新思考OPD的优化粒度问题。
AI.method: 提出FiRe-OPD（Filter, then Reweight）：首先过滤掉低质量rollout轨迹，再在保留轨迹中对token进行软重加权，以强调信息量大的token；采用软加权而非硬选择，减少信息损失并提升优化稳定性。
AI.result: 在强→弱、单教师、多教师等多种OPD设置下验证有效，显著超越近期token级OPD方法（如在AIME 2024上+6.25，在Miner上+18.81）。
AI.conclusion: FiRe-OPD通过联合轨迹级过滤与token级软重加权，实现了更精细、稳定且高效的OPD优化，为策略蒸馏提供了新思路。

title: CORE: Conflict-Oriented Reasoning for General Multimodal Manipulation Detection
summary: The rapid rise of generative AI has made multimodal fake news increasingly realistic and pervasive, posing severe threats to public trust and social stability. Existing detection methods rely heavily on manipulation-specific models and large-scale labeled data, resulting in poor generalization to emerging manipulation types. We observed that the essence of manipulated misinformation lies in its intrinsic conflicts, \textbf{i.e.,} semantic or physical inconsistencies either across modalities or with common world knowledge. Inspired by this observation, we propose \textbf{C}onflict-\textbf{O}riented \textbf{RE}asoning (\textbf{CORE}) framework, an effective paradigm that learns to endows multimodal large language models (MLLMs) with explicit conflict-capturing capability. To this end, CORE first constructs the Conflict Attribution Corpus (CAC) with fine-grained annotations of conflict factors and sources, providing essential data support for subsequent conflict perception training. By performing conflict-oriented representation enhancement and reasoning based on CAC, CORE achieves robust and generalizable conflict detection, effectively and rapidly adapting to unseen manipulation types with a few samples or in even zero-shot settings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CORE surpasses state-of-the-art models. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/shen8424/CORE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CORE框架，通过构建冲突归因语料库（CAC）并进行冲突导向的表征增强与推理，使多模态大语言模型具备显式的冲突捕捉能力，从而实现对新型操纵类型的泛化检测。
AI.motivation: 现有检测方法依赖特定操纵模型和大量标注数据，难以泛化到新兴操纵类型；而伪造信息的本质在于其内在的语义或物理不一致性。
AI.method: 提出Conflict-Oriented REasoning（CORE）框架，构建细粒度标注的Conflict Attribution Corpus（CAC），并基于此进行冲突导向的表征增强与推理训练。
AI.result: CORE在多种设置下（包括少样本和零样本）均能有效检测未知操纵类型，性能超越当前最优模型。
AI.conclusion: CORE通过建模跨模态及常识层面的冲突，显著提升了多模态虚假新闻检测的泛化性与鲁棒性。

title: AirDreamer: Generalist Drone Navigation with World Models
summary: Navigating a drone in unseen and cluttered environments requires reliable generalization to unseen scene layouts and understanding of environmental structure relative to the robot's capabilities. Previous methods, which assume the same environment configuration, often rely heavily on human-designed perception pipelines and predefined rules to guide the robot toward the target. This process is environment-dependent and generalizes poorly across environments. Inspired by animal navigation behavior, we design a navigation framework that navigates with a reinforcement-learning-based policy on top of a world-model-based environment understanding to overcome these issues. In addition, a sparse reward function without hand-crafted shaping terms is designed to avoid local minima traps and encourage yaw control behaviors. In simulation and on real drones, our method exhibits emergent capabilities for navigating complex, unseen environments and escaping local optima where other methods fail. In challenging maps, it achieves a 5.3% higher navigation success rate than best baseline. Furthermore, the proposed framework achieves effective sim-to-real transfer without any tuning during deployment. The code will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习与世界模型的无人机导航框架，旨在提升在未知复杂环境中的泛化能力与鲁棒性，摆脱对人工设计感知模块和预定义规则的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖固定环境假设和人工设计的感知流程，泛化能力差，难以应对未见过的杂乱环境。
AI.method: 构建了一个基于强化学习策略与世界模型的端到端导航框架，并设计了无手工塑形项的稀疏奖励函数，以避免局部最优并鼓励偏航控制。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实无人机上均展现出对复杂未知环境的强适应性，在挑战性地图中导航成功率比最优基线高5.3%，且实现无需调优的高效sim-to-real迁移。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合世界模型理解与稀疏奖励驱动的强化学习，显著提升了无人机在未知 cluttered 环境中的自主导航泛化能力与鲁棒性。

title: SEA-Embedding: Open and Reproducible Text Embeddings for Southeast Asia
summary: Text embeddings are fundamental to many downstream applications, making robustness important for real-world NLP. However, most recent state-of-the-art embedding models are not reproducible because they rely on closed or undisclosed training data, and they remain insufficiently robust for Southeast Asian languages. We present SEA-Embedding, a fully open and reproducible text-embedding pipeline for Southeast Asian languages trained only on publicly available data, and use it to study three core factors of robust embedding design: data composition, training objective, and base encoder initialization. SEA-Embedding achieves state-of-the-art results on SEA-BED while enabling systematic and reproducible analysis of robust text embeddings for the region.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SEA-Embedding，一个完全开源、可复现的面向东南亚语言的文本嵌入模型，仅使用公开数据训练，并系统研究了数据构成、训练目标和编码器初始化对鲁棒嵌入设计的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有最先进的文本嵌入模型大多不可复现（依赖封闭或未公开数据），且对东南亚语言鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 构建了完全开源、仅基于公开数据训练的SEA-Embedding流水线，并系统分析数据组成、训练目标和基础编码器初始化三个关键设计因素。
AI.result: 在SEA-BED基准上达到当前最优性能，同时支持对东南亚语言鲁棒文本嵌入的系统性、可复现分析。
AI.conclusion: SEA-Embedding验证了仅用公开数据也能构建高性能、鲁棒且可复现的区域化文本嵌入模型，为低资源语言嵌入研究提供了新范式。

title: FCUS-rPPG: A Fast-Converging Unsupervised Framework for Remote Photoplethysmography via Gradient Oscillation Suppression
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables non-contact extraction of blood volume pulse (BVP) signals using consumer-grade cameras. Recent unsupervised rPPG methods learn BVP representations without requiring ground-truth physiological annotations, yet their optimization is often hindered by noisy and unstable gradients, resulting in slow convergence and limited cross-domain generalization. In this paper, we propose FCUS-rPPG, a fast-converging unsupervised rPPG framework with strong generalization capability. Motivated by the observation that BVP representations exhibit both multi-spectral covariation and low-dimensional manifold structure, we design a spectrally shared backbone that facilitates BVP feature disentanglement while improving optimization efficiency. To jointly enhance convergence stability and generalization performance, we further develop a unified optimization framework operating at the gradient, loss-landscape, and feature-representation levels. Specifically, a post-verification masking mechanism filters out misleading gradients according to the weak-amplitude physiological prior of BVP signals; a perturbation-based loss landscape smoothing strategy steers optimization toward more generalizable flat minima; and a noise-aware null-space regularization constrains feature updates to the orthogonal complement of the noise subspace, thereby mitigating noise-induced representation drift. Extensive experiments on five datasets demonstrate that FCUS-rPPG requires only one training epoch, whereas existing methods typically require tens to hundreds of epochs. Notably, FCUS-rPPG consistently achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in cross-dataset evaluations. This study provides an efficient and robust solution to the real-world deployment of unsupervised rPPG. The source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/JiaJieLee/FCUS-rPPG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FCUS-rPPG，一种快速收敛、强泛化的无监督远程光电容积脉搏波（rPPG）框架，通过多谱协变建模、梯度筛选、损失曲面平滑与噪声感知正则化，在仅需1个训练周期下达到SOTA跨域性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督rPPG方法因梯度噪声大、不稳定，导致收敛慢、跨域泛化能力弱；而BVP信号具有多谱协变性和低维流形结构，可被利用以提升优化效率与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计谱共享骨干网络实现BVP特征解耦；引入三层次统一优化框架：(1) 基于BVP弱幅值先验的后验证掩码机制过滤误导性梯度；(2) 扰动驱动的损失曲面平滑策略导向更平坦、可泛化的极小值；(3) 噪声感知零空间正则化约束特征更新正交于噪声子空间。
AI.result: 在五个数据集上仅需1个训练epoch即超越现有方法（通常需数十至数百epoch），并在所有跨数据集评估中持续取得SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: FCUS-rPPG为无监督rPPG的实际部署提供了高效、鲁棒的新范式，兼具训练速度与泛化能力。

title: $Ψ$-Bench: Evaluating Persona-Sensitive Influencing in Persuasive Dialogues
summary: Personalization is a crucial capability of modern language agents. However, current research primarily positions personalized agents as passive responders to user preferences, limiting their ability to interact with users and provide suggestions or guidance proactively. To systematically evaluate such proactive personalization in realistic interactions, we propose $Ψ$-Bench, a benchmark for assessing LLMs' ability to influence realistic users through conversation. We design three real-world interaction scenarios that involve persuasion in $Ψ$-Bench, and endow simulated clients with personal characteristics through explicit user profiles derived from dialogue histories. We evaluate 10 frontier LLMs on $Ψ$-Bench and find that while most models can produce coherent and reasonable arguments, even state-of-the-art models still leave considerable room for improvement in persuasion. We also find that providing access to client profiles yields an average performance gain of 18.24\%, highlighting the importance of user-specific information for effective persuasion. Overall, our work highlights persona-sensitive influencing as a challenging yet practical direction for evaluating and developing more proactive personalized LLM agents. Codes are available at: https://github.com/Hanpx20/Psi-Bench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ψ-Bench基准，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）在真实对话中主动影响用户的能力，强调基于用户画像的个性化说服能力，并发现当前前沿模型在此任务上仍有显著提升空间。
AI.motivation: 现有个性化语言代理多为被动响应型，缺乏主动建议与引导能力；亟需构建能评估其在真实交互中主动个性化影响能力的基准。
AI.method: 构建Ψ-Bench基准，包含三个现实说服场景，利用对话历史生成显式用户画像以模拟个性化客户，并在10个前沿LLM上进行评测。
AI.result: 多数模型能生成合理论点，但说服效果仍有限；接入客户画像平均提升性能18.24%。
AI.conclusion: persona-sensitive influencing（人格敏感型影响）是评估和构建更主动个性化LLM代理的重要且实用方向。

title: DELTAMEM: Incremental Experience Memory for LLM Agents via Residual Trees
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents increasingly rely on memory to learn from experiences over continual interactions. However, storing experiences as independent, flat units leads to substantial redundancy and retrieval conflicts, as similar episodes repeat overlapping content and subtle scene variations cause retrieved memories to offer contradictory guidance. To address this, we introduce residual experience, positing that newly acquired experience is often an incremental variation of existing knowledge. We propose DeltaMem, a framework that organizes experience memory into two independent residual trees, one storing goal-conditioned task experience as reusable skills and another for scene-level environment knowledge. Each tree uses a root node for generalized base experiences and incremental delta nodes for subsequent variations, allowing related experiences to share a common foundation without duplication. For retrieval, a failure-penalized similarity scan locates the best match, reconstructing the full experience via root-to-match chain composition. An autonomous consolidation mechanism distills high-frequency paths into new root nodes, enabling the trees to self-organize from general heuristics to specialized variants. Experiments across diverse interactive environments show that DeltaMem consistently outperforms existing baselines. To facilitate future research, we release the code at https://github.com/import-myself/DeltaMem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeltaMem框架，通过残差经验树结构组织记忆，将新经验视为对已有知识的增量变化，从而减少冗余和检索冲突，并在多个交互环境中显著提升LLM智能体性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体将经验以独立扁平方式存储，导致大量冗余和检索冲突，相似情节重复且场景微变引发矛盾指导。
AI.method: 提出残差经验概念，构建两个独立残差树：一个用于目标条件任务经验（可复用技能），另一个用于场景级环境知识；每棵树以根节点表示通用基础经验，增量delta节点表示后续变体；采用失败惩罚的相似性扫描进行检索，并通过根到匹配路径组合重建完整经验；引入自主合并机制，将高频路径提炼为新根节点以实现自组织演化。
AI.result: 在多个多样化交互环境中实验表明，DeltaMem持续优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DeltaMem通过残差树结构和自组织机制有效缓解了经验记忆中的冗余与冲突问题，提升了LLM智能体在持续交互中的学习与泛化能力。

title: Wheel-Mounted/GNSS Fusion with AI-Aided Position Updates
summary: Accurate and robust localization remains a fundamental challenge for autonomous ground vehicles. In this work, we propose a hybrid neural inertial navigation framework that integrates a wheel-mounted inertial sensors, enforced periodic trajectories, and a simple, efficient neural network capable of regressing vehicle displacement with GNSS position updates in an error-state extended Kalman filter. The periodic trajectories increase the inertial signal-to-noise ratio, allowing the network to use only inertial readings to estimate displacement. The approach is validated through real-world experiments using multiple wheel-mounted inertial sensors. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a significant improvement in positioning accuracy, reducing the position root mean squared error by approximately 46 % compared to standard wheel-mounted inertial sensor fusion with GNSS updates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合神经惯性导航框架，结合轮式惯性传感器、周期性轨迹和轻量神经网络，在误差状态扩展卡尔曼滤波中实现高精度定位，显著提升GNSS辅助下的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 准确且鲁棒的定位仍是地面自主车辆的基本挑战。
AI.method: 提出一种混合神经惯性导航框架，融合轮式惯性传感器、强制周期性轨迹与简单高效的神经网络，在误差状态扩展卡尔曼滤波中回归车辆位移，并利用GNSS位置更新进行校正；周期性轨迹提升惯性信噪比，使网络仅依赖惯性数据即可估计位移。
AI.result: 在多轮式惯性传感器的真实实验中验证，相比标准轮式惯性/GNSS融合方法，位置均方根误差降低约46%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了自主车辆在GNSS受限环境下的定位精度与鲁棒性，验证了周期性运动约束与神经网络辅助惯性导航的有效性。

title: Conditional Hypothesis Generation for LLM-Based Text Analysis with Researcher-Specified Covariates
summary: A core goal of computational social science is to discover interpretable differences in how language varies across outcomes of interest, such as political affiliation or instructional quality. Recent LLM-based hypothesis generation methods describe such differences in natural language, but select for globally discriminative patterns without accounting for covariates that shape the data based on researchers' domain knowledge. When covariates are ignored, selected patterns can reflect confounds rather than differences of substantive interest. We introduce conditional hypothesis generation, a framework that incorporates researcher-specified covariates to steer hypothesis discovery toward differences that hold within relevant subgroups. Two challenges arise: the target subgroup may be underrepresented (stratum imbalance), and the direction of a difference may reverse across subgroups (sign reversal). We propose two econometrics-inspired methods: one introduces feature--covariate interactions to detect sign reversals, and the other applies within-stratum demeaning and inverse-frequency reweighting to equalize underrepresented strata. Synthetic experiments show each method outperforms global baselines in its targeted setting, and expert evaluation on two real-world datasets confirms that covariate-aware generation surfaces more useful hypotheses within relevant subgroups.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种条件假设生成框架，通过引入研究者指定的协变量来引导语言差异假设的发现，以避免混淆因素影响，并解决了层间不平衡和符号反转两大挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的假设生成方法忽略了研究者领域知识中的协变量，导致所发现的语言差异可能反映的是混杂因素而非真正感兴趣的区别。
AI.method: 提出条件假设生成框架，包含两种计量经济学启发的方法：一是引入特征-协变量交互项以检测符号反转；二是采用层内去均值与逆频重加权以缓解层间不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在合成实验中，两种方法在其各自目标场景下均优于全局基线；专家在两个真实数据集上的评估表明，协变量感知的生成能挖掘出更具实用性的子组内假设。
AI.conclusion: 引入协变量可显著提升假设生成的因果解释力与实用性，为计算社会科学中的可解释语言分析提供了新范式。

title: ROBUST-WT: Robust Uncertainty-aware Segmentation Transform via Whitening and Training Enhancements
summary: Generalized segmentation of medical images prevents performance degradation when different imaging devices and clinical protocols are used across multiple domains. The Whitening Transform-based Probabilistic Shape Regularization Extractor (WT-PSE), published in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging in 2024, addresses this challenge by employing feature decorrelation and Wasserstein distance-based knowledge distillation to achieve robust cross-domain segmentation. This study systematically examines improvements to the WT-PSE learning framework. Four limitations in the original implementation are identified: limited training augmentations that fail to simulate real scanner variations, reliance on per-pixel binary cross-entropy loss that is sensitive to edge noise, the absence of a scheduled loss weighting strategy that may destabilize early training, and the lack of ablation switches for controlled scientific comparison. To address these issues, we propose four enhancements: (1) domain-adaptive augmentation including random erasing, gamma correction, and salt-and-pepper noise; (2) a hybrid BCE and Dice loss function for improved edge-aware segmentation under noisy conditions; (3) a curriculum-based Dice weight scheduling strategy; and (4) command-line control flags for systematic ablation studies. Experiments on the fundus optic disc segmentation benchmark demonstrate that the improved pipeline achieves a final epoch optic-disc Dice score of 0.956 and an ASD score of 13.31, outperforming the baseline epoch-5 Dice score of 0.939. These results indicate that training-level improvements can provide consistent performance gains without modifying the underlying WT-PSE architecture.

AI.tldr: 本文针对WT-PSE模型在跨域医学图像分割中的四个局限性，提出四项训练级改进（域自适应增强、混合损失函数、课程制Dice权重调度、命令行消融控制），在视盘分割任务上显著提升性能，验证了训练策略优化的有效性。
AI.motivation: 解决原WT-PSE模型在跨域医学图像分割中存在的四大问题：数据增强不足、损失函数对边缘噪声敏感、损失权重策略不稳定、缺乏可控的消融实验机制。
AI.method: 提出四项改进：(1) 域自适应增强（随机擦除、伽马校正、椒盐噪声）；(2) BCE与Dice混合损失；(3) 课程制Dice权重调度；(4) 命令行驱动的消融开关。
AI.result: 在视盘分割基准上，最终Dice达0.956，ASD为13.31，优于基线epoch-5的Dice 0.939；证明训练级改进可不改动网络结构而稳定提效。
AI.conclusion: 训练策略的系统性优化（增强、损失设计、权重调度、实验可控性）是提升WT-PSE跨域鲁棒性的有效途径，无需修改原始架构即可获得一致性能增益。

title: Binary Road Surface Classification Using Machine Learning on Production Vehicle Signals During Cruising
summary: Knowledge of real-time road slipperiness, or even better, a refined estimate of peak grip potential, is a critical input for vehicle warning and intervention control systems. Typically, friction is estimated through dynamics-based recursive estimators by calculating the slip slope; however, its efficacy is heavily constrained by the vehicle dynamic scenario. When the vehicle is cruising and there is little to no slip, these methods become ineffective due to the inability of present-day production-grade sensors, such as wheel speed sensors, and methods to either measure or accurately estimate micro slip, which is crucial for distinguishing different surfaces. To address this challenge, the correlation between vehicle signals and road surface condition during cruising needs to be uncovered using machine learning. In this paper, a feature-based framework and an end-to-end data-driven framework are used to correlate the statistics of vehicle dynamics behavior with the condition of the road surface and perform binary classification into grip, dry or damp, and slip, snow or ice, conditions. A sliding-window approach is adopted to batch a short buffered window of wheel speeds, wheel torques, longitudinal acceleration, steering angle, and yaw rate, which are fed into a machine learning module for predicting the road state. Validation results on public-road data show scenarios where the data-driven method identifies the road surface correctly even during cruising, showing promise for accurate data-driven friction-related state estimators in the field of tire and vehicle dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的数据驱动方法，利用车辆动态信号（如轮速、轮矩、纵向加速度等）在巡航状态下估计路面附着状态（干/湿 vs 雪/冰），克服了传统动力学方法在无滑移时失效的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于动力学的摩擦估计方法在车辆巡航、无明显滑移时因无法检测微滑移而失效，亟需利用机器学习挖掘车辆信号与路面状态间的隐含关联。
AI.method: 构建了特征驱动和端到端两种数据驱动框架；采用滑动窗口对轮速、轮矩、纵向加速度、转向角和横摆率等信号进行统计建模，并输入机器学习模块进行二分类（高附着 vs 低附着）。
AI.result: 在公开道路实测数据上验证表明，该方法能在巡航工况下准确识别路面状态（如区分干路与冰雪路面），性能优于传统动力学方法。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动方法为实时、高精度的路面附着状态估计提供了可行路径，有望提升车辆预警与主动干预系统的可靠性。

title: The Shadow Price of Reasoning: Economic Perspective on Optimal Budget Allocation for LLMs
summary:
Inference-time scaling has emerged as a critical avenue for enhancing Large Language Models' performance, yet real-world deployment is constrained by strict computational budgets. In this work, we formulate inference budget allocation as a global constrained optimization problem governed by economic principles. By modeling per-query reasoning utility with a shifted-surge function, we derive an optimal allocation policy based on a global shadow price that equilibrates marginal utility under resource scarcity. Based on this theory, we propose Constrained Latent-utility Equilibrium Allocation for Reasoning (CLEAR). It performs rational abandonment and reallocates resources from insolvent queries to solvable queries near their emergence thresholds.
  Extensive experiments on several reasoning tasks with different traffic streams demonstrate that CLEAR significantly improves the Pareto frontier of total token cost versus mean accuracy. In resource-scarce regimes, CLEAR achieves up to a 3x improvement in global accuracy compared to uniform allocation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于经济学原理的推理时资源分配方法CLEAR，通过建模每查询推理效用并引入全局影子价格，实现预算约束下的最优分配，在资源受限下显著提升整体准确率。
AI.motivation: 现实部署中，大语言模型推理受限于严格的计算预算，需在有限资源下最大化整体性能。
AI.method: 将推理预算分配建模为受经济原理约束的全局优化问题，采用偏移型激增函数刻画单次查询效用，并基于全局影子价格导出最优分配策略；据此提出CLEAR方法，支持理性放弃与跨查询资源再分配。
AI.result: 在多个推理任务及不同流量模式下，CLEAR显著改善总token成本与平均准确率的Pareto前沿；在资源稀缺场景下，全局准确率相较均匀分配最高提升3倍。
AI.conclusion: 基于效用均衡的约束优化框架能更高效地利用推理预算，CLEAR为实际部署中平衡效率与效果提供了可扩展、理论支撑强的解决方案。

title: EaDex: A Cross-Embodiment Dexterous Manipulation Framework from Low-Cost Demonstrations
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, Conference: CoRL 2026, Submitted as Preprint
summary: Dexterous manipulation learning has long been hindered by the high costs of data and training, as pure reinforcement learning typically requires large-scale interactive exploration and imitation learning depends on high-quality demonstrations that are expensive to collect. To address this problem, we propose EaDex, a multi-embodiment dexterous manipulation learning framework under low-cost demonstration conditions, which enables rapid generation of demonstration data and consequently reduces training time for efficient dexterous manipulation. At the data level, EaDex captures human hand motions using only a single RGB-D camera and constructs structured demonstration data through MANO-based hand modeling, data normalization, and motion retargeting. At the learning level, we introduce a contact-reward-based dynamic demonstration annealing mechanism, which guides early-stage exploration under demonstration and gradually transitions to autonomous optimization with accumulating contact rewards. Using our custom dataset, we evaluate EaDex on three dexterous hands and three articulated object-opening tasks, covering nine cross-embodiment manipulation settings, achieving a 55.3% relative improvement over the baseline without demonstration annealing. These results validate the effectiveness of the proposed low-cost demonstration pipeline and the dynamic demonstration annealing strategy for dexterous manipulation learning.

AI.tldr: EaDex是一种低成本、多形态灵巧操作学习框架，利用单RGB-D相机采集人类手部动作，结合MANO建模与动态示范退火机制，显著提升训练效率与任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 灵巧操作学习长期受限于数据与训练成本高：纯强化学习需大量交互探索，模仿学习依赖昂贵的高质量示范。
AI.method: 提出EaDex框架：数据层面用单RGB-D相机+MANO建模+归一化+运动重定向生成结构化示范；学习层面引入基于接触奖励的动态示范退火机制，从示范引导逐步过渡到自主优化。
AI.result: 在三类灵巧手与三类开箱任务（共九种跨形态设置）上，相较无退火基线提升55.3%成功率。
AI.conclusion: 验证了低成本示范生成流程与动态示范退火策略在灵巧操作学习中的有效性，可显著降低数据与训练成本。

title: The Deliberative Illusion: Diagnosing Factual Attrition and Stance Homogenization in Multi-Agent LLM Deliberation
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems often treat consensus as evidence of successful interaction. For deliberative problems, however, reliability depends on whether agents preserve the facts and viewpoints needed to interpret an issue. We identify the deliberative illusion: discussion produces (1) factual attrition, the progressive loss of issue-critical facts, alongside (2) stance homogenization, the collapse of diverse positions toward consensus. To measure this process, we introduce DelibTrace, a framework that decomposes each issue into atomic facts, labels issue-critical ones, distributes them across agents, and tracks their survival across discussion rounds. Across ethical and news-based deliberation with three representative LLM families, multi-agent discussion erases up to 72% of issue-critical facts. This loss is consequential: retained evidence can reconstruct the issue misleadingly, final stances remain anchored in base-model priors, and a single malicious agent can inject misinformation into the shrinking shared context. These results reveal a sharper risk: agents can agree more while knowing less. We call for evaluations that measure which facts, uncertainties, and legitimate disagreements survive interaction.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了多智能体大语言模型系统中存在‘审议幻觉’：讨论过程中关键事实逐渐流失（事实损耗）且立场趋于同质化（立场同质化），导致共识增加但知识减少；为此提出DelibTrace框架来量化这一现象，并发现最多72%的关键事实在讨论中丢失，带来严重可靠性风险。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统常将共识等同于成功交互，但在审议型问题中，可靠性取决于是否保留了解释议题所需的关键事实与多元观点。
AI.method: 提出DelibTrace框架，将议题分解为原子事实，标注其中关键事实，分发给各代理，并追踪其在多轮讨论中的存续情况；在伦理与新闻类审议任务中，对三类主流LLM家族进行实验评估。
AI.result: 多智能体讨论最多导致72%的议题关键事实丢失；残留证据易致议题误重构；最终立场仍受基座模型先验主导；单个恶意代理即可向日益缩小的共享语境注入错误信息。
AI.conclusion: 共识增强不等于认知增强，甚至可能伴随知识退化；应转向评估交互后哪些事实、不确定性及合理分歧得以保留。

title: TGV-KV: Text-Grounded KV Eviction for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) inherit the auto-regressive generation paradigm and cache the keys and values (KV) of all previous tokens to accelerate inference, resulting in memory consumption that scales linearly with context length. This issue is particularly pronounced in VLMs due to substantial redundancy in the visual modality. Although KV cache eviction approaches can effectively reduce inference memory, they often incur significant performance degradation in VLMs, as most are designed for language models and overlook the inherent gap between text and vision. By systematically analyzing the modality gap in VLMs in this work, we argue that the importance of visual information should be grounded in textual guidance and accordingly propose a Text-Grounded KV Eviction method for VLMs (TGV-KV). TGV-KV comprises three submodules: (1) Text-Vision Budgeting (TVB) assigns budget to each layer based on the mutual information interaction. (2) Text-Weighted Ranking (TWR) assesses the priority of text and ranks vision importance based on weighted text-image attention. (3) Text-Prioritised Retention (TPR) policy strategically preserves text KV to avoid acute information loss. We evaluate TGV-KV across five models with different sizes and architectures, showing that TGV-KV preserves 99.2% full-KV accuracy on the VizWiz-VQA task with LLaVA-NeXT and boosts end-to-end throughput by 52.6% with an extreme retention budget of 5%. Code is available at https://github.com/Danielement321/TGV-KV.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向视觉-语言模型（VLMs）的文本引导型KV缓存剔除方法TGV-KV，通过文本-视觉预算分配、文本加权排序和文本优先保留三个模块，在大幅降低内存占用的同时保持高精度。
AI.motivation: VLMs因视觉模态冗余导致KV缓存内存开销大，现有KV剔除方法多针对纯语言模型设计，忽视图文模态差异，易造成性能显著下降。
AI.method: 提出Text-Grounded KV Eviction（TGV-KV），包含：(1) Text-Vision Budgeting（TVB），基于互信息分配各层预算；(2) Text-Weighted Ranking（TWR），利用加权图文注意力评估并排序视觉token重要性；(3) Text-Prioritised Retention（TPR），优先保留文本KV以避免关键信息丢失。
AI.result: 在5种不同规模与结构的VLM上验证，TGV-KV在VizWiz-VQA任务中对LLaVA-NeXT保持99.2%全KV准确率，并在仅保留5% KV时提升端到端吞吐量52.6%。
AI.conclusion: 文本引导是解决VLM中KV缓存剔除模态适配问题的关键，TGV-KV有效弥合了图文模态鸿沟，在效率与性能间取得更好平衡。

title: Representational Capacity: Geometric Limits on Feature Representation in Transformer Language Models
comment: 22 pages, 10 figures. Submitted to NeurIPS 2026. This is a condensed version of thesis: https://hdl.handle.net/2286/R.2.N.204857
summary: Model dimension ($d_{model}$) is a fundamental hyperparameter in transformer language models, yet its role in setting the geometric limits of feature representation remains under-explored. Grounded in the Linear Representation and Superposition Hypotheses - which propose that models encode features as near-orthogonal directions in latent space - we develop a framework for estimating how many such directions a model can support. We first establish the embedding matrix as a measurable proxy for near-orthogonality constraints across the latent space: the boundary between meaningful token relationships and incidental similarity in the pairwise cosine similarity distribution gives a concrete estimate of the model's accepted deviation $\varepsilon$ from perfect orthogonality. Applying this metric across dozens of open-source models reveals two classes: models with high $\varepsilon$ whose embeddings lack near-orthogonal structure, and models with low $\varepsilon$ that maintain it. We then show that the standard Johnson-Lindenstrauss lemma greatly underestimates the packing efficiency of trained representations, and derive an adjusted capacity formula in which the number of near-orthogonal directions depends on the ratio of vectors to dimensions ($k/d$) rather than the raw count - a single modification that cuts prediction error by two orders of magnitude with no extra parameters. Combining these results, we define representational capacity as an upper bound on the number of distinguishable directions available for features and embeddings in a model's latent space. Capacity is exponentially sensitive to $\varepsilon$, and larger models favor tighter orthogonality constraints over maximizing raw capacity - a pattern compatible with several explanations (a stability-capacity trade-off, a ceiling on usable concepts, or confounds with model scale) that we leave to future work.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了Transformer语言模型中模型维度（d_model）对特征表示几何极限的影响，提出了一种基于嵌入矩阵近似正交性约束的框架来估计模型可支持的近似正交方向数量，并修正了Johnson-Lindenstrauss引理以更准确预测表征容量。
AI.motivation: 模型维度d_model作为Transformer模型的关键超参数，其在特征表示几何限制中的作用尚未被充分研究；现有线性表征与叠加假说认为模型将特征编码为潜在空间中近似正交的方向，但缺乏对其数量上限的定量刻画。
AI.method: 1）以嵌入矩阵为代理，通过余弦相似度分布中‘有意义关系’与‘偶然相似’的边界估计偏离完全正交性的容差ε；2）分析数十个开源模型，识别高/低ε两类模型；3）修正Johnson-Lindenstrauss引理，提出依赖向量-维度比k/d的新容量公式；4）定义‘表征容量’为潜在空间中可区分方向数的上界。
AI.result: 发现：1）模型可分为高ε（缺乏近正交结构）和低ε（保持近正交结构）两类；2）修正后的容量公式使预测误差降低两个数量级；3）表征容量对ε呈指数敏感；4）更大模型倾向于采用更严格的正交性约束而非最大化原始容量。
AI.conclusion: 模型维度不仅决定参数规模，更通过调控近正交性容差ε，本质性地限制特征表示的几何容量；该发现揭示了模型尺度、稳定性与概念表达能力间的潜在权衡，为理解大模型内部表征机制提供了新视角。

title: Decomposing how prompting steers behavior
summary: Prompting steers large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs) without weight updates, but it remains unclear how instruction changes reshape internal representations to produce behavior. We introduce a nested geometric decomposition framework that treats prompting as a transformation of the representational geometry of the content following the prompt. For each prompt pair, we align representations of the same stimuli under two prompts using increasingly expressive stimulus-invariant maps: translation, rigid transformation with uniform scaling, sequential axis scaling, affine transformation, and nonlinear transformation. We then causally test each map by replacing a single layer's prompt-A hidden state for held-out stimuli with its mapped counterpart and measuring recovery of prompt-B representational geometry and behavior. Across three LLMs, three VLMs, and six text or image datasets spanning style, emotion, scene content, and number, prompts consistently reshape representations toward the instructed task structure. Cross-validated variance decomposition shows that much prompt-induced activation change is captured by shape-preserving maps, especially translation and rigid transformation with uniform scaling, while tier profiles reveal model- and task-specific routing strategies across layers. Crucially, although translation and rigid tiers already improve behavioral agreement, affine transformation is the first tier to nearly recover target-prompt task geometry and yields corresponding behavioral gains. This suggests that cross-dimensional linear mixing is a key mechanism by which prompts reorganize representations toward instructed task structure. Our framework decomposes prompt-induced representational change into interpretable geometric components and reveals how models route task-relevant structure to produce prompt-driven behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种嵌套几何分解框架，将提示（prompt）视为对内容表征几何结构的变换，并通过不同复杂度的刺激不变映射（如平移、刚性变换、仿射变换等）分析提示如何重塑大语言模型与多模态模型的内部表征，发现仿射变换是首次能近乎完全恢复目标提示任务几何结构的关键层级，揭示了跨维度线性混合是提示驱动表征重组的核心机制。
AI.motivation: 当前尚不清楚提示如何改变大语言模型（LLMs）和视觉-语言模型（VLMs）的内部表征以产生特定行为，亟需一种可解释的几何视角来解析提示作用机制。
AI.method: 提出嵌套几何分解框架，对同一输入在两种提示下的隐藏层表征，依次使用平移、刚性变换（含均匀缩放）、逐轴缩放、仿射变换和非线性变换进行对齐；再通过因果干预实验——替换某一层的提示A表征为其映射后的提示B表征——评估各映射对表征几何与行为恢复的效果。
AI.result: 在3个LLM、3个VLM及6个文本/图像数据集上验证：提示一致地将表征朝向指令任务结构重塑；形状保持型映射（尤其是平移与刚性变换）可解释大部分激活变化；仿射变换首次近乎完全恢复目标提示的任务几何结构，并带来显著行为提升。
AI.conclusion: 仿射变换所代表的跨维度线性混合是提示重组织表征以实现指令行为的关键机制；该框架将提示引发的表征变化分解为可解释的几何成分，并揭示了模型分层路由任务相关结构的策略。

title: Bridging Predictive Uncertainty and Safe Action: Sample-Conditioned Differentiable Planning for Autonomous Driving
summary: Complex, dynamic, and interactive driving environments pose significant challenges for autonomous driving, primarily due to the pervasive uncertainty of surrounding traffic. A fundamental bottleneck in current systems is the disconnect between highly expressive uncertainty modeling and interpretable, safe motion planning. In this paper, we propose a novel sample-conditioned differentiable planning framework that bridges this gap by explicitly incorporating diffusion-generated future trajectories into the optimization process. Rather than compressing predictions into a single deterministic future or relying on black-box end-to-end architectures, our approach leverages a conditional diffusion model to generate a diverse set of plausible future scenarios. Crucially, these samples are directly fed into a differentiable planner, which explicitly mitigates predictive uncertainty via an empirical Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) tail-risk constraint. This allows the planner to optimize a physically interpretable trajectory that is robust to rare yet safety-critical interactions. Furthermore, we introduce a directed graph representation for scene context that yields substantial improvements in both predictive effectiveness and computational efficiency. Validated through extensive open-loop and closed-loop evaluations on the Waymo Open Motion and Argoverse 2 datasets, our framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in safety, efficiency, and ride comfort.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件扩散模型与可微规划器结合的新框架，通过显式建模预测不确定性并引入CVaR风险约束，生成安全、鲁棒且物理可解释的轨迹，在Waymo和Argoverse 2数据集上显著提升安全性、效率与乘坐舒适性。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶系统在复杂动态交通环境中面临预测不确定性与可解释、安全运动规划之间脱节的根本瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出样本条件化的可微规划框架：利用条件扩散模型生成多样化未来轨迹样本，并将其直接输入可微规划器；引入经验CVaR尾部风险约束以显式缓解预测不确定性；设计有向图场景上下文表示以提升预测效果与计算效率。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Motion和Argoverse 2数据集的开环与闭环评估中，该框架在安全性、效率和乘坐舒适性方面显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 将扩散模型的表达能力与可微优化的可解释性、可控性相结合，是实现高鲁棒性与高安全性自动驾驶规划的有效路径。

title: The Geometry of LLM-as-Judge: Why Inter-LLM Consensus Is Not Human Alignment
summary:
LMs-as-judges are now standard, yet judges agree strongly with one another while agreeing only weakly with humans. We test whether this reflects shared signal or shared bias by measuring four geometric quantities on the standard LLM-as-judge stack across four community-built Indic datasets, eight Indic languages, and 41 LLM judges: score spread, effective rank, principal angle to the human subspace, and stacked correlations among judges and humans, all with bootstrap confidence intervals.
  On subjective rubrics, judges use less than half the human score range ($σ_J / σ_H \approx 0.3$--$0.5$). Their evaluation axis is nearly orthogonal to the human one and noticeably further from humans than humans are from each other ($87^\circ$--$89^\circ$ versus $78^\circ$--$81^\circ$). Inter-LLM agreement exceeds LLM--human agreement ($r_{LL} \approx 0.35$ versus $r_{LH} \approx 0.27$--$0.32$).
  On a rubric with a verifiable factual answer, the same diagnostics fall back into the human range (axis $58.5^\circ$; $r_{LH} = 0.519$). Fine-tuning and preference optimization recover spread ($0.32 \rightarrow 1.08$) but barely move the axis (still $87^\circ$--$88^\circ$). Only post-hoc calibration on a small human-anchored set improves all four community-health rubrics together, placing a calibrated 24B Indic judge ($r = 0.184$) ahead of GPT-5.5 ($r = 0.123$), yet still short of human reliability (human-human $r = 0.474$ on the verifiable rubric).
  We argue that inter-LLM agreement should be considered evidence of human alignment only when a direct geometric check on the judge's score subspace passes; otherwise, the consensus reflects agreement within a collapsed subspace.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型（LLM）作为评判者（LMs-as-judges）在印度语言任务中与人类评判者的一致性问题，发现LLM评判者之间高度一致但与人类一致性弱，其根源在于共享偏差而非共享信号；通过几何分析（如主轴夹角、有效秩等）揭示其评判子空间与人类几乎正交；仅后验校准能显著提升多维度对齐，但仍不及人类可靠性。
AI.motivation: 尽管LMs-as-judges已被广泛采用，但其高内部一致性与低人机一致性之间的矛盾尚不清楚——这反映的是对人类标准的真正理解（共享信号），还是共同偏差（shared bias）？本文旨在从几何角度厘清该问题，尤其在资源较少的Indic语言场景下。
AI.method: 在4个Indic数据集、8种Indic语言、41个LLM评判者上，系统测量四大几何指标：评分离散度（score spread）、有效秩（effective rank）、评判轴与人类子空间的主夹角（principal angle）、以及LLM间/LLM-人类间的堆叠相关性（stacked correlations），全部辅以Bootstrap置信区间。同时对比主观与可验证事实类评分标准，并测试微调、偏好优化与后验校准的效果。
AI.result: 主观评测中，LLM评分标准差仅为人类的30–50%，其主评判轴与人类子空间夹角达87°–89°（远高于人类内夹角78°–81°），LLM间相关性（r≈0.35）高于LLM-人类相关性（r≈0.27–0.32）；在可验证事实类任务中，上述指标回归人类水平；微调和偏好优化可恢复评分范围但无法校正方向；仅基于小规模人类锚定数据的后验校准能同步改善全部四项指标，使一个24B Indic模型校准后超越GPT-5.5，但仍低于人类间一致性（r=0.474）。
AI.conclusion: LLM评判者间的高一致性不能自动等同于人类对齐；必须通过几何检验（尤其是主轴与人类子空间的夹角）验证其评分子空间是否对齐；否则共识只是塌缩子空间内的伪一致。后验校准是最有效的对齐手段，但当前LLM评判器仍存在本质性人类对齐差距。

title: Hierarchical Federated Learning with Dynamic Clustering and Adaptive Regularization for Robust Infrastructure Inspection
summary: The deployment of data-driven computer vision models for structural health monitoring (SHM) is heavily constrained by the data silo dilemma due to stringent privacy and security regulations. While federated learning (FL) offers a privacy-preserving collaborative alternative, its application to nationwide infrastructure networks is severely hindered by the challenge of ``double heterogeneity'': macro-level physical divergence across disparate structural types and micro-level statistical imbalances within local datasets. To overcome this challenge, this paper proposes a novel hierarchical federated learning framework. The framework orchestrates a synergistic two-tier optimization strategy. At the macro-level, a dynamic gradient-based clustering mechanism autonomously aggregates distributed clients into specialized expert groups based on their structural degradation trajectories, circumventing the need for prior geographical metadata. Concurrently, at the micro-level, an intra-cluster Dynamic Region-Adaptive Proximal Regularization (DRAPR) module computes a real-time statistical Non-IID Intensity Score for each client. By adaptively modulating a proximal penalty based on local label skewness and gradient divergence, DRAPR effectively calibrates local updates, mitigates client drift, and prevents the catastrophic forgetting of minority damage classes. Comprehensive evaluations on a large-scale, real-world structural inspection dataset demonstrate that the hierarchical integration of macro-clustering and micro-regularization successfully neutralizes dual-level heterogeneity, yielding highly robust and specialized diagnostic models for complex infrastructure inspection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层联邦学习框架，通过宏观动态梯度聚类与微观区域自适应近端正则化（DRAPR）协同解决结构健康监测中因结构类型差异和数据非独立同分布（Non-IID）导致的‘双重异质性’问题，显著提升跨地域、多类型基础设施损伤诊断模型的鲁棒性与专业性。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动的结构健康监测模型因隐私与安全法规面临严重数据孤岛问题；传统联邦学习在国家级基础设施网络中受限于宏观结构类型差异与微观本地数据统计不平衡的‘双重异质性’。
AI.method: 提出分层联邦学习框架：宏观层采用动态梯度聚类机制，依据结构退化轨迹自动划分专家客户端组；微观层引入DRAPR模块，实时计算Non-IID强度得分，并基于标签偏斜度和梯度发散度自适应调节近端惩罚，校准本地更新、抑制客户端漂移、缓解少数损伤类别灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在大规模真实结构巡检数据集上的综合评估表明，该框架有效消解双重异质性，生成高鲁棒性、高专业性的诊断模型。
AI.conclusion: 分层联邦学习——融合宏观聚类与微观正则化——是应对SHM中双重异质性挑战的有效范式，为隐私保护下的跨域基础设施智能诊断提供了新路径。

title: QUIVER: Quantum-Informed Views for Enhanced Representations in Large ML Models
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure and 2 tables. Accepted as a poster at the AI4Physics Workshop, ICML 2026 (Seoul, South Korea)
summary: Large machine learning models benefit substantially from multimodal inputs that provide a complementary view of the same example. We introduce QUIVER (QUantum-Informed Views for Enhanced Representations, a paradigm that enriches classical data-driven features with a quantum Fisher view: a geometrically motivated, basis-independent summary of higher-order correlations captured by a variational quantum circuit (VQC) trained to perform the same task. Unlike classical feature augmentation, the quantum Fisher information matrix encodes the intrinsic geometry of the learned quantum state manifold. While this feature map, motivated by quantum information theory, is ordinarily non-trivial to model classically, it can surface statistical structure that additional classical data or model capacity finds difficult to learn. This makes the quantum Fisher view a genuinely complementary modality rather than a redundant one. We demonstrate that QUIVER improves standard performance metrics on two benchmark datasets from very different fields: QM9 for predicting molecule properties, and JetClass for predicting jet flavor at the Large Hadron Collider (LHC). The core contribution, however, is domain-agnostic: the quantum Fisher view can be fused into a broad class of model architectures via targeted modifications to the base architecture, to incorporate information about the quantum geometry of the problem. These results demonstrate that quantum-geometric features, extracted from simulated variational circuits, can deliver measurable value for standard machine learning tasks, well before the advent of fault-tolerant quantum hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出QUIVER范式，通过将变分量子电路（VQC）训练得到的量子费舍尔信息矩阵作为几何驱动、基无关的高阶相关性表征，与经典数据特征融合，形成互补的多模态输入，从而提升传统机器学习模型在分子性质预测（QM9）和强子喷注分类（JetClass）等任务上的性能。该方法无需量子硬件，仅依赖经典模拟，具有领域无关性和架构可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 大型机器学习模型可从多模态输入中获益；但经典特征增强常存在冗余性，而量子几何结构（如量子费舍尔信息）蕴含经典方法难以捕捉的内在统计结构，有望提供真正互补的模态。
AI.method: 提出QUIVER范式：用变分量子电路（VQC）在目标任务上训练，提取其参数空间的量子费舍尔信息矩阵（QFIM）作为‘量子费舍尔视图’；该视图是基无关、几何驱动的高阶相关性总结，并通过针对性架构修改融入经典模型。
AI.result: 在QM9（分子性质预测）和JetClass（LHC喷注味识别）两个跨领域基准数据集上，QUIVER显著提升了标准性能指标；验证了量子几何特征在经典模拟下即可为常规ML任务带来可观测增益。
AI.conclusion: 量子几何特征（特别是QFIM）是一种有效且互补的模态，QUIVER提供了一种通用、硬件无关的框架，将量子信息理论启发的表征融入经典深度学习，拓展了量子启发AI的实用边界。

title: From Long News to Accurate Forecast: Importance-Aware Fusion and PRM-Guided Reflection for Time Series Forecasting
summary: Incorporating news into time series forecasting is appealing because news can reveal abrupt exogenous events that historical values alone cannot recover. However, existing LLM-based news-forecasting pipelines face two practical limitations: relevant news articles often exceed the model's context window, and iterative retrieval of supplementary news is typically unguided, leading to redundant updates and slow convergence. We address these issues with a novel framework that combines importance-aware news compression and process-level retrieval supervision. First, we train an importance reward model that estimates the forecasting utility of each article and uses this signal to allocate compression budgets during sequential pairwise fusion, preserving informative content within a fixed context limit. Second, we introduce a process reward model (PRM) that ranks multiple supplementary-news candidates conditioned on the current error profile and the history of previously selected articles, replacing one-shot blind retrieval with quality-controlled selection. Both components are trained offline using historical data with ground truth; inference uses the frozen filtering logic and compression modules without any reflection loop. Experiments on finance, energy, traffic, and bitcoin forecasting benchmarks show that our method improves prediction accuracy over strong baselines, significantly reduces the number of refinement iterations compared to the iterative baseline, and remains effective when relevant articles span thousands of tokens.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合重要性感知新闻压缩与过程级检索监督的新框架，以解决现有大语言模型在新闻驱动时间序列预测中上下文窗口受限和检索低效的问题。
AI.motivation: 新闻能揭示历史数据无法捕捉的突发外部事件，但现有LLM-based新闻-预测流程受限于上下文长度和无指导的迭代检索，导致冗余更新与收敛慢。
AI.method: 提出两阶段方法：1）训练重要性奖励模型，指导新闻压缩预算分配；2）引入过程奖励模型（PRM），基于当前误差与历史选择对补充新闻进行排序与筛选。所有模块离线训练、推理时冻结使用。
AI.result: 在金融、能源、交通与比特币预测基准上，该方法显著提升预测精度，大幅减少迭代次数，并在相关新闻长达数千token时仍保持有效性。
AI.conclusion: 重要性感知压缩与过程级监督检索可有效缓解新闻融入时间序列预测中的上下文与检索瓶颈，提升实用性与效率。

title: SplitAdapter: Load-Aware Humanoid Loco-Manipulation via Factorized Adaptation
summary: Humanoid loco-manipulation requires stable whole-body control under varying object masses and pickup/placement heights. This becomes particularly challenging in sim-to-real transfer, where object-induced load variation and robot-side dynamics mismatch interact during physical contact. Existing history-based adapters often compress these factors into a single latent representation, which can weaken robustness under heavy-load manipulation. We propose \textbf{SplitAdapter: Load-Aware Humanoid Loco-Manipulation via Factorized Adaptation}, which freezes a pretrained box manipulation policy and extends it with object/load and dynamics-aware context encoders trained with split world-model objectives, GRL-based cross-adversarial regularization, and hierarchical Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM). In sim-to-sim experiments and real-world deployment, SplitAdapter improves Full-task success over the base policy and world-model FiLM baselines across object masses of $2$, $4$, and $6$ kg and pickup/placement heights of $0$, $30$, and $60$ cm, with the largest improvements under heavy-load conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SplitAdapter，一种面向负载感知的人形机器人运动-操作协同控制方法，通过因子化自适应机制提升仿真到真实环境迁移中的鲁棒性，尤其在重载操作下表现显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人在仿真到真实环境迁移中面临物体质量变化与机器人动力学不匹配的耦合挑战，现有基于历史的适配器难以应对重载操作下的鲁棒性需求。
AI.method: 冻结预训练的箱体操作策略，引入物体/负载与动力学感知的上下文编码器，采用分拆世界模型目标、基于梯度反转层（GRL）的跨对抗正则化及分层特征级线性调制（FiLM）进行训练。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实场景实验中，SplitAdapter在2kg、4kg、6kg物体质量及0cm、30cm、60cm拾放高度下，全任务成功率均超越基线策略与世界模型FiLM方法，重载条件下提升最显著。
AI.conclusion: 因子化自适应机制能更有效地解耦并建模负载与动力学因素，从而增强人形机器人在复杂物理交互任务中的泛化能力与鲁棒性。

title: G^2C-MT: Graph-Guided Context Selection for Document-Level Machine Translation
summary: Effective document-level machine translation (DocMT) requires capturing long-range discourse dependencies. Recent work has explored retrieval-based and discourse-aware context selection. However, these approaches often lack an explicit mechanism for modeling structured discourse dependencies between distant paragraphs in a document. In this paper, we propose G^2C-MT (Graph-Guided Context for Machine Translation), which views DocMT context selection as a structured path discovery problem on a lightweight discourse graph, rather than retrieving unstructured context sets or relying on expensive LLM-based discourse modeling. In detail, we represent each paragraph as a node and model the relationship between each pair of nodes, considering their semantic similarity, adjacency, and keyword overlap. Furthermore, we propose a depth-biased random walk over the graph to sample a backward context path for each target paragraph. The context path will be used to prompt a large language model (LLM) for translation. This framework naturally supports multi-path context sampling, which can improve robustness by aggregating diverse translation candidates for discourse-ambiguous inputs. Experiments conducted across various domains show that G^2C-MT outperforms strong baselines on multiple LLMs, including DeepSeek-V3, Gemini-2.5-Flash-lite, and the Qwen-2.5/3 series.

AI.tldr: 本文提出G^2C-MT方法，将文档级机器翻译的上下文选择建模为轻量级话语图上的结构化路径发现任务，通过语义、位置与关键词重叠构建段落节点关系图，并采用深度偏向随机游走采样上下文路径以提示大语言模型进行翻译，显著提升多领域文档翻译性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文档级机器翻译方法缺乏对远距离段落间结构化话语依赖的显式建模能力，检索式或LLM驱动的方法存在上下文无结构或计算昂贵的问题。
AI.method: 构建以段落为节点、基于语义相似度、相邻性与关键词重叠建模边关系的轻量话语图；设计深度偏向随机游走算法为每个目标段落采样向后上下文路径；利用该路径作为提示输入大语言模型进行翻译，并支持多路径采样与译文聚合。
AI.result: 在多个领域实验中，G^2C-MT在DeepSeek-V3、Gemini-2.5-Flash-lite及Qwen-2.5/3系列等主流LLM上均显著优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 将文档上下文选择形式化为图上路径发现任务是一种高效且可扩展的 discourse-aware DocMT 新范式，兼顾建模能力与推理效率。

title: Zero-Shot 3D Question Answering via Hierarchical View-to-Token Transportation
summary: Recently, zero-shot 3D scene understanding via 2D Vision-Language Models (VLMs) has gained increasing research interest due to their promising spatial reasoning capabilities.
