Typically, multiple 2D views are sampled from a 3D point cloud and fed into pre-trained VLMs to answer a given question. This paradigm highlights the critical role of input context quality and raises the challenge of retaining as many task-relevant 3D details as possible under a limited input budget. We propose \texttt{KeyVT}, a hierarchical approach for input context collection at both the view and token levels. Specifically, we combine pixel features with camera parameters and assess view importance based on both semantic content and geometric position, resulting in spatially consistent and task-relevant views. Furthermore, we address redundancy among patches across selected views by identifying representative tokens under the optimal transport (OT) framework, where view tokens and key tokens are formulated as two discrete distributions in the embedding space. These key tokens are expected to cover all view features by minimizing the OT distance. We evaluate our framework on three widely used benchmarks, demonstrating significant improvements over existing tuning-free methods and performance comparable to training-based approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KeyVT方法，通过在视图级和token级进行分层输入上下文选择，利用相机参数与像素特征评估视图重要性，并基于最优传输框架筛选代表性token，从而在零样本3D场景理解任务中提升2D视觉语言模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 零样本3D场景理解依赖于从点云采样的多个2D视图输入到预训练VLM，但受限于输入预算，如何保留尽可能多的任务相关3D细节成为关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出KeyVT：1）视图级——融合像素特征与相机参数，联合语义内容与几何位置评估视图重要性；2）token级——在最优传输（OT）框架下将视图token与key token建模为嵌入空间中的两个离散分布，选取能覆盖所有视图特征的最小OT距离的关键token。
AI.result: 在三个主流基准上显著优于现有免调优方法，性能媲美需训练的方法。
AI.conclusion: KeyVT通过空间一致且任务相关的视图选择与去冗余的关键token提取，在不引入额外训练的前提下有效提升了零样本3D理解能力。

title: Qift: Shift-Friendly No-Zero W2 Post-Training Quantization for Rotated W2A4/KV4 LLM Inference
summary: Two-bit weight quantization is attractive for memory-efficient LLM inference, but the standard W2 level set {-2,-1,0,+1} often collapses under aggressive W2A4/KV4 settings. We study the scalar level-set geometry of two-bit weights in a Hadamard-rotated quantization pipeline. Conventional asymmetric W2 substantially improves over the standard level set, indicating that W2A4 failure is not only a bit-width problem but also a reconstruction-level problem. Across all 224 linear modules in each of LLaMA-2-7B and LLaMA-3.1-8B, pretrained weights are already nearly zero-centered, while Hadamard rotation primarily Gaussianizes their standardized shape: excess kurtosis and Q-Q error drop by orders of magnitude. Based on this approximate zero-centered Gaussian-like source model, we propose Qift, a fixed no-zero W2 level set for rotated W2A4/KV4 inference. The main level set is {+/-0.5, +/-1.5}, equivalently {+/-1, +/-3} under a half-scale reparameterization; a power-of-two variant uses {+/-1, +/-4} for sign-and-shift decoded weight application. Qift redesigns the fixed two-bit code-to-level mapping and is training-free, learned-codebook-free, group-grid-free, and zero-point-free, retaining the standard per-channel scale. A scale-invariant ratio analysis identifies an effective inner/outer centroid ratio range of 0.25 to 0.33, explaining why mirror no-zero (MNZ), Lloyd, NF2, and PoT-MNZ perform well while {+/-1, +/-2} does not. On both models, the no-zero level sets consistently improve pure W2A4 perplexity, L-layer mixed W2/W4 perplexity, downstream accuracy, and GPTQ residual behavior over the standard W2 level set. At L=16 mixed precision, they substantially narrow the gap to W3A4 while keeping half of the transformer layers at two-bit precision, giving a simple, source-aware, and deployment-friendly alternative to more complex learned W2 codebooks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Qift，一种针对旋转W2A4/KV4推理的无零点、固定两比特权重量化方案，基于预训练权重近似零中心高斯分布的观察，采用{±0.5, ±1.5}等level set，在保持部署简洁性的同时显著提升LLaMA系列模型量化性能。
AI.motivation: 标准两比特权重量化（{-2,-1,0,+1}）在W2A4/KV4等激进设置下性能崩溃；作者发现该问题不仅是位宽限制，更是重建层面上的level set设计不当所致，尤其因预训练权重已近零中心、经Hadamard旋转后更趋高斯分布，故需匹配此源分布的量化策略。
AI.method: 分析Hadamard旋转下两比特权重的标量level set几何特性；基于权重近似零中心高斯分布的实证观察，设计无零点、固定、无需训练/码本/分组/零点的Qift level set（如{±0.5, ±1.5}及其幂次变体{±1, ±4}）；引入尺度不变比分析确定最优内外质心比范围（0.25–0.33）。
AI.result: Qift在LLaMA-2-7B和LLaMA-3.1-8B上全面优于标准W2 level set：降低纯W2A4困惑度、改善混合精度（如L=16层W2/W4）性能、提升下游任务准确率、优化GPTQ残差行为；在保持半数Transformer层为2-bit前提下，大幅缩小与W3A4的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 两比特量化失败主因是level set与实际权重分布（零中心高斯型）不匹配；Qift通过源感知、无学习、轻量级的固定level set设计，为高效LLM部署提供了简单且高性能的替代方案。

title: DeskCraft: Benchmarking Desktop Agents on Professional Workflows and Human-in-the-Loop Collaboration
summary: Real-world professional desktop workflows in specialized creative and engineering software unfold over long horizons and often require human-in-the-loop coordination, where agents proactively seek necessary information and users provide additional instructions, clarifications, feedback, or corrections as the task progresses. Yet existing desktop GUI benchmarks mostly reduce this setting to short, simplified tasks with all user instructions provided upfront. To address this issue, we introduce DeskCraft, a desktop GUI benchmark targeting long horizon creative and engineering workflows and proactive human-agent collaboration. DeskCraft organizes tasks into a multilevel difficulty taxonomy, with long horizon tasks requiring over 50 execution steps, and covers professional creative software across design, video, audio, and 3D creation. Furthermore, DeskCraft formalizes human-agent collaboration into an interaction protocol covering mid-turn and post-turn exchanges. Mid-turn interaction captures both agent-initiated clarification under uncertainty and user-initiated interruption during execution, while post-turn interaction accommodates user-driven feedback after the agent signals completion, together spanning the full space of realistic collaboration patterns. We evaluate 18 proprietary and open source agents on 538 tasks and find that GPT-5.4 reaches 31.6% on standard tasks and 27.6% on interactive tasks. Further analyses reveal persistent failures in long horizon workflow delivery and proactive clarification. We will open-source all evaluation codes, tasks, and data at https://github.com/mrwwk/DeskCraft.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DeskCraft，一个面向长周期创意与工程工作流的桌面GUI基准测试，强调人机协同，支持任务执行中的主动澄清与用户反馈，并评估了18种AI代理的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有桌面GUI基准多聚焦于短周期、指令一次性给出的任务，无法反映真实专业软件中长周期、需人机持续协作的工作流需求。
AI.method: 构建DeskCraft基准，包含多级难度分类（含超50步长任务）、覆盖设计/视频/音频/3D等专业软件，并形式化定义中段交互（agent主动澄清、user中断）与终段交互（user反馈）协议。
AI.result: 在538个任务上评估18个代理，GPT-5.4在标准任务和交互任务上分别达31.6%和27.6%成功率；分析显示其在长周期流程执行与主动澄清方面仍存在显著缺陷。
AI.conclusion: DeskCraft填补了长周期、人机协同桌面GUI评估的空白，揭示了当前AI代理在复杂真实工作流中的关键能力短板，所有代码、任务与数据将开源。

title: RobotValues: Evaluating Household Robots When Human Values Conflict
summary: While household robots are often evaluated based on task completion, everyday domestic environments involve value-conflicting situations in which robots are expected to choose actions that prioritize other values than task success, such as human autonomy, efficiency, or social appropriateness. Yet, there are no benchmarks for evaluating robots' value preferences in such scenarios. We introduce RobotValues, a benchmark to evaluate household robot planners in 10K value-conflict scenarios. Each instance consists of a realistic household image with multiple plausible robot actions that prioritize different human values. We construct RobotValues through LLM-assisted scenario generation, stakeholder-grounded value extraction, image generation and automatic quality control. Using RobotValues we evaluate VLMs used in robotics and find that models exhibit default value preferences, including safety and accommodation, while underselecting privacy-prioritizing actions. When the models are instructed to prioritize specific values that conflict with their own preferences, they often fail to override their default actions, choosing incorrect actions for 80% of the time. These findings suggest that household robot evaluation should measure not only task completion or safety compliance, but also whether robots can choose among plausible actions when human values conflict.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RobotValues基准，用于评估家庭机器人在价值冲突场景中的决策能力，发现现有VLMs存在默认价值偏好（如安全、迁就），难以按指令切换至隐私等其他优先价值，揭示了仅依赖任务完成率或安全性评估的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有家庭机器人评估多聚焦任务完成率，忽视日常环境中不可避免的价值冲突（如自主性、效率、社交得体性与隐私间的权衡），且缺乏相应评测基准。
AI.method: 构建RobotValues基准：通过大语言模型辅助生成10K个真实家庭场景，结合利益相关者调研提取人类价值观，利用图像生成与自动质量控制生成带多选项的视觉-价值对齐数据集；并在此基准上评测主流视觉语言模型（VLMs）的价值选择行为。
AI.result: VLMs表现出固有默认价值偏好（如安全、迁就），显著低估隐私优先动作；当被指令优先其他冲突价值时，80%情况下仍选择错误动作，难以有效覆盖价值多样性。
AI.conclusion: 家庭机器人评估需超越任务完成与安全合规，纳入对价值冲突情境中合理价值权衡能力的系统性评测；RobotValues为该方向提供了首个可扩展、可复现的基准。

title: Regret Pre-training: Bridging Prior and Posterior Views for Enhanced Knowledge Grounding
summary: Causal language models factorize sequence probabilities using only preceding context, leaving future information unexploited during training despite its availability in the training data. This paper introduces Regret Pre-training, a self-supervised framework grounded in the Learning Using Privileged Information (LUPI) paradigm. The framework employs a dual-view architecture in which a single model generates both a causal Student distribution and a future-conditioned Teacher distribution. The training objective augments standard language modeling with a regret loss that minimizes the KL divergence from teacher to student, transferring future-aware signals to the causal representations. We investigate two teacher configurations on the OLMoE-1B-7B architecture:LocalRegret, which extends attention by one future token, andGlobalRegret, which conditions on bidirectional context with the target position masked. Experiments on nine downstream tasks following 4 billion tokens of training demonstrate that both configurations consistently outperform the baseline. On average,GlobalRegret andLocalRegret achieve 33.9% and 32.2% accuracy respectively, surpassing the baseline's 30.2%. Most notably,GlobalRegret improves BoolQ performance by 18.1 percentage points (61.0% vs 42.9%). The framework introduces no additional parameters and requires only one extra inference-mode forward pass per training step.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Regret Pre-training框架，利用未来信息增强因果语言模型训练，在不增加参数的情况下显著提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 因果语言模型在训练时仅利用前序上下文，忽略了训练数据中可用的未来信息，导致信息利用不充分。
AI.method: 基于LUPI范式设计双视图架构，同一模型同时生成因果学生分布和未来条件化教师分布；通过最小化教师到学生的KL散度（即regret loss）将未来感知信号注入因果表示；采用LocalRegret（扩展一个未来token注意力）和GlobalRegret（双向上下文掩码目标位置）两种教师配置。
AI.result: 在OLMoE-1B-7B架构上训练40亿token后，GlobalRegret和LocalRegret在九项下游任务平均准确率分别达33.9%和32.2%，优于基线30.2%；GlobalRegret在BoolQ任务上提升18.1个百分点（61.0% vs 42.9%）；无额外参数，仅需每步一次额外推理前向传播。
AI.conclusion: Regret Pre-training有效利用未来信息提升因果语言模型表征能力，是一种高效、轻量且通用的预训练增强方法。

title: Inverting the Generation Process of Denoising Diffusion Implicit Models: Empirical Evaluation and a Novel Method
summary: This paper studies the problem of inverting the DDIM image generation process to recover latent variables, particularly the initial noise map, from a generated image. Existing methods often struggle with accuracy in this task. We propose a novel hybrid approach that combines direct inversion via gradient descent for the first step, followed by a fixed-point method for subsequent steps. Empirical evaluations across three datasets demonstrate that our method significantly improves the prediction of initial latent variables while achieving superior reconstruction accuracy. Additionally, we introduce a new evaluation, called the self-interpolation test, which assesses the quality of images generated from interpolated points between the true and predicted latent maps, offering deeper insights into performance. Our results reveal that while existing methods perform reasonably well in reconstruction, they consistently fail to accurately predict the initial latent variables, resulting in poor performance on the self-interpolation test. In contrast, our method outperforms all others across all metrics, providing valuable insights into diffusion models and enhancing their applications in image generation and editing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合方法，结合梯度下降与不动点法，以更准确地从DDIM生成图像中反演初始噪声图等潜在变量，并通过自插值测试评估其性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在反演DDIM图像生成过程（尤其是恢复初始噪声图）时精度不足，亟需更鲁棒、准确的逆向方法。
AI.method: 提出一种混合反演方法：第一步使用基于梯度下降的直接反演，后续步骤采用不动点迭代法；并设计新的自插值测试评估潜在空间插值质量。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著提升了初始潜在变量预测精度和图像重建准确性，在所有指标（包括自插值测试）上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 准确反演初始潜在变量对扩散模型的理解与编辑应用至关重要；所提混合方法不仅提升反演性能，还为潜在空间几何性质提供新见解。

title: Mitigating Spurious Correlations with Memorization-Guided Dataset De-Biasing
summary: Real-world datasets often contain spurious correlations that are not causally related to the target label. When such correlations dominate the majority of training samples, models tend to rely on them, leading to misclassification of minority samples that do not exhibit the same spurious patterns. While a potential approach is to select subsets of data to better represent the minority samples, this may require access to group labels, which are typically unknown. Furthermore, as we demonstrate, widely used sample scoring functions in the invariant subset or coreset selection literature largely depend on spurious features and therefore fail to accurately capture the importance or difficulty of core, causally relevant features. Accordingly, we propose to mitigate spurious correlations by developing a two-stage sample scoring function that disentangles the learning dynamics of core and spurious features and evaluates their difficulty separately. Based on our proposed metric, we introduce a new algorithm to find and prioritize informative samples both with and without spurious correlations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that a standard ERM model trained on our selected samples achieves superior performance compared to state-of-the-art debiasing techniques, while requiring as little as 10\% of the original training data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段样本评分函数，通过解耦核心特征与虚假特征的学习动态，分别评估其难度，从而缓解数据集中虚假相关性带来的偏差问题。实验表明，基于该方法选择的子集训练模型，仅需10%原始数据即可超越现有去偏技术。
AI.motivation: 真实世界数据集中常存在与标签无因果关系的虚假相关性，模型易依赖这些主导性虚假模式而忽略少数样本中的核心因果特征；且现有子集选择方法因依赖虚假特征而难以准确识别真正重要或困难的样本。
AI.method: 提出两阶段样本评分函数，分别建模和评估核心特征与虚假特征的学习难度，并基于此设计新算法，优先选择同时包含/不包含虚假相关性的信息性样本。
AI.result: 在多个基准上，仅用10%原始训练数据训练的标准ERM模型，性能超越当前最优去偏方法。
AI.conclusion: 解耦核心与虚假特征的学习动态是更有效样本选择的关键，所提方法无需组标签即可提升模型泛化性与鲁棒性。

title: EvoTrainer: Co-Evolving LLM Policies and Training Harnesses for Autonomous Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Autonomous LLM training is often framed as recipe search, which leaves the training harness largely static. This limitation sharpens in agentic RL, where shifting bottlenecks and scalar rewards mask diverse failure modes. We introduce EvoTrainer, an autonomous training framework that co-evolves LLM policies and training-side harnesses through empirical feedback: it diagnoses rollout-level evidence, revises diagnostics, backtests interventions, and accumulates reusable skills. Evaluated on mathematical reasoning, competitive-programming code generation, and repository-level software engineering, EvoTrainer matches or exceeds the human-engineered RL references under the same data, codebase, and evaluation protocol, with the largest gain on long-horizon agentic SWE. Trajectory analyses show that retained strategies diverge across domains, evolving diagnostics prevent invalid high-scoring branches from being promoted, and reusable skills shape later search. Autonomous LLM RL should move beyond recipe search toward joint evolution of policies and the training harnesses that interpret them.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvoTrainer，一种自主训练框架，通过经验反馈协同进化大语言模型（LLM）策略与训练端框架，在数学推理、编程生成和软件工程任务中达到或超越人工设计的强化学习基线。
AI.motivation: 现有自主LLM训练多聚焦于固定训练框架下的‘配方搜索’，难以应对智能体强化学习中动态瓶颈与标量奖励掩盖的多样化失败模式。
AI.method: EvoTrainer通过诊断rollout级证据、修订诊断逻辑、回溯验证干预措施、积累可复用技能，实现LLM策略与训练框架的协同进化。
AI.result: 在数学推理、竞赛编程代码生成和仓库级软件工程任务上，EvoTrainer在相同数据、代码库和评估协议下匹配或超越人工设计的RL基线，尤其在长时程软件工程任务中提升最显著；轨迹分析表明策略、诊断机制与可复用技能均随任务域演化。
AI.conclusion: 自主LLM强化学习应超越配方搜索范式，转向策略与解释性训练框架的联合演化。

title: GPU-Parallel Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning with Demonstration Guided Policy Optimization
summary: Large scale GPU-parallel reinforcement learning has changed what can be trained in robot simulation, yet most systems still optimize one specialist policy per task. We propose a construction methodology for turning structured manipulation task families into GPU-parallel multi-task RL benchmarks, and instantiate it as MT-Libero using LIBERO assets and task predicates in Isaac Lab. The resulting benchmark supports simultaneous reinforcement learning over heterogeneous task suites with parallel rendering, physics randomization, and state-input or visual-input policies. To make such training practical under sparse success signals and limited prior data, we further propose DGPO, an on-policy demonstration guided method that combines importance weighted PPO with adaptive behavior cloning on matched demonstration actions. DGPO enables a tunable preference toward demonstrated task distributions, outperforming both prior-free RL and existing demonstration-based methods while preserving the stability and online improvement benefits of on-policy PPO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MT-Libero多任务RL基准构建方法及DGPO新算法，支持GPU并行训练异构任务，并在稀疏奖励下提升示范引导策略学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人仿真强化学习多聚焦单任务专用策略，缺乏可扩展的多任务基准与高效利用稀疏奖励和有限示范数据的训练方法。
AI.method: 构建基于LIBERO与Isaac Lab的GPU并行多任务RL基准MT-Libero；提出DGPO算法，融合重要性加权PPO与自适应行为克隆，在线利用匹配示范动作进行指导。
AI.result: DGPO在多任务稀疏奖励设定下优于无先验RL及现有示范引导方法，同时保持PPO的稳定性与在线改进能力。
AI.conclusion: MT-Libero与DGPO共同推动了大规模、多任务、示范增强的机器人仿真强化学习发展，为复杂操作学习提供了新范式。

title: Can Factual Opinions Be Edited (Manipulated) in Large Language Models?
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into various domains, making knowledge editing techniques crucial yet potentially hazardous. Current editing methods primarily target atomic facts, overlooking the significant risks associated with manipulating factual opinions, e.g., documented stances of public figures on societal issues. Such manipulation could reshape public images, influence elections, and alter societal views. To systematically assess this threat, we introduce the Factual Opinion Editing with Evidence (FOE) benchmark, which encompasses 261 public figures, 19 issue categories, and 2,178 complete opinion records. Our evaluations demonstrate that current editing techniques struggle significantly with factual opinions, often achieving only superficial changes while failing to preserve consistency between the edited opinion and the supporting evidence generated by the model. To address this limitation, we further propose a simple yet effective Self-Generated Evidence-Aligned method that achieves opinion-evidence alignment without relying on explicit instructions. Together, our benchmark and method provide a foundation for understanding the emerging security implications of factual opinion editing in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FOE基准测试，用于评估大语言模型中事实性观点编辑的安全风险，并设计了一种无需显式指令即可实现观点-证据对齐的自生成证据对齐方法。
AI.motivation: 现有知识编辑方法主要针对原子事实，忽视了操纵公众人物等事实性观点所带来的严重社会风险，如影响选举、重塑公众形象等。
AI.method: 构建FOE基准（含261位公众人物、19类议题、2178条观点记录），并提出一种自生成证据对齐的编辑方法，使模型在编辑观点时自动与生成的证据保持一致。
AI.result: 实验表明当前编辑方法在事实性观点编辑上效果差，常导致观点与生成证据不一致；所提方法显著提升观点-证据一致性。
AI.conclusion: 事实性观点编辑构成新型安全威胁，FOE基准和所提方法为理解和缓解该风险提供了基础。

title: FAF-CD: Frequency-Aware Fusion for Change Detection under Imperfect Multimodal Remote Sensing
comment: Code will be released at https://github.com/VimsLab/FAF-CD
summary: Remote sensing change detection for real-world monitoring often relies on imperfect heterogeneous observations, where pre- and post-event images may be asynchronous, cross-sensor, or affected by illumination, seasonal, and modality shifts. This setting is especially challenging for EO-SAR disaster mapping, where nuisance variation can resemble structural damage. We propose FAF-CD, a frequency-aware hybrid framework with a DINOv3-pretrained ConvNeXt encoder and a linear-complexity VMamba-based decoder. Its rectification-aware tri-branch fusion module combines deformable spatial alignment with Fourier and Haar-wavelet comparisons, using adaptive gating to aggregate complementary cues across scales. On BRIGHT validation, a matched heterogeneous EO-SAR adaptation improves clean and perturbed tc-mIoU/tc-mAP over NeXt2Former-CD. FAF-CD also generalizes to binary optical CD, achieving 0.924 cF1 on LEVIR-CD and 0.955 cF1 on WHU-CD, and obtains the best average perturbed cIoU/cF1 on both binary datasets among M-CD and NeXt2Former-CD under pseudo-change-aligned stress tests. It further reduces cost by approximately 24 GFLOPs relative to NeXt2Former-CD while maintaining or improving accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAF-CD，一种面向异质遥感影像（如EO-SAR）变化检测的频率感知混合框架，通过DINOv3预训练ConvNeXt编码器与VMamba解码器，结合傅里叶/小波域比对与可变形空间对齐，在多个数据集上实现高精度、强鲁棒性与低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 真实场景中遥感变化检测常面临异质、非同步、跨传感器及成像条件差异（光照、季节、模态）等干扰，尤其在EO-SAR灾害制图中，这些干扰易被误判为真实变化，亟需鲁棒建模方法。
AI.method: 提出FAF-CD框架：采用DINOv3预训练ConvNeXt作为编码器，VMamba轻量解码器；设计rectification-aware tri-branch fusion模块，融合可变形空间对齐、傅里叶频域与Haar小波域比较，并通过自适应门控跨尺度聚合互补特征。
AI.result: 在BRIGHT验证集上，相比NeXt2Former-CD，提升干净与扰动下的tc-mIoU/tc-mAP；在LEVIR-CD和WHU-CD上cF1达0.924和0.955；在伪变化对齐压力测试下平均扰动cIoU/cF1最优；计算量降低约24 GFLOPs。
AI.conclusion: FAF-CD有效缓解异质遥感影像中的 nuisance variation，兼顾精度、鲁棒性与效率，为EO-SAR等复杂场景变化检测提供了新范式。

title: Learning Coherent Representations: A Topological Approach to Interpretability
summary: Deep neural networks learn representations where individual features often lack interpretable meaning; a single neuron may activate for scattered, unrelated inputs. We introduce coherence, a geometric property inspired by neural coding in the brain, where neurons like grid cells and head direction cells respond to contiguous regions of state space. A non-negative matrix is coherent if each row (sample) attends to geometrically clustered columns (features) and vice versa, and in addition every sample is well described by some feature and every feature is needed by some sample. We prove that coherent matrices induce a bounded interleaving between the Vietoris-Rips filtrations of samples and features, guaranteeing that both spaces share compatible topological structure. This geometric constraint facilitates interpretability. For example, if data lies on a circle, coherent features must tile that circle into contiguous arcs. We introduce Coh, a differentiable objective function based on Fréchet variance that enforces coherence during training. Unlike sparsity, which bounds how many samples a feature activates on, coherence bounds which samples, requiring geometric connectivity rather than only rarity. This yields not just interpretable features but an interpretable feature space. We validate Coh in an auto-encoder using synthetic and rotated MNIST datasets and in a token embedding of BERT using language data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'coherence（一致性）'的几何性质，用于提升深度神经网络特征的可解释性，通过约束特征与样本在状态空间中的几何聚类关系，并设计了基于Fréchet方差的可微目标函数Coh进行训练优化，在合成数据、旋转MNIST及BERT词嵌入中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络的特征常缺乏可解释性，单个神经元可能对无关输入响应；受大脑中网格细胞和头方向细胞等具有连续状态空间响应特性的神经编码启发，作者希望构建一种能保证特征在几何上具有连续性和结构性的表示。
AI.method: 定义了非负矩阵的'coherence'性质：要求样本行与特征列相互几何聚类，且覆盖性与必要性均满足；证明该性质可导出样本与特征空间的Vietoris-Rips滤过之间的有界交错，从而保证拓扑兼容性；提出基于Fréchet方差的可微损失函数Coh，在自编码器和BERT嵌入中进行端到端优化。
AI.result: 在合成数据、旋转MNIST和BERT token embedding实验中，Coh显著提升了特征的空间连续性与可解释性，生成的特征在状态空间中形成连续弧段（如圆上分块），优于传统稀疏性约束。
AI.conclusion: Coherence是一种比稀疏性更强、更具几何意义的结构先验，不仅能产生可解释的特征，还能构建可解释的特征空间；其理论保证（拓扑交错）与实践有效性共同支持其作为神经表征建模的新范式。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Clarification in LLM Agents with Information Gain
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents often operate under underspecified user instructions, where latent uncertainty over user intent leads to erroneous tool actions. To address this challenge, we propose a goal-oriented clarification framework that aligns clarification behavior with ambiguity resolution. Central to our approach is the Information Gain Reward, a metric that quantifies the utility of clarification questions by measuring the Bayesian belief update towards the ground-truth goal induced by the clarification exchange. We train the clarifier (LLM) using this reward to optimize for high information gain, ensuring that clarifications effectively reduce uncertainty and improve task completion within the agent-tool-user environment. We validate our framework within a clarification-enhanced $τ$-Bench environment, conducting cross-agent evaluations across five heterogeneous backbones. Empirical results demonstrate that our method consistently improves the success rate by 3.7\% over the no-clarification baseline, while adding only 0.3 total interaction steps on average.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向目标的澄清框架，通过信息增益奖励引导大语言模型（LLM）代理在用户指令不明确时提出高价值澄清问题，从而提升任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）代理常面临用户指令模糊、意图不确定的问题，易导致错误的工具调用；需一种能有效识别并缓解意图歧义的澄清机制。
AI.method: 提出基于贝叶斯信念更新的信息增益奖励，用于量化澄清问题对缩小目标不确定性的作用，并以此奖励训练澄清模块（LLM），使其生成高信息增益的澄清问题；在改进的τ-Bench环境中进行跨代理评估。
AI.result: 在五个异构LLM骨干上的实验表明，该方法相较无澄清基线将任务成功率提升3.7%，平均仅增加0.3轮交互步数。
AI.conclusion: 信息增益驱动的澄清策略能高效、轻量地提升LLM代理在模糊指令下的鲁棒性与任务完成率，为意图对齐提供了可量化的优化目标。

title: Autonomous Navigation System for Library Service Robot Based on Unitree Go2 Edu
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Accepted by WCCIS 2026
summary: Libraries require autonomous robots to move quietly through narrow aisles while remaining safe around readers, chairs, bags, and carts. This paper presents a ROS 2 navigation system for a Unitree Go2 Edu quadruped equipped with a 4D LiDAR, a front depth camera, and an IMU. Rather than assuming the library is rough terrain, we target the practical mobility discontinuities of real deployments, including floor transitions, temporary clutter, and partially blocked passages where low-clearance wheeled platforms are less tolerant. RTAB-Map is used for visual-LiDAR SLAM, AMCL and EKF-based sensor fusion provide localization, and a Nav2 stack with A* and DWA supports planning and local avoidance. In a real library, the system achieves 100%, 96%, and 88% success rates in static, low-density dynamic, and high-density dynamic scenes, while map validation against surveyed control distances yields a mean metric error of 3.7 cm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于ROS 2的导航系统，用于Unitree Go2 Edu四足机器人在图书馆环境中的自主导航，融合4D LiDAR、深度相机和IMU，实现高精度建图、定位与避障，在静态和动态场景中均取得高任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 图书馆环境存在狭窄通道、临时障碍物、地面过渡及部分堵塞通道等实际部署挑战，传统低底盘轮式平台适应性差，需更鲁棒的自主导航方案。
AI.method: 采用RTAB-Map进行视觉-LiDAR SLAM建图，AMCL与EKF传感器融合实现精确定位，Nav2框架下结合A*全局路径规划与DWA局部避障算法。
AI.result: 在真实图书馆测试中，静态、低密度动态、高密度动态场景任务成功率分别为100%、96%、88%；地图精度验证显示平均度量误差为3.7 cm。
AI.conclusion: 该ROS 2导航系统在复杂室内环境中展现出高可靠性与实用性，特别适用于对静音性、通过性与安全性要求严苛的服务机器人部署场景。

title: PhotoCraft: Agentic Reasoning with Hierarchical Self-Evolving Memory for Deep Image Search
summary: Deep Image Search requires multi-step reasoning over rich contextual cues, such as time, location, and event relations. However, most existing LLM-based agents are stateless and reactive, lacking persistent memory to maintain long-horizon context or transfer experience across tasks, which often leads to execution drift and experience isolation. To address these limitations, we propose PhotoCraft, a training-free, hierarchical memory system for photo-search agents. Inspired by human cognition, PhotoCraft equips MLLMs with working, episodic, and semantic memory, which are dynamically invoked during reasoning to preserve logical consistency and knowledge transferability throughout multi-step reasoning and answer generation. Extensive experiments on DISBench demonstrate that PhotoCraft consistently improves context-aware retrieval across diverse MLLM backbones, achieving gains of up to 18.5\% and effectively mitigating key bottlenecks in memoryless deep image search, offering a practical path toward reliable and generalizable multimodal search agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PhotoCraft，一种无需训练的分层记忆系统，用于提升多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在深度图像搜索中的长程推理与上下文感知能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的图像搜索代理缺乏持久记忆，导致执行漂移和经验孤立，难以处理需多步推理的复杂图像搜索任务。
AI.method: 受人类认知启发，设计包含工作记忆、情景记忆和语义记忆的分层记忆架构，动态调用以维持逻辑一致性和知识可迁移性，且无需额外训练。
AI.result: 在DISBench上验证，PhotoCraft在多种MLLM骨干网络上显著提升上下文感知检索性能，最高提升达18.5%，有效缓解无记忆图像搜索的关键瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: PhotoCraft为构建可靠、通用的多模态搜索智能体提供了一条实用路径。

title: GuidedBridge: Training-freely Improving Bridge Models with Prior Guidance
summary: Guidance methods, such as classifier-free guidance (CFG) and auto-guidance (AG), have advanced noise-to-data generation in diffusion models. Recently, bridge models have introduced a data-to-data generative process that can exploit an instructive clean prior. In this work, inspired by previous methods creating quality difference between denoising results as guidance, we propose a training-free bridge guidance method, termed Prior Guidance (PG). Specifically, we introduce a weak prior, which is unseen during bridge pre-training, hindering prior exploitation and thereby degrading denoising result. Then, we contrast it with the seen prior to highlight and enhance prior exploitation via a scaling factor. Moreover, we analyze the underlying mechanism of prior exploitation in the bridge process and design frequency-modulated prior guidance (FMPG), which tailors the guidance scale to low- and high-frequency bands coherent with bridge generative dynamics. To address prior exploitation in image in-painting, we develop a cascaded framework, CFG-FMPG, which first generates a noisy hidden representation via CFG and then exploits it as a generative prior with FMPG, fulfilling their complementary strengths without compromising inference efficiency. Experiments demonstrate that our PG methods consistently improve pre-trained bridge models across diverse image translation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的桥接模型引导方法Prior Guidance（PG），通过引入弱先验与已见先验对比，并结合频率调制（FMPG）及级联CFG-FMPG框架，提升图像翻译任务中预训练桥接模型的生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有桥接模型虽能利用干净先验进行数据到数据生成，但其先验利用能力受限；而传统引导方法（如CFG、AG）依赖噪声输入，难以直接适配桥接范式。作者旨在设计一种训练无关、可即插即用的先验引导机制，以增强桥接过程中的先验利用效果。
AI.method: 提出Prior Guidance（PG）：引入未在预训练中见过的弱先验，制造先验利用不足的退化结果，再与强先验结果对比并加权缩放；进一步提出频率调制PG（FMPG），按低/高频动态调整引导强度；针对图像修复，构建CFG-FMPG级联框架——先用CFG生成含噪隐表示，再将其作为FMPG的生成先验。
AI.result: PG及FMPG在多个图像翻译任务（如边缘→图像、语义图→图像、图像修复等）上显著提升各类预训练桥接模型的生成质量（如FID、LPIPS下降），且不增加推理开销；CFG-FMPG在in-painting任务中实现SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: Prior Guidance是一种通用、训练无关、高效且可解释的桥接模型引导范式；FMPG揭示了桥接生成中频率域先验利用的动态特性；CFG-FMPG验证了噪声引导与先验引导的互补性，为桥接模型实用化提供了新路径。

title: Spectral-Progressive Thought Flow for Lightweight Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Multimodal spatial reasoning often relies on long chains of intermediate textual and visual thoughts, where accumulating visual tokens and dense cross-modal attention incur substantial computation and memory overhead. To address this challenge, we propose Spectral-Progressive Thought Flow (SpecFlow), a novel lightweight multimodal spatial reasoning framework that represents intermediate visual thoughts in a fixed-size discrete cosine space. By exploiting strong energy compaction, SpecFlow preserves global layout and relational structure while introducing high-frequency details only when increased spatial precision is required. To align visual state evolution with linguistic intent, classifier-free guidance enables autoregressive textual thoughts to steer flow-based updates of the visual workspace/state without expanding the context. As a result, SpecFlow maintains a bounded visual workspace whose updates depend only on the current visual state and accumulated textual trace, enabling long-horizon inference with stable latency and memory usage independent of reasoning depth. Empirical results show that SpecFlow achieves competitive or superior reasoning performance while reducing computation and KV cache costs by up to 2.1 times.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Spectral-Progressive Thought Flow（SpecFlow）的轻量级多模态空间推理框架，通过在固定大小的离散余弦空间中表示中间视觉思维，结合能量集中特性和无分类器引导机制，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算与内存开销。
AI.motivation: 多模态空间推理常依赖长链的文本与视觉中间思维，导致视觉token累积和密集跨模态注意力带来巨大计算与内存负担。
AI.method: 提出SpecFlow框架：1）将中间视觉思维映射到固定尺寸离散余弦空间，利用其强能量集中性渐进式引入高频细节；2）采用无分类器引导（classifier-free guidance），使自回归文本思维指导基于流的视觉工作区更新，不扩展上下文。
AI.result: 在保持竞争性或更优推理性能的同时，计算量与KV缓存成本最多降低2.1倍；视觉工作区大小有界，推理延迟与内存使用稳定、不随推理深度增长。
AI.conclusion: SpecFlow为长程多模态空间推理提供了高效、可扩展且资源可控的新范式，兼顾结构保真度与计算效率。

title: Think-Before-Speak: From Internal Evaluation to Public Expression in Multi-Agent Social Simulation
summary:
LLM-based multi-agent simulation offers a promising way to study social interaction, deliberation, and collective opinion dynamics. However, many existing dialogue simulation frameworks represent interaction mainly as observable turn exchange or aggregated outputs, leaving the internal evaluative processes behind silence, speaking intention, and public expression difficult to examine. We introduce TBS (Think-Before-Speak), an interval-based multi-agent simulation framework that separates agents' private reasoning from public utterance generation. At each interval, all agents update structured internal states based on the shared dialogue history and their own memory. These states include dissonance-related appraisal, perceived opinion climate, perceived isolation risk, response strategy, and willingness to speak. The orchestrator then resolves competing speaking intentions and commits one utterance to the public dialogue, allowing internal evaluation and public interaction to co-evolve over time.
  We evaluate TBS in simulated town hall discussions on a climate-related policy issue. Results show that TBS produces coherent internal-state traces and that these traces vary systematically across turn-allocation, silence, and memory conditions. Dissonance-related appraisal increases agents' willingness to speak, whereas silence-pressure appraisal decreases it. Once speaking intention is formed, public expression is shaped mainly by turn-allocation rules. These findings suggest that TBS supports mechanism-sensitive social simulation by making the pathway from internal evaluation to public expression observable and analyzable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TBS（Think-Before-Speak）框架，将多智能体对话中的内部评估（如认知失调、意见气候感知等）与公开表达分离，通过时间区间建模实现二者协同演化，并在模拟市政厅讨论中验证其机制敏感性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体对话模拟多关注可观察的轮次交换或聚合输出，难以考察沉默、发言意图与公开表达背后的内部评估过程。
AI.method: 提出基于时间区间的TBS框架：每个区间内，各智能体基于共享对话历史与自身记忆更新结构化内部状态（包括失调评估、意见气候感知、孤立风险感知、回应策略、发言意愿等）；由协调器根据发言意图决定唯一公开话语。
AI.result: 在气候政策议题的模拟市政厅中，TBS生成了连贯且条件敏感的内部状态轨迹；失调评估提升发言意愿，沉默压力评估则降低之；发言意图形成后，公开表达主要受轮次分配规则影响。
AI.conclusion: TBS支持机制敏感的社会模拟，使从内部评估到公开表达的路径变得可观测、可分析。

title: eMEM: A Hybrid Spatio-Temporal Memory System For Embodied Agents
summary: We present eMEM (Embodied Memory), a hybrid graph-based memory system for embodied agents operating in physical environments. Current agent memory architectures, such as Generative Agents, MemGPT, and A-MEM, treat memory as text streams or knowledge graphs, but embodied agents require memory that is simultaneously searchable by meaning, space, and time. eMEM fills this gap with a multi-index architecture (SQL ITE for structured storage, hnswlib for approximate nearest neighbour semantic search, and an R-tree for spatial queries) unified behind a single graph model. A tiered consolidation pipeline transforms raw perceptual observations into compressed summaries, mirroring hippocampal-neocortical consolidation in biological systems. Ten agent-facing recall tools expose memory retrieval primitives, including concept-to-location resolution and cross layer recall, as first-class operations for LLM tool calling. The system is fully embedded and runs in-process alongside the agent. In addition we introduce eMEM-Bench v1, a benchmark we construct over ProcTHOR-10K scenes for embodied memory evaluation. The benchmark is organised explicitly around eight cognitive-psychology paradigms (DRM lures, pattern separation, pattern completion, source monitoring, context-dependent retrieval, long-horizon interference, serial position, and a foil augmented retention curve), each chosen so that the result is interpretable against the broader memory-systems literature in humans and prior agent-memory systems; a level of diagnostic that surface-task benchmarks like LoCoMo or OpenEQA cannot provide. eMEM scores 80.8 weighted mean over 988 probes, with a flat retention curve at ceiling from 1 h to 1 yr of simulated delay on room-unique items. We show that a pure RAG baseline (the flat_rag ablation) loses 30 pt on context dependent retrieval and 29 pt on DRM lure rejection, isolating the contribution of multi-layer storage and consolidation respectively. We release both the system and the benchmark code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了eMEM（具身记忆），一种面向具身智能体的混合图式记忆系统，支持语义、空间与时间多维度检索，并引入了基于认知心理学范式的新型基准eMEM-Bench v1进行评估。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能体的记忆架构（如Generative Agents、MemGPT等）仅将记忆建模为文本流或知识图谱，难以同时满足语义、空间和时间三个维度的可检索性需求；而真实具身任务要求记忆系统具备多索引、可整合、可压缩与可调用的特性。
AI.method: 提出eMEM：采用SQLite（结构化）、hnswlib（语义近邻搜索）和R-tree（空间查询）构成多索引图式记忆架构；设计类脑的分层巩固流水线，将感知原始数据压缩为摘要；提供10种面向LLM工具调用的回忆原语；并构建eMEM-Bench v1基准，涵盖8种认知心理学范式用于诊断性评估。
AI.result: eMEM在eMEM-Bench v1上加权平均得分为80.8（共988个探针）；对房间唯一项，在1小时至1年模拟延迟下保持‘天花板级’记忆保留；消融实验显示纯RAG基线在上下文依赖检索和DRM诱饵拒绝上分别下降30和29分，验证了多层存储与巩固机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: eMEM通过融合多索引图结构、类脑巩固机制与认知驱动评估，显著提升了具身智能体记忆系统的功能性与可解释性；所开源的系统与基准为未来具身记忆研究提供了坚实基础与统一标尺。

title: Small RL Controller, Large Language Model: RL-Guided Adaptive Sampling for Test-Time Scaling
summary: Test-time scaling improves the reasoning performance of large language models but incurs substantial cost in both total computation and latency. Existing adaptive sampling methods partially mitigate this issue by dynamically deciding when to stop sampling, yet they typically rely on heuristic rules or rely on distribution assumptions. In this work, we formulate adaptive sampling as a Markov decision process (MDP). We train a lightweight sampling controller with reinforcement learning (RL) to jointly balance answer correctness, latency, and computation cost. At each round, the controller decides to stop sampling or to acquire additional samples. Our method is lightweight which only relies on statistics of final answers, and can be trained and deployed on CPU. We further show that the resulting framework admits an interpretation as the Lagrangian relaxation of a constrained optimization problem with explicit budget constraints. Experiments against strong baselines such as ASC and ESC show that our method achieves improved trade-offs among answer correctness, sampling rounds, and total samples required.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的轻量级自适应采样控制器，将测试时采样建模为马尔可夫决策过程，在保证答案正确性的同时显式优化延迟与计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应采样方法依赖启发式规则或分布假设，难以在答案正确性、延迟和计算成本之间实现良好权衡。
AI.method: 将自适应采样建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），使用强化学习训练一个仅依赖最终答案统计信息的轻量级采样控制器；该控制器在每轮决定是否继续采样，并可解释为带显式预算约束的优化问题的拉格朗日松弛。
AI.result: 在多个基准上优于ASC、ESC等强基线，在答案正确性、采样轮数和总样本数之间取得更优的综合权衡。
AI.conclusion: 所提RL-based控制器轻量、可CPU部署，且具有理论可解释性，为高效测试时缩放提供了新范式。

title: KC-3DGS: Kurtosis-Constrained Gaussian Splatting for High-Fidelity View Synthesis
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables real-time novel view synthesis by representing scenes as collections of anisotropic Gaussians optimized via differentiable rasterization. However, standard pixel-space losses (L1, SSIM) constrain only aggregate reconstruction error, permitting the optimization to redistribute error across frequency scales. This leads to oversmoothing and structural artifacts, particularly in sparse-view settings where supervision is limited. We propose KC-3DGS, which augments 3DGS training with wavelet-domain supervision based on natural image statistics. Our method combines three components: (1) a multi-scale wavelet coefficient alignment loss that explicitly penalizes missing high-frequency detail, (2) a supervised kurtosis concentration loss that encourages rendered images to match the heavy-tailed frequency statistics of ground-truth images, and (3) a cross-band covariance penalty that promotes frequency specialization. We provide theoretical analysis showing that pixel-space losses admit a family of indistinguishable perturbations under wavelet redistribution, and that our joint objective excludes degenerate solutions. Experiments across MipNeRF360, Tanks&Temples, MVImgNet, DeepBlending, and WRIVA-ULTRRA demonstrate consistent improvements in perceptual quality. On the challenging WRIVA-ULTRRA outdoor dataset, KC-3DGS achieves a 9.48% improvement in DreamSim while also improving PSNR, SSIM, and LPIPS. In sparse-view settings with only 12 training images, our method improves PSNR by up to 0.5 dB on MipNeRF360 while maintaining perceptual quality. The approach integrates seamlessly into existing 3DGS pipelines as a plug-and-play regularization strategy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KC-3DGS，通过引入小波域监督（包括多尺度小波系数对齐、峰度集中损失和跨频带协方差惩罚）来增强3D高斯泼溅训练，显著提升稀疏视角下的重建细节与感知质量，且可即插即用。
AI.motivation: 标准像素空间损失（如L1、SSIM）仅约束整体重建误差，允许误差在频率尺度间重新分配，导致过平滑和结构伪影，尤其在稀疏视角下问题突出。
AI.method: 提出KC-3DGS：（1）多尺度小波系数对齐损失，显式惩罚高频细节缺失；（2）有监督的峰度集中损失，使渲染图像匹配真实图像的重尾频率统计特性；（3）跨频带协方差惩罚，促进频率特化；并提供理论分析证明其能排除退化解。
AI.result: 在MipNeRF360、Tanks&Temples、MVImgNet、DeepBlending和WRIVA-ULTRRA等多个数据集上显著提升感知质量；在WRIVA-ULTRRA上DreamSim提升9.48%，PSNR、SSIM、LPIPS同步改善；12图稀疏设置下PSNR最高提升0.5 dB。
AI.conclusion: KC-3DGS是一种即插即用的小波域正则化策略，有效缓解3DGS在稀疏监督下的频率失真问题，兼顾保真度与感知质量。

title: A Systematic Evaluation of Current Architectures in Wind Power Forecasting
summary: Interval wind speed forecasting is essential for the efficient integration of wind energy into power systems, as it accounts for the inherent uncertainty of wind resources. This study presents a systematic literature review focused on hybrid approaches to interval forecasting of wind generation, exploring the combination of deep learning, modal decomposition, and statistical methods. To guide the paper selection, Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) was applied for topic modeling, enabling the identification of patterns and research trends. The findings emphasize that integrating hybrid models with decomposition techniques-such as Variational Mode Decomposition (VMD) and Ensemble Empirical Mode Decomposition (EEMD)-enhances forecast accuracy and reliability by narrowing prediction intervals without compromising coverage. Regarding interval construction, most studies adopt a dual-model strategy, independently forecasting the lower and upper bounds. Input data are commonly decomposed using techniques like EMD, EEMD, or VMD, which extract frequency-based components. These components serve as inputs to models such as LSTM or ELM, trained separately for each bound. This approach allows for targeted modeling of uncertainty, improving flexibility and precision, Interval quality is typically evaluated through metrics that balance coverage and interval width. The review also highlights challenges, including the lack of standardized evaluation metrics, computational complexity, and limited real-world validation. Overall, the study reinforces the value of interval forecasting for wind energy operations and offers insights for advancing model robustness and decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了用于风电功率区间预测的混合方法，重点结合深度学习、模态分解与统计方法，并利用LDA进行主题建模以梳理研究趋势；结果表明，融合VMD/EEMD等分解技术可提升预测精度与可靠性，常用双模型策略分别预测上下界，但存在评价标准不统一、计算复杂度高及实证不足等挑战。
AI.motivation: 风速固有的不确定性使得区间预测对风电并网至关重要，亟需系统梳理混合建模方法的研究现状与关键问题。
AI.method: 采用系统性文献综述法，结合Latent Dirichlet Allocation（LDA）主题建模筛选和分析相关论文，重点考察深度学习（如LSTM、ELM）、模态分解（如VMD、EEMD）与统计方法的混合建模策略及区间构建方式。
AI.result: 混合模型结合模态分解能有效缩小预测区间宽度而不牺牲覆盖率；主流采用双模型策略分别预测上下界，输入经分解后送入独立训练的深度模型；评估多依赖兼顾覆盖率与区间宽度的复合指标。
AI.conclusion: 区间预测对提升风电调度与决策鲁棒性具有重要价值；未来需推动评估标准化、降低计算开销，并加强真实场景验证。

title: GTBench: A Curriculum-Grounded Benchmark for Evaluating LLMs as Mathematical Research Assistants in Graph Theory
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as self-study assistants in technical disciplines, yet their reliability as mathematical reasoning assistants remains poorly understood. We introduce GTBench, a curriculum-grounded benchmark for evaluating LLMs as mathematical research assistants in graph theory, comprising 63 problems organized into three groups of increasing difficulty: undergraduate definitions and basic properties (Group 1), algorithm tracing and structural reasoning (Group 2), and graduate-level proof construction (Group 3). Problems are sourced from verified academic materials including Diestel's Graph Theory. We evaluate five frontier models -- GPT-5, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite, Llama 3.3 70B, and Mistral Large 3 -- under zero-shot and chain-of-thought prompting, using exact-match and LLM-as-judge evaluation for Groups 1 and 2, and a hybrid human expert and LLM-as-judge protocol for Group 3. Our results reveal a pronounced performance hierarchy: GPT-5 approaches ceiling on Group 1 (95.8% zero-shot) and maintains meaningful accuracy on graduate proofs (82%), while all other models degrade substantially with difficulty, with Llama achieving 0% under human evaluation on Group 3 zero-shot. Failure mode analysis shows that correct algorithm, wrong execution errors dominate Groups 1 and 2, while Group 3 additionally surfaces incomplete reasoning failures and reveals systematic disagreement between human evaluators and the automated judge, particularly on verbose or near-complete proofs (kappa = 0.48-0.83 across human pairs). GTBench provides the first curriculum-grounded evaluation framework for graph-theoretic reasoning in LLMs, with direct implications for the governance of AI tools in mathematical education and scientific research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GTBench，一个面向图论的课程驱动型基准测试，用于评估大语言模型（LLMs）作为数学研究助手的能力；涵盖63个分三组难度递增的问题，并在五种前沿模型上进行了零样本与思维链提示下的评测，揭示了模型性能随难度显著下降、人类与LLM评判存在分歧等关键现象。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在技术学科中被广泛用作自学助手，但其在数学推理（尤其是图论）中的可靠性尚不明确，亟需课程对齐、难度分层、多级验证的专用评估基准。
AI.method: 构建GTBench基准：基于Diestel《图论》等权威教材，设计63道图论问题，分为本科基础（G1）、算法追踪与结构推理（G2）、研究生级证明构造（G3）三组；采用零样本与思维链提示，在GPT-5、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite、Llama 3.3 70B、Mistral Large 3五模型上评测；G1/G2用精确匹配和LLM-as-judge，G3采用人类专家+LLM-as-judge混合评估，并进行失败模式分析。
AI.result: GPT-5在G1零样本达95.8%，G3仍保持82%人类评估准确率；其余模型在G3零样本下表现极差（如Llama为0%）；G1/G2主要错误为‘正确算法、错误执行’；G3新增‘推理不完整’问题，且人类评估者间一致性中等（kappa=0.48–0.83），与LLM评判存在系统性分歧。
AI.conclusion: GTBench是首个课程驱动的图论推理评估框架，揭示了当前LLMs在高等数学推理中能力有限且评估方式敏感，对AI在数学教育与科研中的治理具有直接指导意义。

title: Grasp-Then-Plan with Failure Attribution: A Closed Two-Stage Framework for Precise and Generalizable Robotic Manipulation
summary: In robotic manipulation, the tight coupling between grasping and motion planning often obscures the true source of failure, leading to inefficient trial-and-error. To enable efficient long-horizon manipulation, we propose GTP-FA (Grasp-Then-Plan with Failure Attribution), a task-oriented two-stage grasp-then-plan framework that generates grasp candidates and performs downstream motion planning conditioned on the selected grasp. Given a failed manipulation trajectory, we learn a failure attribution model that generalizes to unseen grasps and produces a stable distribution over failure modes for diagnosis-guided optimization. Based on these attribution results, we then optimize both modules in a diagnosis-driven manner: on the grasping side, we inject task-level priors and risk penalties into grasp candidate scoring and optimization to suppress unstable or task-incompatible grasps; on the planning side, we target high-risk initial states through data collection and fine-tuning to address genuine planning bottlenecks. We evaluate the proposed framework in both simulation and real-robot experiments, and show that GTP-FA improves the corresponding base learners across RL, IL, diffusion-policy, and VLA-based settings, achieving substantially higher overall task success rates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GTP-FA框架，通过两阶段‘抓取-规划’与失败归因机制，实现长时程机器人操作的高效优化。
AI.motivation: 传统抓取与运动规划紧密耦合，难以定位失败根源，导致试错效率低。
AI.method: 提出GTP-FA：先生成抓取候选，再基于选定抓取进行条件化运动规划；构建可泛化的失败归因模型，诊断失败模式，并据此分别在抓取端（引入任务先验与风险惩罚）和规划端（聚焦高风险初始状态微调）进行诊断驱动优化。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实机器人实验中，GTP-FA显著提升多种基线方法（RL、IL、扩散策略、VLA）的任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: 解耦抓取与规划并引入可泛化的失败归因机制，能有效提升长时程机器人操作的鲁棒性与成功率。

title: Coherence Maximization Improves Pluralistic Alignment
summary: Aligning AI systems with diverse human values requires value specifications grounded in concrete examples, but generating such examples without extensive human supervision remains an open challenge. We investigate what makes these examples effective, using Internal Coherence Maximization (ICM) -- which infers labels by maximizing their mutual predictability -- to generate persona-specific examples that steer a model toward a target group's values, without human supervision. Across four benchmarks spanning classification, preference, and open-ended generation, ICM-inferred in-context examples match the performance of gold labels. Crucially, coherence matters beyond individual label accuracy: with accuracy held constant, more coherent examples generalize substantially better than incoherent ones. For personas underrepresented in pretraining data, targeted human feedback on the questions where the model is least certain about a persona's values yields better generalization than the same number of labels on arbitrary questions. These results identify coherence as a key design principle for scalable value specification, leveraging the diverse human perspectives already encoded in pretrained language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Internal Coherence Maximization (ICM)方法，无需人工监督即可生成具有一致性的价值导向示例，从而有效对齐AI系统与多样化人类价值观；实验表明，示例的一致性比单个标签准确性更能提升泛化能力，尤其在数据稀疏的人格类型上，有针对性的人类反馈效果更优。
AI.motivation: 对齐AI系统与多样化人类价值观需要基于具体示例的价值规范，但无大量人工监督下生成高质量示例仍是挑战。
AI.method: 提出Internal Coherence Maximization（ICM）方法，通过最大化标签间的相互可预测性来推断人格特异性示例，实现无监督的价值引导。
AI.result: ICM推断的上下文示例在四个基准任务（分类、偏好、开放生成）中达到金标准标签性能；控制准确率不变时，更高一致性的示例显著提升泛化能力；对预训练中表征不足的人格，针对模型不确定性问题提供人工反馈比随机标注更有效。
AI.conclusion: 示例内部一致性是可扩展价值规范的关键设计原则，可有效利用预训练语言模型中已编码的多元人类视角。

title: Disentangling Visual and Factual Correctness in LVLMs' Visualization Literacy
comment: Under review at IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG). 23 pages, 9 figures
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) show strong visualization interpretation, yet it is unclear whether their responses reflect genuine reasoning over visual evidence or factual priors learned during training. Current evaluations mix these two sources, obscuring when correct visual interpretation is overridden by memorized facts. We present a framework that isolates visual correctness from factual correctness, revealing validity limitations in existing visualization literacy assessments. Across three experiments with 15 state-of-the-art LVLMs: (1) several models reach human-level performance on standard tests (VLAT), but this may reflect factual recall rather than visual understanding, while randomized-data tests (reVLAT) underestimate literacy when correct visual interpretation is superseded by factual priors. (2) Using our Counterfactual Visualization Literacy Assessment Test (CVLAT) with capability-normalized arbitration metrics, we classify models by the sign of their visual-factual reliance index (VFRI), revealing a visualization-oriented majority and a factual knowledge-oriented minority, though several near-zero cases warrant caution. A human baseline (N=30) on the same counterfactual items confirms that people overwhelmingly follow the chart under conflict, providing a human reference point. (3) Prompt-based intervention can shift prioritization, but its effectiveness is highly model-dependent and direction-asymmetric, and high chart-reading capability does not predict prompt-controllability. Overall, high visualization accuracy is not sufficient evidence of faithful visual reasoning: reliable integration into visual analytics requires evaluating not only visualization literacy but also how models arbitrate between visual evidence and factual priors when the two diverge. Benchmark and code: https://github.com/JaeyoungKim-HCIL/CVLAT

AI.tldr: 本文提出CVLAT框架，用于分离大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）对视觉证据与事实先验的依赖，揭示现有评估混淆二者的问题，并通过实验发现多数模型偏向视觉理解，少数依赖事实知识，且提示干预效果因模型而异。
AI.motivation: 当前LVLMs可视化理解评估混淆了真实视觉推理与训练中习得的事实先验，难以判断其正确响应是否源于视觉证据而非记忆。
AI.method: 提出CVLAT（反事实可视化素养评估测试）框架，结合能力归一化的仲裁度量和视觉-事实依赖指数（VFRI），设计三组实验：标准VLAT、随机数据reVLAT及反事实CVLAT，并引入人类基线与提示干预分析。
AI.result: 15个SOTA LVLMs中多数为视觉导向，少数为事实导向；人类在冲突情境下几乎总遵循图表；提示干预可改变依赖倾向但效果模型依赖性强且不对称；高可视化准确率不等于可靠视觉推理。
AI.conclusion: 评估LVLMs可视化素养不能仅看准确率，必须考察其在视觉证据与事实先验冲突时的仲裁机制，CVLAT为此提供了新基准与方法论。

title: RESCAST-100K: A Comprehensive Dataset for Cross-Domain Residential Load and Indoor Temperature Forecasting
summary: Accurate short-term forecasting of residential energy load and indoor temperature is essential for home energy management systems, grid-level demand response, and community energy efficiency efforts. Domain adaptation and transfer learning have shown promise for improving forecasting accuracy under data heterogeneity and scarcity commonly seen in residential settings. However, progress is limited by the lack of comprehensive residential datasets: existing benchmarks are narrow in target coverage and rarely support structured cross-domain evaluation. We introduce RESCAST-100K, a large-scale residential forecasting benchmark for studying cross-domain generalization. It provides a configuration-driven interface that instantiates source and target domains along interpretable axes, including geography, climate zone, wall construction, and heating equipment, enabling systematic evaluation of transfer learning, domain adaptation, and zero-shot generalization under controlled domain shifts. The benchmark covers approximately 100,000 EnergyPlus-simulated U.S. homes derived from ResStock, with 15-minute time series for three coupled targets per home: total load, HVAC load, and indoor temperature. These are paired with weather channels, HVAC setpoints, and over 40 static building covariates. RESCAST-100K also integrates five real-world residential datasets under a unified schema, supporting sim-to-real evaluation on the same tasks. We benchmark recurrent, attention-based, and MLP-mixer architectures for zero-shot performance across domains, missing-input conditions, and forecasting tasks. Cross-attention and MLP-mixer models consistently outperform recurrent and classical transformer baselines under domain shift. RESCAST-100K is intended to aid the machine learning and building analytics communities advance cross-domain residential forecasting at home, community, and grid scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RESCAST-100K，一个大规模住宅负荷与室内温度预测基准数据集，支持跨域泛化研究，涵盖10万模拟住宅及5个真实数据集，并评估了多种模型在零样本跨域预测中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有住宅预测基准数据集覆盖范围窄、缺乏结构化跨域评估能力，难以应对住宅场景中常见的数据异质性与稀缺性问题。
AI.method: 构建了基于EnergyPlus仿真的RESCAST-100K基准，提供可配置的源/目标域划分（按地理、气候区、墙体构造、供暖设备等维度），集成模拟与真实数据，并对RNN、注意力机制和MLP-Mixer等模型进行零样本跨域预测基准测试。
AI.result: 跨注意力机制与MLP-Mixer模型在域偏移下显著优于RNN和经典Transformer基线；RESCAST-100K支持系统性评估迁移学习、领域自适应和零样本泛化。
AI.conclusion: RESCAST-100K填补了住宅预测领域跨域基准的空白，为机器学习与建筑分析社区提供了统一、可扩展、可解释的评估平台，推动家庭、社区与电网尺度的跨域预测研究。

title: ClinicalMC: A Benchmark for Multi-Course Clinical Decision-Making with Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have been widely adopted in healthcare, yet they still encounter significant challenges in complex clinical decision-making scenarios. Existing benchmarks primarily assess LLM performance in single-course settings and lack systematic evaluation in multi-course scenarios, where a patient's condition evolves over time. To address this gap, we propose ClinicalMC, a benchmark for multi-course clinical decision-making. It includes 1,275 Chinese and 5,804 English samples across four stages from admission to discharge. These stages cover triage, first-course examination/diagnosis/treatment, subsequent multi-course examination/assessment/treatment, and final diagnosis. In ClinicalMC, patients in the English dataset undergo an average of 5.11 clinical courses, whereas those in the Chinese dataset undergo 3.42. To assess LLM performance, we construct a multi-agent evaluation framework that includes patient, examiner, and doctor agents. Based on the benchmark and framework, we design two experimental settings -- a single-turn static setting and a multi-turn dynamic setting -- and assess three categories of LLMs: 1) closed-source LLMs like GPT5-mini; 2) open-source LLMs like DeepSeek-V3.2; and 3) medical LLMs like HuatuoGPT-o1. Through extensive evaluation, we aim to better understand LLM performance in the medical domain and support its effective deployment in healthcare.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ClinicalMC基准，用于评估大语言模型在多阶段临床决策中的能力，涵盖中英文数据集及多智能体评估框架。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要评估单次诊疗场景下的LLM性能，缺乏对患者病情随时间演化的多阶段临床决策的系统性评估。
AI.method: 构建ClinicalMC多阶段临床决策基准（含中英文数据集）和多智能体评估框架（患者、检查者、医生代理），设计单轮静态与多轮动态两种实验设置，评测三类大语言模型。
AI.result: English数据集平均5.11次临床过程，Chinese数据集平均3.42次；通过该基准和框架对闭源、开源及医学专用LLM进行了系统评测。
AI.conclusion: ClinicalMC填补了多阶段临床决策评估的空白，有助于深入理解LLM在医疗领域的实际能力，并推动其在临床实践中的有效部署。

title: Extreme Motion Generation via Hybrid Null-Space Control for Straight-Line Path Following
summary: This work studies ``extreme motion generation'', which aims to maximize the Cartesian path length along a pre-defined trajectory within the manipulator's workspace. This objective is important in industry as long as path-following is fundamental to a large variety of tasks such as surface coating and welding. More critically, extreme motion enables a fixed-base manipulator to exploit the kinematic capability under limited reachability. However, such exploitation is challenging in practice, as the manipulator must actively avoid the safety boundary through execution, which is inherently a long-horizon problem. Accordingly, we claim that long-horizon decision-making should be delegated to a learning-based policy to maximize exploitation, while a classical model-based controller covers the near-boundary region, where the learning policy degrades sharply due to sparse data coverage. In detail, our proposed method is a step-level hybrid controller that switches between an RL-based and a model-based controller according to the normalized joint-limit distance. The initial joint configuration is sampled through conditional diffusion-based sampling, which improves the achievable path length based on the learned motion prior. We evaluate the proposed framework on 10,000 straight-line path-following tasks with a 7-DoF Franka FR3, extending the average rollout length by 27\% over the model-based baseline. Notably, certain tasks yield a pronounced extension toward the motion extreme, as reflected in the maximum improvement reported in the statistical results. The project website and related videos of this paper can be found at https://yuan-xinyi.github.io/extreme-motion-generation/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于极端运动生成的混合控制框架，结合强化学习（RL）策略与经典模型控制器，在长时程任务中最大化机械臂沿预定义轨迹的笛卡尔路径长度，显著提升了路径执行长度。
AI.motivation: 工业中路径跟踪是表面涂覆、焊接等任务的基础，而极端运动生成可使固定基座机械臂在有限可达性下充分挖掘其运动学潜力；但需在执行中持续规避安全边界，构成具有挑战性的长时程决策问题。
AI.method: 提出一种步级混合控制器：依据归一化关节极限距离在RL策略与模型控制器间切换；初始关节构型通过条件扩散采样生成，利用学习到的运动先验提升可达路径长度。
AI.result: 在7自由度Franka FR3机器人上评估了10,000条直线路径任务，平均执行长度较纯模型基线提升27%，部分任务达到显著的运动极端延伸。
AI.conclusion: 混合控制架构有效兼顾长时程探索与近边界精确控制，验证了学习策略与模型方法协同在极端运动生成中的优势。

title: Experience-Driven Dynamic Exits for LLMs with Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Language Models suffer from slow autoregressive inference. While self-speculative decoding accelerates this process, its efficiency is hampered by static configurations like fixed exit layers and speculation lengths. We reframe this optimization as a \textbf{Markov Decision Process} and propose \textbf{LEDE}, a framework that uses offline reinforcement learning. LEDE learns a policy to dynamically select the optimal exit layer and speculation length based on the local context of the generated sequence at each step, balancing computational cost and draft quality. Comprehensive evaluations on Llama-2 and Llama-3 models show LEDE achieves up to a $2.0\times$$\sim$$2.7\times$ speedup over autoregressive decoding and and provides an additional 17\% speedup over the static speculative baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEDE框架，通过离线强化学习将自推测解码的优化建模为马尔可夫决策过程，动态选择最优退出层和推测长度，显著提升大语言模型推理速度。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型自回归推理速度慢，而现有自推测解码方法因采用静态配置（如固定退出层和推测长度）导致效率受限。
AI.method: 将推测解码的优化建模为马尔可夫决策过程，利用离线强化学习训练策略网络，以序列局部上下文为输入，动态决定每步的退出层和推测长度。
AI.result: 在Llama-2和Llama-3上的实验表明，LEDE相较标准自回归解码提速2.0×~2.7×，相较静态推测基线额外提速17%。
AI.conclusion: 动态策略优于静态配置，LEDE为高效推测解码提供了可学习、上下文感知的新范式。

title: $A^2$: Smaller Self-Supervised ViTs Localize Better than Larger Ones
summary: Robust visual classification often depends on localizing the main foreground objects in an image while ignoring contextual distractors. Surprisingly, we find that the attention maps of smaller self-supervised ViTs localize foreground objects better than those of larger ViTs. However, we still need large ViTs, because they extract richer representations from each patch. To get the best of both worlds, good localization and rich representations, we propose $A^2$, a simple method that leverages this inverse scaling finding by decoupling where to look (a small attention model) from what to extract (a large embedding model): we crop around the attention peaks of a small model and embed the crops with a larger model. $A^2$ uses entirely pretrained features, requires no group labels, and does not require per-dataset attention or backbone training. Across 5 benchmarks, $A^2$ is competitive with backbone-matched loss-level methods like DFR, and outperforms end-to-end attention training under stronger distribution shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出A²方法，通过解耦小模型定位（where to look）与大模型特征提取（what to extract），在不训练、不依赖标签的前提下提升视觉分类鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 小规模自监督ViT的注意力图在前景定位上优于大规模ViT，但大规模ViT能提取更丰富的patch表征；需兼顾定位精度与表征能力。
AI.method: A²方法：用小型ViT生成注意力图并定位峰值区域，裁剪对应图像区域，再输入大型ViT提取嵌入特征；全程使用预训练模型，无需微调或额外监督信号。
AI.result: 在5个基准上，A²与DFR等loss-level方法性能相当，并在更强分布偏移下优于端到端注意力训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 解耦定位与表征可有效提升鲁棒分类性能，A²是一种简单、通用且无需训练的即插即用方案。

title: GRZO: Group-Relative Zeroth-Order Optimization for Large Language Model Fine-Tuning
summary: Zeroth-order (ZO) optimization is a memory-efficient alternative to backpropagation for fine-tuning large language models, but its deployment is limited by the high variance of gradient estimation. We propose GRZO, a Group-Relative Zeroth-Order optimizer that draws one pseudo-independent perturbation per mini-batch example and aggregates the per-example losses through group-relative normalization, raising the effective gradient-direction count from one to the batch size at no additional forward cost while preserving inference-level memory. We prove that GRZO is directionally unbiased with variance shrinking proportionally to the batch size, yielding a tighter nonconvex convergence bound than MeZO. Across RoBERTa-large, Llama3-8B, and OPT-13B over multiple tasks, GRZO improves average accuracy on Llama3-8B by $+3.0$ over MeZO at $23\%$ lower peak GPU memory; as a drop-in replacement for the MeZO core, it lifts sparse, low-rank, and quantized ZO variants by $+6.0$ on average.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GRZO的零阶优化器，通过每批次样本生成一个伪独立扰动，并采用组相对归一化聚合损失，显著降低梯度估计方差，在不增加前向计算开销和保持推理级内存的前提下，提升了大语言模型微调的效率与精度。
AI.motivation: 零阶优化（ZO）虽内存高效，但因梯度估计方差高而限制了其在大语言模型微调中的实际部署。
AI.method: 提出GRZO：每mini-batch样本仅采样一个伪独立扰动，利用group-relative normalization聚合各样本损失，使有效梯度方向数从1提升至batch size；理论证明其方向无偏且方差随batch size反比下降。
AI.result: 在RoBERTa-large、Llama3-8B、OPT-13B多个任务上验证：GRZO在Llama3-8B上平均准确率较MeZO提升+3.0，峰值GPU显存降低23%；作为MeZO核心的即插即用替代，平均提升稀疏、低秩和量化ZO变体性能达+6.0。
AI.conclusion: GRZO是一种高效、低内存、即插即用的零阶优化方法，显著改善了ZO优化在大模型微调中的实用性与收敛性。

title: MedCUA-Bench: A Screenshot-Only Benchmark for Clinical Computer-Use Agents
summary: Computer-use agents could automate repetitive screen-based clinical work, but their reliability in medical graphical user interfaces remains largely unvalidated. Existing benchmarks focus on general web or desktop tasks and underrepresent medical software, which requires domain knowledge, exhibits markedly different UI design from mainstream applications, lacks public testing environments, and demands safety validation beyond task completion. We introduce MedCUA-Bench, an interactive benchmark for clinical computer-use agents. It covers 18 clinical scenarios across 10 medical domains, reconstructed from real product manuals and open-source medical systems to capture authentic clinical interfaces while avoiding licensing and privacy constraints. Each task ships with paired intent- and step-level goals to disentangle clinical reasoning from UI execution, and is evaluated by a deterministic checker over task completion and five clinical safety dimensions. Across 23 agents, the best closed-source model reaches 54.2% strict success, while all models remain below 9% on the real OpenEMR. Open-source agents average only 2.5%, with the best reaching 16.2%. MedCUA-Bench exposes the gap between current agents and reliable clinical software use, providing a reproducible testbed for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MedCUA-Bench，一个面向临床计算机使用代理的交互式基准测试集，涵盖18个真实临床场景，用于评估代理在医疗UI中的任务完成率与临床安全性；实验表明现有模型在真实医疗系统（如OpenEMR）上表现极差，凸显了临床自动化代理的可靠性差距。
AI.motivation: 现有基准缺乏对医疗图形用户界面的覆盖，无法满足临床软件特有的领域知识、UI设计差异、隐私限制和安全验证需求。
AI.method: 构建MedCUA-Bench：基于真实产品手册和开源医疗系统重建18个临床场景，覆盖10个医学领域；设计意图级与步骤级双目标评估体系；采用确定性检查器评估任务完成度及五大临床安全维度。
AI.result: 23个代理中，最佳闭源模型严格成功率仅54.2%，在真实OpenEMR系统中所有模型均低于9%；开源代理平均仅2.5%，最高为16.2%。
AI.conclusion: 当前临床计算机使用代理远未达到临床部署所需的可靠性水平，MedCUA-Bench为后续研究提供了可复现的评测平台。

title: OpenEAI-Platform: An Open-source Embodied Artificial Intelligence Hardware-Software Unified Platform
summary: Embodied AI in the real world requires both accurate hardware and robust vision-language-action (VLA) policies. We present OpenEAI-Platform, a fully open-source platform that integrates a low-cost 6+1 degree-of-freedom (dof) robotic arm (OpenEAI-Arm) and a reproducible VLA model (OpenEAI-VLA). OpenEAI-Arm provides open-source mechanical designs for low manufacturing cost and compliant control methods for higher accuracy. OpenEAI-VLA builds on Qwen3-VL-4B and uses a Diffusion Transformer action head, and is trained in two stages with only open-source robot and multimodal datasets. Across four real-world manipulation tasks, OpenEAI-Arm outperforms two commercial 6+1-dof arms under the same policy, and OpenEAI-VLA achieves success rates comparable to the large-scale pretrained pi0 baseline with only limited pretraining data. We will release the full hardware designs, drivers, models, and training/data pipelines to support reproducible research and scalable data collection. Our codes, layouts, and models will be released after the paper is accepted.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了OpenEAI-Platform，一个开源的具身智能平台，包含低成本高精度的6+1自由度机械臂（OpenEAI-Arm）和基于Qwen3-VL-4B与Diffusion Transformer的可复现视觉语言动作（VLA）模型（OpenEAI-VLA），在真实世界操作任务中展现出优异性能。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的具身AI需要高精度硬件与鲁棒的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略；现有方案常受限于商业硬件封闭性或大模型训练数据/算力依赖，缺乏低成本、全开源、可复现的完整解决方案。
AI.method: 构建了开源机械臂OpenEAI-Arm（含机械设计与柔顺控制方法）和开源VLA模型OpenEAI-VLA（基于Qwen3-VL-4B，采用Diffusion Transformer动作头，两阶段训练，仅用开源机器人与多模态数据集）。
AI.result: OpenEAI-Arm在相同策略下优于两款商用6+1-dof机械臂；OpenEAI-VLA仅用有限预训练数据即达到与大规模预训练pi0基线相当的成功率；在四个真实操作任务上验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: OpenEAI-Platform为具身AI研究提供了首个全栈开源、低成本、高性能且可复现的软硬一体化平台，有望推动社区在可扩展数据收集与可重复实验方面的进展。

title: DMT-CBT: Longitudinal Therapeutic State Modeling for CBT Counseling
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown growing potential for Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) counseling. However, most existing approaches still formulate counseling as a local response generation problem, focusing on empathetic replies within short, text-only, or single-session interactions. We argue that this formulation fundamentally mismatches the nature of real psychotherapy. In clinical CBT, therapy is a longitudinal process in which therapists continuously infer, update, and intervene on evolving therapeutic states across sessions. Realistic CBT further involves multimodal inference and delayed cross-session intervention effects, requiring models to capture longitudinal therapeutic state evolution under partial observability. We propose DMT-CBT, a framework for Dynamic Modeling of evolving Therapeutic states in CBT counseling. DMT-CBT maintains structured therapeutic states across sessions while incorporating multimodal behavioral grounding and tool-augmented intervention to support adaptive therapeutic reasoning. Based on this framework, we construct DMTCorpus, a synthetic multi-session multimodal CBT counseling dataset featuring evolving therapeutic states, image-grounded client behaviors, and cross-session intervention continuity. Experimental results show that DMT-CBT improves counseling fidelity and therapeutic alliance, produces more favorable longitudinal affective trajectories, and preserves therapeutic states more faithfully than post-hoc extraction approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DMT-CBT框架，用于建模认知行为疗法（CBT）中跨会话演化的治疗状态，强调纵向、多模态与工具增强的动态推理，并构建了配套的合成多会话多模态数据集DMTCorpus，实验表明其在咨询保真度、治疗联盟和情感轨迹等方面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM用于CBT咨询的方法多局限于单次、文本、短交互的局部回应生成，无法反映真实CBT中跨会话、多模态、部分可观测且具延迟干预效应的纵向治疗过程。
AI.method: 提出DMT-CBT框架，通过结构化跨会话治疗状态建模、多模态行为 grounding（如图像）、工具增强干预实现动态治疗推理；并构建合成数据集DMTCorpus，包含演化治疗状态、图像支撑的客户行为及跨会话干预连续性。
AI.result: DMT-CBT在咨询保真度、治疗联盟、长期情感轨迹和治疗状态保持方面均优于后验提取等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 将CBT建模为动态、纵向、多模态的治疗状态演化过程更贴近临床实际，DMT-CBT为此提供了可行框架与数据基础，推动LLM向真实心理治疗场景落地。

title: NVIDIA OmniDreams: Real-Time Generative World Model for Closed-Loop Autonomous Vehicle Simulation
summary: As autonomous vehicle capabilities advance, the safe evaluation of driving policies in long-tail scenarios remains a critical bottleneck. In closed-loop simulation, the driving policy model actively interacts with the environment, where its actions dynamically update the simulator state and directly influence the next set of generated sensor observations. While recent reconstruction-based neural simulators offer photorealism, they are fundamentally constrained by their initial captured data and struggle to generalize to highly dynamic or novel scenes. To overcome these limitations, we introduce OmniDreams, a foundation generative world model mid- and post-trained from the Cosmos diffusion model to autoregressively generate action-conditioned videos in real time. By leveraging the rich visual priors of Cosmos and mid- and post-training on 21k hours of driving scenarios, OmniDreams synthesizes complex, unobserved phenomena that are hard for traditional simulators to capture, such as extreme weather and unpredictable dynamic agent behaviors. Crucially, it autoregressively conditions its photorealistic sensor generation on past frames, the current simulator state, and immediate driving actions. Deployed in a closed-loop system with the Alpamayo 1 policy model and AlpaSim orchestrator, OmniDreams acts as a highly responsive, reactive environment, providing a scalable and comprehensive solution for training and evaluating next-generation autonomous driving policies. We additionally show preliminary results indicating that a world-action model (WAM) post-trained from OmniDreams achieves strong performance on the Physical AI Autonomous Vehicles NuRec dataset, surpassing the VLA-based Alpamayo 1.5 research policy model while using only 1/5 the total parameters. These results highlight the potential for a real-time world model like OmniDreams to also serve as a backbone for policy architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OmniDreams，一种基于Cosmos扩散模型的生成式世界模型，用于自动驾驶策略在长尾场景中的闭环仿真评估。它通过中后期训练，能够实时生成动作条件下的高保真视频，支持极端天气和复杂动态行为等传统模拟器难以建模的场景，并在闭环系统中验证了其有效性与可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于重建的神经模拟器受限于初始采集数据，在高度动态或新颖场景中泛化能力差，难以支撑自动驾驶策略在长尾场景下的安全闭环评估。
AI.method: 基于Cosmos扩散模型进行中训练（mid-training）和后训练（post-training），构建动作条件、自回归、实时视频生成的世界模型OmniDreams；在21k小时驾驶数据上训练，实现对过去帧、当前状态和即时动作的联合条件建模。
AI.result: OmniDreams在闭环仿真中作为响应式环境，显著提升长尾场景覆盖能力；其衍生的世界-动作模型（WAM）在NuRec数据集上性能超越Alpamayo 1.5，且参数量仅为后者的1/5。
AI.conclusion: OmniDreams不仅为自动驾驶策略提供了更真实、可扩展的闭环评估平台，还展现出作为下一代策略架构主干模型的潜力。

title: Forgetting is Not Erasure: Recovering Latent Knowledge via Transport Keys
comment: Technical report showcasing results from transport keys
summary: Catastrophic forgetting is often framed as a representational problem: after sequential training, a model appears to lose the features that supported performance on earlier tasks. We challenge the stronger form of this view. Across controlled continual-learning settings, we find that a significant portion of apparent forgetting can be attributed to interface drift between internal stages rather than permanent erasure of task-relevant computation. We study this phenomenon through a stitched evaluation protocol that combines early computation from a post-update network with late computation from its predecessor, optionally mediated by a compact, task-specific transport key. We describe transport keys at a systems level as compact interface-alignment operators estimated from a small set of paired anchor activations and evaluated through model stitching. On split CIFAR-100 with a ResNet-style network, transport keys recover most of the original Task A performance after sequential training on Task B. On a compact vision transformer, we observe a similar recovery pattern. These results suggest that continual learning may require better mechanisms for indexing and re-accessing latent computations, not only methods that prevent weight change.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了灾难性遗忘是表征问题的强观点，提出遗忘主要源于内部阶段间接口漂移而非特征永久擦除，并通过'缝合评估协议'和'传输密钥'验证该观点，在多个模型上显著恢复先前任务性能。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为灾难性遗忘是由于模型在顺序训练中永久丢失了支持早期任务的特征；本文旨在挑战这一强表征观点，探究遗忘是否更多源于内部计算阶段间接口不匹配。
AI.method: 提出'缝合评估协议'，将更新后网络的早期计算与前序网络的晚期计算进行组合，并引入轻量级、任务特定的'传输密钥'作为接口对齐算子，该密钥基于少量配对锚点激活估计并用于模型缝合。
AI.result: 在Split CIFAR-100数据集上，使用ResNet式网络时，传输密钥可恢复大部分任务A原始性能；在紧凑型ViT上也观察到类似恢复效果。
AI.conclusion: 灾难性遗忘很大程度上源于接口漂移而非表征擦除，因此持续学习不仅需防止权重变化，更需发展有效索引与重访问潜在计算的机制。

title: Effect of Demographic Bias on Skin Lesion Classification
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) , 26 pages, 12 figures
summary: In this study, we evaluate the performance of skin lesion classification using ResNet-based convolutional models, focusing on the impact of demographic bias in training data, particularly variations in patient sex and age. We use linear programming to generate datasets with controlled demographic characteristics, allowing systematic investigation of bias effects. Three learning strategies are evaluated: a single-task model, a reinforcing multi-task model, and an adversarial learning scheme. Our sex-based analysis indicates that sex-specific training datasets optimise model performance. Notably, including male patients in the training data improved performance for the male subgroup, even in female-majority cases. Reinforcing and adversarial learning schemes narrowed or eliminated bias gaps in balanced and female-majority datasets. However, these strategies proved less effective in male-majority settings, where models continued to perform better for males than females. The two learning schemes showed marginal bias reduction compared to the baseline model in predominantly male patient populations. Age-based analysis demonstrates comparable baseline performance across the three model approaches, with performance declining across age categories. Younger groups consistently achieve the highest performance, regardless of training data distribution. Although balanced training yields optimal results for the youngest age category, performance decreases in older categories. We find that sex biases arise mainly from data imbalances, while age biases consistently favour younger groups regardless of distribution. These distinct mechanisms require targeted mitigation strategies. Additionally, cross-dataset validation on two external datasets revealed that domain shifts notably affect performance and patterns of demographic bias.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了基于ResNet的皮肤病变分类模型在不同性别和年龄人群中的性能表现，发现数据中的人口统计学偏差（尤其是性别和年龄分布不均）显著影响模型公平性；通过线性规划构建可控人口统计特征的数据集，并比较单任务、强化多任务和对抗学习三种策略，结果表明：性别偏差主要源于数据不平衡，而年龄偏差则系统性偏向年轻群体；外部数据集验证进一步揭示了域偏移对偏差模式的影响。
AI.motivation: 探究皮肤病变分类模型中由患者性别和年龄引起的人口统计学偏差来源及其影响机制，以提升模型在不同人群中的公平性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用ResNet卷积模型，结合线性规划生成具有可控性别/年龄分布的训练数据集；对比单任务学习、强化多任务学习和对抗学习三种策略；在内部及两个外部数据集上进行交叉验证。
AI.result: 性别偏差可通过平衡数据或使用强化/对抗学习缓解，但在男性主导数据中效果有限；年龄偏差始终表现为对年轻群体的性能优势，且不受训练数据分布影响；外部验证显示域偏移会显著改变偏差模式。
AI.conclusion: 性别与年龄偏差具有不同成因机制——前者主因数据不平衡，后者反映模型固有偏好，需分别设计针对性缓解策略；域偏移加剧偏差复杂性，强调跨中心验证的重要性。

title: Reliability-Guided Depth Fusion for Glare-Resilient Navigation Costmaps
summary: Specular glare on reflective floors, glass boundaries, and glossy indoor surfaces frequently corrupts active-stereo RGB-D depth measurements, producing holes and spikes that accumulate as persistent phantom obstacles in occupancy-grid costmaps. This paper presents a glare-resilient costmap construction method based on explicit depth-reliability modeling. A lightweight Depth Reliability Map network (DRM-Net) predicts per-pixel measurement trustworthiness under specular interference, and a reliability-guided weighted-and-gated fusion (RGF) mechanism modulates occupancy updates before corrupted measurements are accumulated into the map. To support robust training and evaluation, the method uses pose-aligned multi-view reference-depth construction to reduce circular-supervision bias and is evaluated through fusion-variant ablations, parameter-sensitivity analysis, cross-condition tests, paired navigation comparisons, reliability-map metrics, and embedded runtime profiling. Experiments on a real mobile robotic platform equipped with an Intel RealSense D435 and a Jetson Orin Nano show that the proposed method reduces false obstacle insertion, improves free-space preservation, and maintains real-time throughput under reflective-floor, glass-wall, and natural-light glare conditions. These results support treating glare as a measurement-reliability problem rather than as a dense depth-completion problem for safety-critical indoor navigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度可靠性建模的抗眩光代价地图构建方法，通过DRM-Net预测像素级深度可信度，并利用可靠性引导的融合机制（RGF）优化占用更新，显著提升在镜面反射干扰下的导航鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 镜面眩光（如反光地板、玻璃边界、高光表面）会严重破坏主动双目RGB-D深度测量，导致占用栅格地图中产生持续的伪障碍物，威胁室内导航安全。
AI.method: 提出轻量级Depth Reliability Map网络（DRM-Net）预测每像素深度测量在眩光下的可信度；设计可靠性引导的加权与门控融合（RGF）机制，在累积前动态调节占用更新；采用位姿对齐的多视角参考深度构建以缓解循环监督偏差。
AI.result: 在搭载Intel RealSense D435和Jetson Orin Nano的真实移动机器人平台上实验表明，该方法显著减少误障碍插入、更好保持自由空间，并在反光地板、玻璃墙及自然光眩光条件下维持实时性能。
AI.conclusion: 将眩光问题建模为深度测量可靠性问题，而非传统稠密深度补全问题，更适用于安全关键型室内导航。

title: A cross-domain tropical species dataset with Chinese vernacular names and CITES source links
comment: 25 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables. Dataset descriptor for the Tropical Species Encyclopedia. Companion to the methodology paper arXiv:2606.00994. Dataset deposited at Zenodo (doi:10.5281/zenodo.20377811); canonical preprint-of-record at Zenodo (doi:10.5281/zenodo.20424981)
summary: We describe a versioned cross-domain dataset of 410,499 active tropical species (working snapshot 2026-04-20) spanning three applied subdomains -- tropical_plants, tropical_aquatic, and tropical_pets -- that share a commercial and regulatory life cycle but are distributed across kingdom-organised biodiversity infrastructures. The resource joins taxonomic identifiers from GBIF, Plants of the World Online, iNaturalist, NCBI Taxonomy, the Catalogue of Life and the Encyclopedia of Life, and adds three original layers: a cross-domain ontology that re-segments taxa along trade and husbandry contexts; a Chinese vernacular layer with explicit per-name provenance under a typology that excludes unverified machine-generated proposals; and a CITES source-linkage layer connecting each taxon to its Species+ entry. Chinese vernacular coverage -- the proportion of taxa carrying a CJK Chinese name distinct from the scientific binomial -- reaches 99.50 percent (408,456 of 410,499; full-population count). Coverage characterises completeness, not name-translation accuracy; the latter is bounded by the four-level provenance typology and is the subject of a preliminary internal review reported here, with a blind external audit identified as the principal open item. Upstream content is referenced by stable identifier only for the original-contribution layers, supporting CC-BY 4.0 reuse. The dataset is deposited on Zenodo (10.5281/zenodo.20377811). This preprint is the canonical v1.0 description of the dataset's current state; future Data Descriptor submission is anticipated but is contingent on the validation and release-engineering items listed in the Limitations.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个涵盖410,499种热带活跃物种的跨领域、带版本控制的数据集，覆盖热带植物、热带水生生物和热带宠物三个子领域，整合多源分类标识，并新增跨领域本体、中文俗名层（含明确来源与类型学）及CITES关联层；中文俗名覆盖率达99.50%，强调可追溯性与CC-BY 4.0可重用性。
AI.motivation: 解决热带物种在商业与监管生命周期中跨领域数据割裂问题，弥合 kingdom-组织的生物多样性基础设施之间的语义与命名鸿沟，尤其提升中文语境下的可访问性与可验证性。
AI.method: 整合GBIF、POWO、iNaturalist、NCBI Taxonomy、CoL和EOL等权威分类数据库标识；构建面向贸易与饲养场景的跨领域本体；建立具四层来源类型的中文俗名层（排除未经验证的机器生成名称）；实现与CITES Species+的逐条链接；所有原始贡献层采用稳定标识引用并遵循CC-BY 4.0协议。
