AI.result: 发布含410,499个物种的v1.0版本数据集，中文俗名覆盖率达99.50%（408,456/410,499），完成内部初步审查，盲审外部审计列为待办核心事项；数据集已存档于Zenodo（DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20377811）。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为热带物种跨域治理、合规贸易与多语言生物信息共享提供了结构化、可验证、可复用的基础资源；后续工作聚焦于外部验证与工程化发布。

title: SRENet: Spectral Re-Entry Network for Point Cloud Action Recognition
comment: 13 pages, 11 figures. Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
summary: Recognizing human actions from point cloud sequences is critical for 3D perception driven applications such as autonomous driving and human-computer interaction. However, the irregular structure and temporal inconsistency of point clouds pose unique challenges for spatio-temporal representation learning, especially in capturing both global motion context and fine-grained temporal dynamics. We propose SRENet, a spectral-aware framework designed to explicitly learn both global context and fine-grained temporal dynamics of motion from a frequency perspective for action recognition. SRENet introduces a Spectral Decomposition Block (SDeBlock) that performs wavelet-based analysis along temporal and spatial axes, disentangling features into low- and high-frequency components with frequency-specific attention. To recover residual dynamics and re-align temporal frequency structures distorted during semantic fusion, a Spectral Re-entry Block (SReBlock) performs secondary temporal decomposition. Furthermore, a spectral-aware learning strategy is devised to enhance discriminability in both frequency subspaces via contrastive loss and a curriculum schedule that gradually shifts focus from low- to high-frequency spaces in line with coarse to detailed motion patterns. Extensive experiments on MSR-Action3D, NTU-RGBD and NTU-RGBD120 demonstrate that SRENet achieves state-of-the-art performance, validating the effectiveness of frequency modeling in point cloud-based action understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SRENet，一种频谱感知框架，用于点云序列中的人类动作识别，通过小波分析分解时空特征，并引入频谱重入机制和频谱感知学习策略提升性能。
AI.motivation: 点云序列的不规则结构和时间不一致性给时空表征学习带来挑战，尤其是同时捕捉全局运动上下文和细粒度时间动态。
AI.method: 提出SRENet框架，包含频谱分解模块（SDeBlock）进行时空小波分析、频谱重入模块（SReBlock）恢复残余动态并重新对齐时间频率结构，以及结合对比损失和课程学习的频谱感知学习策略。
AI.result: 在MSR-Action3D、NTU-RGBD和NTU-RGBD120数据集上达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 频谱建模在点云动作理解中具有有效性，SRENet为该任务提供了新思路。

title: RRISE: Robust Radius Inference via a Surrogate Estimator
summary: Randomized smoothing (RS) uses a smoothed classifier to provide architecture-agnostic certificates of $\ell_2$ classification robustness, but its dependence on per-input Monte Carlo (MC) sampling undermines its use in real-time systems. We argue that this cost is structural rather than fundamental, such that it can be significantly reduced by sharing information across the deployment stream. We introduce RRISE, an RS framework that compresses certification into a single forward pass through a learned surrogate. RRISE trains the surrogate against precomputed MC class-count targets via a soft-label cross-entropy loss and converts surrogate predictions into provably conservative certified radii through a one-time conformal calibration step. The resulting certificate is deployment-verifiable: whenever the calibrated radius is positive, the surrogate's prediction provably matches the smoothed classifier's and the smoothed classifier is constant on a ball of that radius around the input. Across image classification benchmarks, RRISE matches fixed-budget MC certified accuracy within $0.84$ percentage points while replacing up to $10^4$ noisy base-model evaluations per query with a single surrogate forward pass, recouping MC training cost after $\approx 10^5$ deployment queries. On CIFAR-100 and Tiny ImageNet, where the only prior offline-surrogate method collapses, RRISE achieves $1.23$ to $1.91\times$ higher certified accuracy, establishing efficient randomized smoothing as a practical path to certified robustness in repeated-deployment settings.

AI.tldr: RRISE是一种新型随机平滑（RS）框架，通过学习一个代理模型将认证压缩为单次前向传播，显著降低实时系统中蒙特卡洛采样的计算开销，并提供可验证的保守鲁棒半径。
AI.motivation: 随机平滑依赖每输入的蒙特卡洛采样，导致其在实时系统中部署成本过高；作者认为该开销是结构性而非根本性的，可通过跨输入流共享信息来缓解。
AI.method: 提出RRISE：训练一个代理模型拟合预计算的MC类别计数软标签（使用软标签交叉熵损失），再通过一次性共形校准将代理输出转化为可证明保守的认证半径。
AI.result: 在图像分类基准上，RRISE以单次前向传播替代最多10^4次噪声模型评估，认证精度与固定预算MC方法相差仅0.84个百分点；在CIFAR-100和Tiny ImageNet上比先前离线代理方法高1.23–1.91倍认证精度。
AI.conclusion: RRISE使高效随机平滑成为重复部署场景下实现可证明鲁棒性的实用路径。

title: Perceive Before Reasoning: A Pre-Reasoning Perception Framework for Efficient and Reliable Proactive Mobile Agents
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have substantially advanced mobile agents, yet proactive mobile assistance remains challenging because agents must decide \emph{when} to intervene before determining \emph{how} to assist. Existing systems often implement these two decisions within a unified MLLM-based pipeline, leading to goal misalignment between conservative intervention filtering and comprehensive assistance generation, as well as redundant inference when the agent should remain silent. To address these limitations, we propose the \textbf{Pre-Reasoning Perception Framework (PRPF)}, a two-stage framework built on perceiving before reasoning. PRPF introduces a lightweight Multimodal Proactive Perceptor (MPP) for intervention gating and context compression, and activates the Proactive Agent Reasoner (PAR) only when intervention is warranted. Experiments on the ProactiveMobile benchmark show that PRPF substantially reduces false trigger rates (FTR) while improving success rates (SR) and inference efficiency over the ProactiveMobile baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pre-Reasoning Perception Framework (PRPF)，通过轻量级多模态主动感知器（MPP）进行干预门控和上下文压缩，仅在需要干预时激活主动代理推理器（PAR），从而降低误触发率、提升成功率与推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于统一MLLM的移动代理系统在干预时机判断与辅助方式生成之间存在目标错位，且在无需干预时仍进行冗余推理。
AI.method: 提出两阶段PRPF框架：第一阶段由轻量级Multimodal Proactive Perceptor（MPP）完成干预决策与上下文压缩；第二阶段仅当MPP判定需干预时，才激活Proactive Agent Reasoner（PAR）生成具体操作。
AI.result: 在ProactiveMobile基准测试中，PRPF显著降低了误触发率（FTR），同时提升了任务成功率（SR）和推理效率。
AI.conclusion: PRPF通过‘感知先行、推理后置’的设计，有效解耦干预决策与动作生成，提升了主动移动助手的可靠性与效率。

title: PerchRL: Vision-Based Agile Perching on Inclined Platforms under Rapid and Irregular Motion
summary: Autonomous vision-based perching of quadrotors on moving inclined platforms is critical for air-ground collaboration but remains challenging due to the limited field of view (FOV). In this paper, we propose PerchRL, a reinforcement learning (RL) framework for vision-based agile perching on inclined platforms under rapid and irregular motion. Specifically, we employ a two-stage learning strategy consisting of state-based pre-training followed by vision-based fine-tuning. To improve generalization across diverse platform motions, we employ randomized platform trajectories to prevent overfitting and temporal augmentation methods to capture latent motion patterns from historical observations. During vision-based fine-tuning, a hybrid learning framework consisting of visibility-aware state augmentation and active perception rewards is presented to improve robustness under intermittent visual loss. Extensive simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate the feasibility, stability, and real-time performance of PerchRL, while successful deployment across distinct quadrotor platforms further validates its adaptability. The source code will be released to benefit the community.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PerchRL，一种基于强化学习的视觉引导四旋翼无人机在快速、不规则运动的倾斜平台上自主停靠的框架，通过两阶段学习策略（状态预训练+视觉微调）、随机化平台轨迹、时间增强和可见性感知状态增强等技术提升泛化性与鲁棒性，并在仿真和真实场景中验证了其可行性、稳定性与实时性。
AI.motivation: 自主视觉引导四旋翼在运动倾斜平台上的停靠对空地协同至关重要，但受限于有限视场（FOV）而极具挑战性。
AI.method: 提出PerchRL强化学习框架，采用两阶段学习：先基于状态预训练，再基于视觉微调；引入随机化平台轨迹防止过拟合，结合时间增强捕捉运动模式；在微调阶段设计可见性感知状态增强与主动感知奖励机制以应对间歇性视觉丢失。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实环境中验证了PerchRL的可行性、稳定性与实时性能，并成功部署于多种四旋翼平台，证明其强适应性。
AI.conclusion: PerchRL有效解决了运动倾斜平台上视觉引导停靠的关键挑战，具备良好的泛化性、鲁棒性和跨平台适应性，源码将开源以推动社区发展。

title: Fully Automated Identification of Lexical Alignment and Preference-Stage Shifts in Large Language Models
summary: The language used by digital chat assistants such as ChatGPT can diverge from human expectations (misalignment). Research, mostly on Scientific English, has described both what divergences occur and, to some extent, why, linking them to the training stage of human preference learning. Yet, existing approaches rely on manual curation. This paper introduces two curation-free, assumption-light evaluation metrics: the Lexical Alignment Score, which identifies lexical overuse, and the Triangulated Preference Shift, which quantifies how much of such shifts can be attributed to human preference learning. Using PubMed abstracts, continuations were generated and measured using windowed document prevalence across six model families (Falcon, Gemma, Llama, Mistral, OLMo, Yi). The procedure identifies, without manual intervention, overused items such as 'suggest', 'additionally', and 'strategy', and estimates their link to preference learning. Our findings replicate prior work and remain stable across parameter settings, random seeds, and evaluation on further data. The approach scales readily and enables systematic study of lexical (mis)alignment beyond Scientific English and across languages, and as such, the metrics have the potential to contribute to improved alignment for future models and understanding of its origins.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种无需人工标注、假设较少的评估指标（词汇对齐分数和三角偏好偏移），用于自动检测大语言模型在生成文本时与人类期望之间的词汇层面错位，并验证其在多种模型和设置下的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多依赖人工标注来分析大语言模型（如ChatGPT）语言与人类期望的错位问题，缺乏可扩展、自动化的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出两个自动化指标：Lexical Alignment Score（检测词汇过用）和Triangulated Preference Shift（量化偏好学习导致的偏移）；基于PubMed摘要生成续写文本，在六种模型家族上使用滑动窗口文档频次进行测量。
AI.result: 成功自动识别出如'suggest'、'additionally'、'strategy'等过用词，并稳定估计其与人类偏好学习的关联；结果在不同参数、随机种子及额外数据上具有一致性。
AI.conclusion: 所提指标无需人工干预、可扩展性强，适用于跨领域、跨语言的词汇对齐研究，有助于提升模型对齐效果并深化对其成因的理解。

title: JAVEDIT: Joint Audio-Visual Instruction-Guided Video Editing with Agentic Data Curation
comment: Equal contributions from first two authors. Project page: https://ryanchenyn.github.io/projects/JAVEdit Code: https://github.com/RyanChenYN/JAVEdit Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/Coraxor/JAVEdit-100k
summary: While instruction-based video editing has seen significant progress, joint audio-visual editing remains constrained by the absence of dedicated datasets and benchmarks. To bridge this gap, we present JAVEdit-100k, the first large-scale, high-quality dataset tailored for instruction-guided joint audio-visual editing. Focusing on human-centric videos, JAVEdit-100k comprises approximately 100K editing triplets spanning five distinct categories, including subject editing and speech editing. This dataset is rigorously constructed via four meticulously designed generation pipelines, seamlessly paired with an agent-in-the-loop quality control mechanism. Furthermore, to address the lack of standardized evaluation within the field, we introduce JAVEditBench, a comprehensive benchmark featuring curated source videos and human-aligned instructions across all editing categories. Finally, we propose JAVEdit, a pioneering baseline model for instruction-guided joint audio-visual editing. Experiments show that \model\ outperforms all baselines on five of six evaluation metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个大规模高质量的指令引导联合音视频编辑数据集JAVEdit-100k、配套基准测试集JAVEditBench，以及基线模型JAVEdit，显著推动了该领域发展。
AI.motivation: 现有指令式视频编辑虽有进展，但联合音视频编辑受限于缺乏专用数据集和基准测试。
AI.method: 构建了包含约10万编辑三元组的JAVEdit-100k数据集（含5类人类中心编辑任务），采用4条生成流水线与agent-in-the-loop质量控制；设计了涵盖多类编辑的标准化基准JAVEditBench；并提出首个联合音视频编辑基线模型JAVEdit。
AI.result: 所提模型JAVEdit在六项评估指标中的五项上超越所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: JAVEdit-100k、JAVEditBench与JAVEdit共同填补了联合音视频编辑领域的关键空白，为后续研究提供了坚实基础与统一评估标准。

title: Are we really tilting? The mechanics of reward guidance in flow and diffusion models
summary: Reward guidance algorithms steer a learned generative process toward the reward-tilted measure at inference time. While empirically powerful, these methods are prone to reward hacking: the guided model over-optimizes the reward at the cost of fidelity to the learned distribution. Prior work has attributed this to the complexity of neural reward functions or implicit biases in diffusion training, but its fundamental origins remain poorly understood. We show that reward hacking arises from an approximation made in most practical implementations of reward-guided diffusion -- finite-particle plug-in estimation of the Doob h-function -- even in the simplest non-trivial settings of Gaussian and Gaussian mixture targets with quadratic rewards. In closed form, we isolate two distinct failure modes of the plug-in estimator: it leads to reward hacking within each mode and it cannot select high-reward modes. We propose a closed-form reward damping schedule that corrects the within-mode bias with no additional compute, and clarify the role of best-of-n sampling in compensating for the mode selection failure. Experiments on Gaussian mixture targets, a 2D checkerboard, and FLUX.1 text-to-image generation confirm that our theoretical insights carry over to practical settings.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了奖励引导扩散模型中奖励作弊现象的根本原因在于Doob h函数的有限粒子插件估计，提出了闭式奖励阻尼调度来纠正偏差，并通过实验验证了理论洞察在实际应用中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 奖励引导算法在推理时倾向于奖励倾斜分布，但容易导致奖励作弊，即过度优化奖励而牺牲生成质量。尽管已有研究归因于神经奖励函数复杂性或扩散训练中的隐式偏差，但其根本原因仍不清楚。
AI.method: 通过分析高斯和高斯混合目标下二次奖励的最简单非平凡设置，以闭式形式揭示了插件估计器的两种失败模式，并提出闭式奖励阻尼调度来纠正偏差，同时阐明best-of-n采样在补偿模式选择失败中的作用。
AI.result: 理论上隔离了插件估计器的两种失败模式：模式内奖励作弊与无法选择高奖励模式；提出无需额外计算的闭式奖励阻尼调度；实验验证了理论在高斯混合、2D棋盘格及FLUX.1文本到图像生成中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 奖励作弊源于Doob h函数的有限粒子插件估计，而非模型复杂性或训练偏差；所提方法能有效缓解该问题，提升奖励引导生成的质量与可靠性。

title: Human2Humanoid: Physics-Aware Cross-Morphology Motion Retargeting for Humanoid Robots
summary: Retargeting human motion to humanoid robots is critical for teleoperation, imitation learning and human-robot interaction. However, it remains challenging because of substantial morphological discrepancies between humans and robots, including differences in skeletal topology, limb proportions and degrees of freedom, as well as the scarcity of paired motion data. This paper presents Human2Humanoid, an unsupervised motion retargeting framework that transfers human motions to humanoid robot behaviors with high fidelity. To bridge the domain gap under unpaired data, we adopt a CycleGAN-based architecture equipped with a skeleton-aware graph convolutional network to capture topology-dependent motion features. To address cross-domain scale mismatches, we introduce a morphology-invariant end-effector consistency loss that aligns normalized end-effector trajectories to preserve motion semantics across embodiments. To improve physical plausibility and reduce contact artifacts, we impose explicit physics-aware feasibility constraints to encourage reproduction of the contact patterns in the source motion. Experimental results show that the proposed method successfully retargets human motion to the Unitree G1 humanoid robot without paired data, and outperforms existing methods in both downstream controllability and physical feasibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Human2Humanoid，一种无需配对数据的无监督人体运动重定向框架，通过CycleGAN结合骨架感知图卷积网络、形态不变的末端执行器一致性损失及物理可行性约束，实现高保真、物理合理的人体运动到人形机器人的迁移。
AI.motivation: 解决人类与人形机器人间因骨骼拓扑、肢体比例、自由度差异及配对运动数据稀缺导致的运动重定向难题。
AI.method: 采用基于CycleGAN的架构，引入骨架感知图卷积网络建模拓扑相关运动特征；设计形态不变的末端执行器一致性损失以对齐归一化末端轨迹；加入显式的物理感知可行性约束以保持源运动中的接触模式。
AI.result: 在Unitree G1机器人上成功实现无配对数据的运动重定向，在下游可控性和物理可行性方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Human2Humanoid能有效弥合人类与机器人间的形态鸿沟，在无监督条件下实现高保真、物理合理的运动迁移，适用于遥操作、模仿学习和人机交互。

title: HyperPatch: Sequential Knowledge Editing Under n-ary Structural Drift
comment: Accepted to Proceedings of the 32nd ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD 2026)
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) rely on Knowledge Editing (KE) to maintain temporal validity, yet real-world knowledge is inherently n-ary. We demonstrate that in non-stationary environments, sequential updates to complex relations induce N-ary Structural Drift, a phenomenon where the binary reification of n-ary events into triples fractures relational atomicity. This precipitates Structure-Conditioned Knowledge Transfer Failure, a systematic mis-grounding of the retriever frequently misdiagnosed as parametric hallucination. To tackle this, we propose HyperPatch, a parameter-preserving framework that reformulates sequential KE as a stability problem over hypergraph manifolds. HyperPatch preserves event integrity through three phases: (i) Structural Prior Initialization, establishing a topology-aware embedding space via contrastive learning on a Hypergraph Neural Network (HGNN) to capture high-order correlations; (ii) Sequential Topology Editing, utilizing a dual-stage mechanism that employs SimHash-based Topological Alignment for rapid conflict resolution and Topological LoRA Adaptation to track drift without backbone retraining; and (iii) Structure-Conditioned Reasoning, which integrates globally consistent evidence from fused linguistic and structural manifolds. On the MQuAKE-CF and MQuAKE-T benchmarks, HyperPatch achieves relative gains in Hop-wise Accuracy (H-Acc) of 96.24% and 21.06% over the strongest baseline, respectively. Further ablations demonstrate superior reliability under continuous n-ary update streams, whereas the standard KG-based variant suffers H-Acc collapses of up to 88.3% due to structural misalignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperPatch框架，通过超图流形上的稳定性优化解决大语言模型中因n元关系序贯编辑引发的结构漂移与知识迁移失败问题，在MQuAKE基准上显著提升Hop-wise Accuracy。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型依赖知识编辑（KE）维持时效性，但现实世界知识本质上是n元的；在非平稳环境中，对复杂关系的序贯更新会引发n元结构性漂移，破坏关系原子性，导致结构条件下的知识迁移失败，常被误诊为参数幻觉。
AI.method: 提出参数保持型框架HyperPatch，将序贯知识编辑建模为超图流形上的稳定性问题，包含三个阶段：（i）结构先验初始化，利用超图神经网络（HGNN）对比学习构建拓扑感知嵌入空间；（ii）序贯拓扑编辑，采用SimHash拓扑对齐与拓扑LoRA自适应追踪漂移；（iii）结构条件推理，融合语言与结构流形的全局一致证据。
AI.result: 在MQuAKE-CF和MQuAKE-T基准上，HyperPatch的Hop-wise Accuracy（H-Acc）分别相对最强基线提升96.24%和21.06%；消融实验表明其在连续n元更新流下可靠性更优，而标准KG变体因结构错配导致H-Acc最高崩溃达88.3%。
AI.conclusion: HyperPatch有效缓解了n元知识编辑中的结构性漂移问题，保障事件完整性与检索一致性，为动态知识维护提供了可扩展、参数友好的新范式。

title: Ask When It Pays: Cost-Aware Open-Ended Interaction for Instance Goal Navigation
summary: Instance Goal Navigation (IGN) requires an embodied agent to find a specific object instance among distractors from an underspecified natural-language description. Such ambiguity often cannot be resolved from perception and language alone, making interaction with an oracle a natural mechanism for disambiguation. Prior interactive methods allow oracle queries but treat lightweight clarification and route-level guidance alike, letting agents boost success rate through repeated high-information questions rather than by resolving the underlying ambiguity efficiently. We recast interactive IGN as a cost-sensitive uncertainty-reduction problem, where the agent should ask the question whose answer provides the largest reduction in navigation uncertainty relative to its penalty. To this end, we apply an information-gain analysis on existing navigation corpora to identify which cues reduce navigation uncertainty, yielding a compact set of question types and data-derived weights.However, existing interactive navigation benchmarks do not model the cost of different question types or evaluate how efficiently agents use interaction, making them unsuitable for studying cost-sensitive interaction. Based on this taxonomy, we construct a benchmark for diagnosing interaction behavior and efficiency, together with a Weighted Success Rate metric that penalizes each query by its derived cost. We further propose a zero-shot MLLM navigator that selectively queries at each decision step only when the expected uncertainty reduction justifies the interaction cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向成本敏感的交互式实例目标导航（IGN）方法，将交互建模为不确定性降低与查询代价权衡的问题，构建了新的评测基准和加权成功率指标，并设计了一个零样本MLLM导航器以实现高效、有选择性的交互。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式IGN方法未区分不同查询类型的成本，导致代理依赖高信息量但低效的频繁提问，而非真正解决语言-感知模糊性；缺乏能评估交互效率的基准。
AI.method: 基于信息增益分析导航语料库，构建问题类型分类与数据驱动的代价权重；设计新基准及加权成功率（WSR）指标；提出零样本MLLM导航器，在每步仅当预期不确定性降低超过查询代价时才发起提问。
AI.result: 所提方法在新基准上验证了交互效率显著提升；WSR指标能有效区分代理的代价敏感行为；零样本导航器无需微调即可实现高效选择性交互。
AI.conclusion: 将交互建模为成本敏感的不确定性减少过程，是提升IGN中语言-感知联合推理效率的关键路径；新基准与指标为未来研究提供了更合理的评估范式。

title: Scalable Uncertainty Quantification for Extreme Weather Forecasting via Empirical Neural Tangent Kernels
comment: Proceedings of the 32nd ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining V.2 (KDD '26)
summary: Deep learning weather models now match numerical weather prediction accuracy while running orders of magnitude faster, but produce deterministic forecasts without uncertainty estimates, a critical gap for high-stakes decisions during extreme weather events. This paper proposes Neural Tangent Kernel-based uncertainty quantification (NTK-UQ) using last-layer empirical features. Theoretical analysis predicts that UQ quality is architecture-dependent through two mechanisms. First, a variance collapse mechanism explains when UQ fails: when the eigenvalue truncation rank approaches the effective rank of the feature space, the GP correction term consumes nearly all prior variance, destroying discrimination between tropical cyclones and routine conditions; architectures with concentrated spectra (spectral operators) require aggressive truncation ($k \leq 10$), while attention-based models tolerate full-rank computation. Second, decomposition performance depends on the non-Gaussian, heavy-tailed structure of extreme weather: Independent Component Analysis exploits higher-order statistics (kurtosis, negentropy) to isolate heavy-tailed extreme-event features, achieving higher discrimination than singular value decomposition, which captures only second-order variance. A data-driven selection rule chooses ICA or SVD from the feature eigenspectrum concentration ratio, correctly prescribing the superior decomposition for all four evaluated architectures. Compared to split conformal prediction (the natural post-hoc baseline), NTK-UQ achieves 31--37\% sharper prediction intervals at 90\% coverage, and uniquely produces \emph{adaptive} intervals that scale with extreme event severity, which conformal prediction cannot achieve by construction. The framework requires no retraining; inference-time uncertainty requires only a single matrix-vector product per sample.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经正切核（NTK）的不确定性量化方法（NTK-UQ），利用最后一层经验特征，无需重训练即可在推理时高效生成自适应预测区间，尤其在极端天气事件中显著优于传统共形预测。
AI.motivation: 深度学习天气模型虽快且准确，但缺乏不确定性估计，难以支撑极端天气下的高风险决策。
AI.method: 提出NTK-UQ方法，结合理论分析揭示UQ质量受架构影响的两个机制：1）方差坍缩机制（与特征谱集中度相关）；2）分解性能依赖极端事件的非高斯、重尾特性，通过ICA（利用高阶统计量）或SVD（仅二阶）选择规则自动适配架构。
AI.result: NTK-UQ比分裂共形预测在90%覆盖率下预测区间窄31–37%，并能生成随极端事件严重程度自适应缩放的区间；推理仅需单次矩阵-向量乘法，无需重训练。
AI.conclusion: NTK-UQ是一种高效、自适应、架构感知的不确定性量化框架，填补了深度学习天气预报中关键的不确定性缺失问题，特别适用于高风险极端天气场景。

title: Do Real-World Datasets Contain Natural Experiments? An Empirical Study Using Causal Feature Selection
summary: In nature, events that affect some individuals or groups but not others constitute an implicit intervention and are known as natural experiments. For example, the COVID-19 pandemic was an intervention by the coronavirus on the sub-population infected with COVID. We ask, do natural experiments occur in existing real-world datasets? If yes, how should we treat them? To detect natural experiments in data, we use causal discovery to recover the underlying causal graph and perform feature selection based on causal links. If downstream performance improves by treating the data as interventional rather than observational, we argue that this suggests the dataset contains natural experiments. We first validate this hypothesis by simulating datasets with and without natural experiments using synthetic graphs. We then perform a systematic empirical evaluation on a large suite of real-world datasets. Our results indicate that real-world datasets do contain natural experiments and we can take advantage of those natural experiments to improve model performance using causal inference. Our work represents the initial foray into this area, offering a preliminary exploration within a limited scope.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种检测现实世界数据集中自然实验的方法，通过因果发现构建因果图并基于因果关系进行特征选择；若将数据视为干预性而非观测性时下游性能提升，则表明存在自然实验。作者在合成数据和大量真实数据集上验证了该方法的有效性，证实自然实验确实存在于现实数据中，并可利用因果推断提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 探究现实世界数据集中是否存在自然实验（即影响部分个体或群体的隐式干预），以及如何识别和利用这些自然实验来提升建模效果。
AI.method: 使用因果发现方法恢复数据的潜在因果图，并基于因果链接进行特征选择；通过比较将数据视为干预性 vs 观测性时的下游任务性能差异来判断自然实验的存在；在合成数据和真实数据集上系统评估该策略。
AI.result: 实证结果表明，多个真实世界数据集确实包含自然实验，且利用因果推断方法处理这些自然实验能显著提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 现实数据中广泛存在自然实验，识别并利用它们是提升机器学习模型泛化性和鲁棒性的新途径；本工作为该方向提供了初步但重要的探索基础。

title: SPADE: Sketch-guided Path Planning Augmented with Diffusion Experts
summary: Path planning is essential for Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs). Conventional methods for incorporating human preferences into planning typically rely on either complex reward engineering or hardware-intensive solutions. Recent state-of-the-art frameworks leverage imitation learning to train behavior-specific path planning models from expert demonstrations. However, these approaches face two key limitations: limited generalization to unseen environments and low robustness in demonstration collection. To address these challenges, this work introduces an enhanced framework that focuses on two main contributions: an overhauled annotation tool built on ROS 2, and a novel training strategy that integrates diffusion-based augmentation into baseline behavioral cloning models. A dataset of expert demonstrations is provided and evaluated through ablation studies to assess the robustness of the proposed solution. The enhanced approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods with 39.1% lower Absolute Pose Error (APE) and 33.5% lower Fr'echet Inception Distance (FID) while having 93.8% less trainable parameters. Moreover it attains diffusion-level generalization while preserving the real-time, on-edge properties of state-of-the-art models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合ROS 2标注工具与扩散增强行为克隆的新路径规划框架，显著提升泛化性与鲁棒性，同时大幅降低误差、计算开销和参数量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖复杂奖励工程或硬件密集型方案；基于模仿学习的方法在未见环境泛化性和示范采集鲁棒性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 构建基于ROS 2的改进标注工具，并在行为克隆模型中引入扩散模型进行数据增强。
AI.result: 相比SOTA方法，绝对位姿误差（APE）降低39.1%，Fréchet Inception Distance（FID）降低33.5%，可训练参数减少93.8%，并保持实时边缘部署能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架在保证实时性的同时，实现了类扩散模型的泛化能力，有效缓解了模仿学习在AMR路径规划中的泛化与鲁棒性瓶颈。

title: SenseJudge: Human-Centric Preference-Driven Judgment Framework
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) as judges across various scenarios such as assessing model responses is becoming an increasingly accepted paradigm. However, existing judgment approaches often rely on trained judgers using fixed preference data, which tend to overlook diverse user preferences and struggle to adapt to real-world human-AI dialogue scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose SenseJudge, a customizable judgment framework driven by human preferences and SenseBench, a diverse and challenging instruction-following benchmark derived from real-world multi-turn interactions. We applied the automatic judgment framework and benchmark to two tasks: (1) LLMs as personalized judges, and (2) model ranking. We conducted extensive experiments, and the results demonstrate that the SenseJudge framework surpasses other judgment methods and models in the LLMs-as-personalized-judges task and achieves model ranking that aligns with real human sense. Additionally, we conducted analyses on position bias and consistency, alongside ablation studies, which affirmed the robustness of SenseJudge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SenseJudge，一个基于人类偏好的可定制化大模型评判框架，以及SenseBench，一个源自真实多轮人机对话的多样化指令遵循评测基准，显著提升了个性化评判与模型排序的准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型评判方法依赖固定偏好数据，忽视用户多样性，难以适应真实人机对话场景。
AI.method: 提出SenseJudge可定制化评判框架和SenseBench真实多轮交互基准，并应用于个性化评判与模型排序两项任务。
AI.result: SenseJudge在个性化评判任务中优于其他方法，在模型排序上更贴近人类判断；位置偏差与一致性分析及消融实验验证其鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SenseJudge通过融合人类偏好与真实对话数据，有效提升了大模型作为评判者的适应性、个性化与可信度。

title: GLINT: Sparsely Gated Vision-Language Alignment for Fine-Grained Radiology Representations
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) for radiology have emerged as a scalable paradigm by leveraging image-report pairs naturally produced in clinical workflows. However, this pairing reveals a mismatch in scale: each finding occupies only a small region of the image, yet supervision is provided only at the global image-report level. This poses a central challenge: prior approaches spread weight densely across all patches rather than concentrating on the sparse subset relevant to a given query. To address this, we present GLINT (Gated Language-Image alignmeNT), a framework that explicitly models this sparse correspondence. On the alignment side, we introduce Sparsely Gated Alignment, a novel architecture in which a sigmoid gate over a separate gate embedding space activates only the patches relevant to each textual query, enforcing explicit sparsity. On the representation side, we add Dense Feature Regularization, which anchors the trainable encoder's intermediate features to a frozen self-supervised learning (SSL) teacher, preserving the fine-grained patch features that the gate relies on. The same recipe applies to both 2D chest X-ray (CXR) and 3D chest computed tomography (CT), built with DINOv3 and V-JEPA 2.1, respectively. GLINT enables zero-shot classification, grounding, and segmentation from free-text queries, and to our knowledge is the first to demonstrate zero-shot segmentation on 3D CT volumes without mask supervision. Notably, the most pronounced gains arise on zero-shot grounding and segmentation, where sparse, query-specific localization is required, consistent with our design intent. In downstream evaluation, GLINT outperforms both SSL encoders and medical VLMs on classification, report generation, and segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLINT框架，通过稀疏门控对齐和密集特征正则化，解决放射学视觉-语言模型中图像局部发现与全局图文配对监督之间的尺度不匹配问题，首次实现无需掩码监督的3D CT零样本分割。
AI.motivation: 放射学视觉-语言模型面临图像局部发现（小区域）与全局图文配对监督之间的尺度不匹配问题，导致现有方法无法精准定位查询相关的图像区域。
AI.method: 提出GLINT框架：1）稀疏门控对齐（Sparsely Gated Alignment），用sigmoid门控机制在独立嵌入空间中仅激活与文本查询相关的图像块；2）密集特征正则化（Dense Feature Regularization），将可训练编码器中间特征锚定至冻结的自监督教师模型（DINOv3/V-JEPA 2.1），保留细粒度patch特征。
AI.result: GLINT在2D CXR和3D CT上均有效，首次实现无掩码监督的3D CT零样本分割；在零样本定位与分割任务上提升最显著；下游任务（分类、报告生成、分割）性能优于SSL编码器和现有医学VLM。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模图文稀疏对应关系是提升放射学VLM细粒度理解能力的关键，GLINT为零样本细粒度视觉理解提供了通用且可扩展的框架。

title: A Nonmonotone Gradient-Based Algorithm for Symmetric Nonnegative Matrix Factorization and Graph Clustering
summary: Symmetric nonnegative matrix factorization (Symmetric NMF) approximates a matrix as $WW^T$ with nonnegative rectangular factor $W$. It has broad applications in graph clustering and machine learning. In contrast to the NMF, projected gradient methods for the symmetric problem had been associated with slow convergence. To address this, we introduce SNMPBB, the first adaptation of nonmonotone projected Barzilai-Borwein methods to Symmetric NMF, demonstrating that gradient algorithms are significantly more effective than previously understood. We further extend SNMPBB to graph clustering using the graph Laplacian regularization (Graph-SNMPBB) and to large problems with low-rank approximations (LAI-SNMPBB). For all variants we prove global convergence to first-order stationary points and also that Barzilai-Borwein curvature information is preserved with randomized approximations. On synthetic data, SNMPBB achieves 6 times speedup over the alternative SymANLS for similar residuals, with advantages growing at higher ranks. Across six real-world clustering benchmarks, Graph-SNMPBB matches or exceeds SymANLS accuracy. Lastly, LAI-SNMPBB outperforms state-of-the-art LAI-SymPGNCG on 34 SuiteSparse matrices in both runtime and residual quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SNMPBB算法，首次将非单调投影Barzilai-Borwein方法应用于对称非负矩阵分解（Symmetric NMF），显著提升收敛速度；并拓展出Graph-SNMPBB（结合图拉普拉斯正则化）和LAI-SNMPBB（低秩近似加速）两种变体，在合成与真实数据上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 对称NMF传统上使用投影梯度法收敛慢，亟需更高效、理论保障强的优化算法。
AI.method: 提出基于非单调线搜索与Barzilai-Borwein步长的投影梯度法SNMPBB；进一步引入图拉普拉斯正则化得Graph-SNMPBB，结合随机低秩近似得LAI-SNMPBB；所有变体均证明全局收敛至一阶稳定点，并保持BB曲率信息。
AI.result: 在合成数据上SNMPBB比SymANLS快6倍；在6个真实图聚类任务中Graph-SNMPBB精度持平或超越SymANLS；在34个SuiteSparse矩阵上LAI-SNMPBB在运行时间和残差质量上均优于LAI-SymPGNCG。
AI.conclusion: SNMPBB及其变体为对称NMF提供了高效、鲁棒且理论完备的新优化框架，显著推动其在图聚类与大规模学习中的实用化。

title: Distilling Answer-Set Programming Rules from LLMs for Neurosymbolic Visual Question Answering
comment: Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) is the task of answering questions about images, requiring the integration of multimodal input and reasoning. Modular approaches that incorporate logic-based representations into the reasoning component offer clear advantages over end-to-end trained systems, particularly in terms of interpretability. However, adapting or extending these representations when task requirements change can place a significant burden on developers. To address this challenge, we present an approach for distilling rules from Large Language Models (LLMs). Our method prompts an LLM to extend an initial VQA reasoning theory, expressed as an answer-set program, to meet new requirements of the task. Examples from VQA datasets guide the LLM, validate the results, and help correct erroneous rules by leveraging feedback from the ASP solver. We demonstrate that our approach is effective across diverse VQA datasets. Notably, only a few examples are needed to elicit correct rules from LLMs. Our experiments suggest that rule distillation from LLMs is a promising alternative to traditional data-driven rule learning approaches. Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从大语言模型（LLM）中蒸馏逻辑规则的方法，用于增强视觉问答（VQA）中的可解释推理，仅需少量示例即可生成正确规则。
AI.motivation: 现有基于逻辑的模块化VQA方法虽具可解释性，但当任务需求变化时，人工修改或扩展逻辑表示负担重。
AI.method: 利用LLM根据VQA数据集示例，扩展初始的Answer-Set Programming（ASP）推理理论；通过ASP求解器反馈验证和修正生成的规则。
AI.result: 该方法在多个VQA数据集上有效，仅需少量示例即可引导LLM生成正确规则，并优于传统数据驱动的规则学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 从LLM中蒸馏规则是一种有前景的、可扩展且低样本依赖的可解释VQA推理新范式。

title: Bionic Human-Motion Style Transfer for Physically Executable Whole-Body Control of Humanoid Robots
summary: Expressive whole-body motion is important for humanoid robots operating in human environments, where robots are expected to move stably while presenting readable and adjustable body behaviors. However, most expressive motions are still obtained from fixed demonstrations or manually designed scripts, making it difficult to reuse a demonstrated style across different motion contents. Inspired by the way human motion styles convey affective and intentional cues through gait rhythm, posture, arm swing and body sway, this paper proposes a bionic generation-to-control framework for exemplar-driven style transfer on humanoid robots. Given a short human style exemplar and a target content motion, the proposed framework generates a stylized whole-body reference that preserves the intended motion content while transferring the demonstrated style. A physics-aware multi-condition latent diffusion model is developed to fuse style, content and trajectory conditions, and classifier-free guidance is used to adjust the style intensity without retraining. To improve hardware executability, contact-consistency and temporal-smoothness regularization are imposed on decoded motions during training. The generated references are then converted into G1-compatible robot references and executed by a preview-based whole-body tracking policy trained with a cluster-and-distill strategy. Simulation and Unitree G1 experiments show that the proposed method can transfer short human style exemplars to diverse robot motion contents, reduce contact and jitter artifacts compared with animation-oriented style-transfer baselines, and achieve a 96.0% success rate over 125 reported real-robot trials. The results demonstrate the feasibility of using short human motion exemplars as reusable bionic sources for physically executable expressive humanoid motion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种仿生的生成-控制框架，用于人形机器人上的示例驱动风格迁移，通过短时人类风格示例实现多样化、物理可执行的全身表达性运动。
AI.motivation: 现有表达性运动多依赖固定演示或手动设计脚本，难以跨不同动作内容复用风格；而人类可通过步态节奏、姿态、摆臂和身体摇摆等传递情感与意图线索，启发本文构建可复用、可调节、物理可行的风格迁移方法。
AI.method: 提出基于多条件潜在扩散模型的生成框架，融合风格、内容与轨迹条件，采用无分类器引导调节风格强度，并引入接触一致性与时间平滑性正则化提升硬件可执行性；生成的参考轨迹经G1兼容转换后，由预览式全身跟踪策略执行，该策略通过聚类-蒸馏方式训练。
AI.result: 在仿真与Unitree G1实机实验中，该方法能将短时人类风格示例迁移至多种机器人动作内容，相比动画导向基线显著减少接触异常与抖动，实机125次试验成功率达96.0%。
AI.conclusion: 短时人类运动示例可作为可复用的仿生源，支撑物理可执行、高表达性的人形机器人全身运动生成。

title: MemTrain: Self-Supervised Context Memory Training
summary: Memory is an indispensable capability for long-horizon LLM agents, enabling them to preserve and utilize information accumulated across extended interactions. Existing memory-agent approaches are typically trained end-to-end with reinforcement learning on downstream tasks. However, collecting high-quality annotated problems for memory-intensive scenarios is costly, and the resulting training data often lack sufficient diversity to cover general memory behaviors. In this work, we propose MemTrain, a self-supervised training framework for generally enhancing the context-memory capability of LLM agents for more effective downstream post-training. MemTrain introduces two coupled proxy tasks over unlabeled Wikipedia corpora: (1) an end-to-end masked reconstruction objective, which requires the model to recover masked entities after multiple rounds of memory updates, thereby encouraging memory maintenance from the final outcome perspective; and (2) an intermediate memory recall objective, which requires the model to reconstruct masked historical information using intermediate memory states, encouraging faithful compression and memory completeness throughout the interaction process. The two objectives are jointly optimized using GRPO. Extensive experiments on long-text QA and search-based QA benchmarks demonstrate that MemTrain consistently improves downstream memory-intensive reasoning performance across different models, achieving gains of up to 17.67 points over direct task-specific post-training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MemTrain，一种自监督训练框架，通过在无标签维基百科语料上设计两个耦合代理任务（端到端掩码重建与中间记忆召回），提升大语言模型代理的通用上下文记忆能力，显著增强其在长程推理任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的端到端记忆代理训练依赖高质量标注数据，成本高、多样性不足，难以泛化到各类记忆行为。
AI.method: 提出MemTrain框架，包含两个自监督代理任务：(1) 端到端掩码重建（多轮记忆更新后恢复被掩码实体）；(2) 中间记忆召回（利用中间记忆状态重建历史被掩码信息）；二者联合使用GRPO优化。
AI.result: 在长文本问答和搜索式问答基准上，MemTrain显著提升下游记忆密集型推理性能，相较直接任务微调最高提升17.67分。
AI.conclusion: MemTrain通过自监督方式有效增强LLM代理的通用记忆能力，无需人工标注，具备良好泛化性与实用性。

title: Reinforcement Learning from Cross-domain Videos with Video Prediction Model
summary: Reinforcement learning from expert videos across visually distinct domains is challenging due to the absence of reward signals and the presence of domain gaps. We introduce XIPER (Cross-domain Video Prediction Reward), a reward model for learning from expert videos collected in a visually different domain, where the agent's appearance differs due to factors such as color, morphology, or the sim-to-real gap. More specifically, XIPER trains a cross-domain video prediction model that maps agent observations into the expert domain and uses the prediction likelihood as a reward signal. Experiments on the DMC Color Suite (8 tasks) and DMC Body Suite (3 tasks) show that XIPER consistently outperforms baselines despite domain gaps such as differences in agent color and morphology. We further analyze XIPER on a sim-to-real transfer dataset, demonstrating that it produces meaningful reward signals for real-robot observations given only simulated expert videos. Code, pretrained models, datasets and video demonstrations can be found on our project webpage: https://sites.google.com/view/xiper

AI.tldr: XIPER是一种跨域视频预测奖励模型，用于从视觉差异显著的专家视频中进行强化学习，通过将智能体观测映射到专家域并以预测似然作为奖励信号，在DMC Color/Body Suite及sim-to-real迁移任务中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 解决在缺乏显式奖励信号且存在视觉域差异（如颜色、形态、sim-to-real差距）下，如何从专家视频中有效学习的问题。
AI.method: 提出XIPER：训练一个跨域视频预测模型，将智能体观测图像映射至专家视频所在域，并用该映射的预测似然作为稠密奖励信号。
AI.result: 在DMC Color Suite（8任务）和Body Suite（3任务）上持续超越基线；在sim-to-real迁移数据集上验证了其能为真实机器人观测生成有意义的奖励信号。
AI.conclusion: XIPER提供了一种无需对齐、无需领域先验的通用跨域视频奖励建模方法，提升了基于视频示范的强化学习在现实场景中的适用性。

title: Multi-Modal Machine Learning for Breast Cancer Recurrence Prediction
summary: Breast cancer recurrence, a leading cause of long-term mortality among survivors, requires timely and accurate risk assessment to guide follow-up care and treatment planning. Traditional predictive models, often limited to either structured or unstructured data alone, struggle to capture the full clinical context. This study examines the impact of integrating multi-modal clinical data, including treatment records, pathology reports, and clinician notes, on recurrence prediction. By integrating a rule-based regular expression extraction mechanism with a rigorous precedence-based conflict reconciliation strategy, our approach effectively recovers definitive tumor characteristics from free-text pathology narratives to augment structured records. We also benchmark performance against commonly used feature sets from prior breast cancer studies to assess the added value of multi-modal integration. Single-source and multi-modal inputs are evaluated across a range of machine learning models. Results show that multi-modal integration consistently improves predictive accuracy compared to single-modal methods.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过整合多模态临床数据（如治疗记录、病理报告和医生笔记），结合规则驱动的文本信息提取与冲突消解策略，显著提升了乳腺癌复发风险预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统预测模型通常仅使用结构化或非结构化数据中的一种，难以全面捕捉临床背景，导致复发风险评估不准确，影响随访和治疗决策。
AI.method: 提出一种融合规则基础的正则表达式信息抽取机制与基于优先级的冲突消解策略，从自由文本病理报告中提取确定性肿瘤特征，并与结构化数据融合；在多种机器学习模型上对比单模态与多模态输入的性能。
AI.result: 多模态数据整合在所有测试模型中均持续提升预测准确率，优于单一数据源方法；且相较既往研究常用特征集展现出额外价值。
AI.conclusion: 多模态临床数据的系统性整合可有效增强乳腺癌复发预测模型的性能，为精准风险分层和个体化随访提供新路径。

title: A Negative Result on Cross-Model Activation Transfer in a Pythia Multi-Hop Setting
summary: Recent work shows that language models can transmit behavioural traits through hidden signals in generated data during training. We ask whether a more direct and stricter channel is also viable: can one language model communicate useful intermediate reasoning state to another at inference time by translating and injecting hidden activations, rather than by passing natural-language text? We test this question in a controlled Pythia-160M to Pythia-410M multi-hop reasoning setting. A linear translation layer learns a strong normalized-space map between sender and receiver hidden states, with normalized cosine similarity near 0.97 across seeds. However, when the translated activations are injected into the receiver at inference time, they do not improve downstream answering. Low-strength additive injection remains near the no-injection baseline, with confidence intervals that cross zero. Replacement-style injection is consistently destructive, and rescaling translated vectors to the receiver hidden-state norm does not rescue performance. The result is therefore a scoped negative result: in this setting, offline representational alignment is not sufficient for useful causal communication inside the receiver.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了语言模型之间能否通过直接注入隐藏激活（而非自然语言文本）来传递推理状态，实验表明尽管隐藏状态可被高精度映射，但注入后并未提升下游任务性能，说明表征对齐不足以实现有效的因果通信。
AI.motivation: 探索语言模型间是否存在比自然语言更直接、更严格的通信通道，即通过翻译并注入隐藏激活来传递中间推理状态。
AI.method: 在Pythia-160M（发送端）到Pythia-410M（接收端）的多跳推理设定中，使用线性层学习隐藏状态间的归一化空间映射，并尝试加性注入和替换式注入 translated 激活。
AI.result: 隐藏状态映射的归一化余弦相似度达0.97，但注入后下游回答性能未提升：加性注入效果不显著（置信区间含零），替换式注入始终有害，重缩放亦无效。
AI.conclusion: 离线表征对齐本身不足以支持接收模型内部产生有用的因果通信，该结果为特定设定下的限定性否定结论。

title: Static and Dynamic Representations for Tactile Contact-Angle Estimation with Event-Based Sensors
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures. Submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RAL), under review
summary: Event-based tactile sensing offers low-latency signal acquisition for contact-rich robotic interaction. This paper investigates contact-angle estimation using event streams from an event-based tactile sensor (NeuroTac) and compares three event-derived spatial contour representations: a dynamic representation capturing recent event activity, a static representation recovering a more persistent contact state, and their combined representation. Across the evaluated motion scenarios, all representation pipelines exhibited P99 processing latency below 10 ms at all tested sampling intervals, demonstrating their potential for high-frequency event-based tactile angle estimation in robotic manipulation. The static representation consistently achieved marginally better performance than the dynamic and combined representations under scenario-specific training, yielding a mean overall MAE of 0.160° during continuous sensor rolling and a stop-phase mean MAE of 0.251° during randomly inserted motion interruptions. It also exhibited smaller performance fluctuations across speed and indentation depth variations than the other two representations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于事件的触觉传感器（NeuroTac）在接触角度估计中的应用，比较了三种事件衍生的空间轮廓表示方法（动态、静态及组合），发现静态表示在精度和鲁棒性上最优，且所有方法均满足低于10ms的P99处理延迟，适用于高频机器人操作。
AI.motivation: 事件驱动的触觉感知具有低延迟优势，但如何从事件流中高精度、低延迟地估计接触角度仍需探索，尤其在复杂运动场景下。
AI.method: 提出并比较三种事件衍生的空间轮廓表示：动态表示（捕捉近期事件活动）、静态表示（恢复更持久的接触状态）及其组合表示；在NeuroTac传感器数据上评估其在不同运动场景（如连续滚动、随机中断）下的角度估计性能。
AI.result: 所有表示方法P99处理延迟均<10ms；静态表示在场景特异性训练下表现最优：连续滚动时平均MAE为0.160°，停止阶段为0.251°，且对速度和压入深度变化更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 静态空间轮廓表示在事件驱动的接触角度估计中兼具高精度、低延迟与强鲁棒性，是面向实时机器人操作的优选方案。

title: AI Rater Discrimination Depends on Scoring Protocol in Complex Clinical Decision-Making
comment: 11 pages, 4 main figures, 8 supplementary figures, 9 supplementary tables
summary: Clinical AI evaluation increasingly delegates scoring to large language models (LLMs) acting as AI raters, yet their scoring behavior across evaluation conditions has not been quantitatively characterized. We address this gap through a factorial study of AI rater behavior in adult type 2 diabetes (T2D) pharmacotherapy at 12-month outpatient follow-up, a clinical task involving complex decision-making operationalized across seven evaluation questions. Four open-source LLMs served simultaneously as clinical decision support system (CDSS) models and AI raters. Each CDSS output was scored under two scoring protocols: a rubric-anchored Gold Rubric (GR) protocol incorporating a patient-specific rubric, and a rubric-free Non Gold Rubric (Non-GR) protocol. Linear mixed effects models crossed the scoring protocol factor with five design factors -- CDSS model, CDSS prompt configuration (document-referenced generation [DRG] vs.\ Baseline), rater model, prompt character, and prompt type -- and estimated main effects together with their protocol interactions. Across all questions, AI raters yielded consistently higher scores within a very narrow range (74--78 points on average) under Non-GR compared to those under GR (7.69 to 49.64 points lower mean scores; 1.68 to 3.67 times wider interquartile ranges). Within each question, GR amplified the AI rater's discrimination between DRG and Baseline CDSS outputs by factors of 1.76 to 5.10, while also revealing substantial behavioral variation across rater models that Non-GR suppressed. These findings support rubric anchoring as the scoring protocol that preserves discriminative power in clinical AI evaluation; rubric-free scoring cannot substitute when questions require patient-specific or jurisdiction-specific criteria that rater models cannot infer from parametric knowledge alone.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过因子实验分析了四种开源大语言模型（LLMs）作为AI评分员在成人2型糖尿病药物治疗评估中的评分行为，比较了基于患者特异性评分标准的‘金标准评分协议’（GR）与无评分标准的‘非金标准协议’（Non-GR）的效果。结果表明：GR显著提升了评分区分度，尤其在区分不同提示配置（DRG vs. Baseline）的CDSS输出时效果明显；而Non-GR导致评分偏高、离散度大且掩盖模型间差异，不适用于需患者或地区特异性判断的临床评估任务。
AI.motivation: 当前临床AI评估中越来越多使用大语言模型（LLM）作为AI评分员，但其在不同评分条件下的行为尚未被系统量化分析，尤其缺乏对评分协议影响的实证研究。
AI.method: 开展一项因子实验，使用4种开源LLM同时作为临床决策支持系统（CDSS）和AI评分员，在12个月T2D门诊随访场景下，针对7个评估问题，分别采用金标准评分协议（GR，含患者特异性评分标准）与非金标准协议（Non-GR，无评分标准）进行评分；通过线性混合效应模型分析评分协议与5个设计因素（CDSS模型、提示配置、评分员模型、提示字符、提示类型）的主效应及交互效应。
AI.result: Non-GR评分普遍偏高（平均74–78分），比GR低7.69–49.64分，且四分位距宽1.68–3.67倍；GR显著增强AI评分员对DRG与Baseline CDSS输出的区分能力（提升1.76–5.10倍），并揭示评分员模型间的实质性行为差异，而Non-GR则压制该差异。
AI.conclusion: 基于评分标准的GR协议能有效保留临床AI评估中的判别力，而无标准的Non-GR评分无法替代GR，尤其当评估问题涉及患者特异性或地域特异性标准时——这些标准无法仅靠LLM的参数化知识推断。

title: Follow-Your-Preference++: Rethinking Preference Alignment for Image Inpainting
comment: 23 pages, 14 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2509.23082
summary: We study preference alignment for image inpainting. Rather than proposing yet another method, we revisit the problem from first principles and reassess its core challenges. We adopt the widely used direct preference optimization framework and construct preference training data with publicly available reward models. Our empirical study spans nine reward models, two benchmarks, and two baseline inpainting models that differ in architecture and generative mechanism. Our main findings are: (1) Most reward models provide valid signals for preference data construction, although some are unreliable as evaluators. (2) Across models and benchmarks, preference data exhibits consistent trends under both candidate and sample scaling. (3) Reward models display pronounced biases--particularly in brightness, composition, and color scheme--that make them prone to inducing reward hacking. (4) A simple ensemble of reward models mitigates such biases and yields robust, generalizable performance. {\color{rebuttal_blue}(5) Preference alignment is transferable to the object removal task, where the goal shifts from open-ended creative generation to coherent background completion. (6) Further analysis reveals that a calibrated ensemble method further mitigates hacking and improves robustness.} Without modifying model architectures or introducing additional datasets, our models substantially outperform prior state-of-the-art models on standard metrics, large vision-language model evaluations, and human assessments. Our code is available at: https://github.com/shenytzzz/Follow-Your-Preference.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了图像修复中的偏好对齐问题，通过使用多个公开奖励模型构建偏好数据，并发现奖励模型存在亮度、构图和色彩方案等偏差，易导致奖励作弊；提出简单且校准的奖励模型集成方法可有效缓解偏差、提升鲁棒性与泛化性，并在标准指标、多模态大模型评估及人工评估中显著超越现有最优方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复方法多聚焦于新架构设计，而忽视了偏好对齐这一核心挑战的本质；本文旨在从第一性原理出发，系统评估奖励模型在偏好数据构建中的可靠性与偏差，探索更稳健、可迁移的对齐策略。
AI.method: 采用直接偏好优化（DPO）框架，利用九种公开奖励模型在两个基准和两种不同架构/生成机制的修复模型上构建偏好训练数据；分析候选数与采样规模的影响；提出并验证简单及校准的奖励模型集成方法以缓解偏差。
AI.result: 发现多数奖励模型可提供有效偏好信号但存在显著偏差（亮度、构图、色彩）；偏好数据趋势具有一致性；集成方法显著缓解奖励黑客行为，提升模型在标准指标、VLM评估和人工评估上的性能；该对齐方法可迁移至物体移除任务。
AI.conclusion: 偏好对齐的关键不在于模型结构创新，而在于高质量、去偏好的偏好数据构建；校准的多奖励模型集成是一种高效、通用且无需额外数据或架构修改的对齐策略，能显著提升图像修复质量与鲁棒性。

title: Fast Unlearning at Scale via Margin Self-Correction
summary: Language-model unlearning updates a trained model to behave as if it had not seen selected training examples, while preserving utility and avoiding costly retraining. Existing approaches typically fine-tune the pretrained model with a fixed training budget and select the final model afterwards by evaluating several saved checkpoints on downstream validation data. Two sources of unnecessary computation limit scalability: training beyond the desired forget-retain trade-off, and checkpoint selection that requires extra storage and repeated evaluations. To address these limitations, we introduce MArgin Self-Correction (MASC), an efficient unlearning method with an online stopping rule that does not require downstream evaluation. Given a text sequence to be forgotten, MASC actively reduces the logit gap between the original next token and the most likely alternatives. It outputs a final model once this gap is small on average over a sufficiently large proportion of token positions across all forget sequences. On TOFU, MUSE News, and MUSE Books, MASC achieves a competitive forget-retain trade-off at a fraction of the computational cost of existing baselines. We further observe that as we increase model size (a.k.a. number of parameters), the trade-offs improve for both MASC and SimNPO -- the forget metrics remain comparable while retain utility increases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MASC方法，通过在线停止规则实现高效语言模型遗忘学习，无需下游验证，显著降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有遗忘学习方法存在计算浪费问题：训练超出所需遗忘-保留权衡点，且需额外存储和重复评估检查点。
AI.method: MArgin Self-Correction（MASC）：针对待遗忘文本序列，主动缩小原始下一个token与最可能替代token之间的logit差距；当该差距在足够大比例的token位置上平均变小时，自动终止训练。
AI.result: 在TOFU、MUSE News和MUSE Books数据集上，MASC以远低于基线方法的计算成本实现了有竞争力的遗忘-保留权衡；且随模型参数量增大，遗忘效果保持稳定，保留效用提升。
AI.conclusion: MASC是一种高效、可扩展的语言模型遗忘学习方法，解决了现有方法中冗余训练与验证的问题，并展现出良好的模型规模可扩展性。

title: LEAP: Supercharging LLMs for Formal Mathematics with Agentic Frameworks
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit strong informal mathematical reasoning but struggle to generate mechanically verifiable proofs in formal languages like Lean. We present LEAP, an agentic framework that enables general-purpose foundation models to achieve state-of-the-art performance on automated formal theorem proving. LEAP leverages foundation model capabilities, such as informal reasoning, instruction following, and iterative self-refinement. By decomposing complex problems into smaller units, the system bridges formal proof construction with informal blueprints through continuous interaction with the Lean compiler. To provide a rigorous evaluation beyond increasingly saturated benchmarks, we introduce Lean-IMO-Bench, a benchmark of IMO-style problems formalized in Lean, with short statements yet highly non-routine and multi-step proofs across a wide range of difficulty levels. Empirically, on the latest 2025 Putnam Competition, an annual mathematics competition for undergraduate students in North America, LEAP solves all 12 problems, matching recent breakthroughs by frontier formal mathematical models. On Lean-IMO-Bench, LEAP boosts the one-shot formal solve rate of general-purpose LLMs from below 10% to 70%, notably surpassing the 48% benchmark set by a specialized, gold-medal-caliber IMO system. Furthermore, we demonstrate LEAP's research-level utility by autonomously formalizing complex proofs for open combinatorial challenges, including a verified proof for a key subproblem in Knuth's Hamiltonian decomposition of even-order Cayley graphs.

AI.tldr: LEAP是一个基于大语言模型的智能体框架，通过结合非形式化推理、指令遵循与自我迭代优化，显著提升在Lean等形式化证明系统中的定理证明能力，并在多个数学竞赛和研究级问题上取得突破性成果。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在非形式化数学推理上表现强劲，但在生成可机械验证的形式化证明（如Lean）方面存在明显短板；现有基准逐渐饱和，缺乏更具挑战性和真实性的评估标准。
AI.method: 提出LEAP智能体框架，利用基础模型的非形式化推理、指令遵循和自迭代精炼能力，将复杂问题分解为子任务，并通过与Lean编译器持续交互，实现非形式化蓝图到形式化证明的桥梁构建；同时构建新基准Lean-IMO-Bench用于更严格评估。
AI.result: 在2025年Putnam竞赛12道题中全部求解成功；在Lean-IMO-Bench上将通用LLM单次形式化解题率从低于10%提升至70%，超越专用于IMO的金牌级系统（48%）；并自主形式化验证了Knuth关于偶阶Cayley图哈密顿分解的关键子问题。
AI.conclusion: LEAP证明了通用基础模型通过智能体架构与形式化工具深度协同，可在高难度数学定理证明中达到甚至超越专用系统性能，为AI驱动的数学研究提供了新范式。

title: NVIDIA Isaac Sim: Enabling Scalable, GPU-Accelerated Simulation for Robotics
summary: Simulation has become a core infrastructure for robotics research. Unlike previous simulators, NVIDIA Isaac Sim leverages GPU acceleration to enable large-scale parallel training and physics-accurate modeling. Its synthetic data generation pipeline alleviates the scarcity of high-quality training data, supporting data-driven robot learning and large-scale simulation-centric experimentation. However, existing surveys often treat it as one simulator among many, without a systematic analysis of its architectural characteristics, usage patterns, and limitations. This survey reviews Isaac Sim from system and application perspectives, outlining its architecture and comparing it with widely used simulators. We analyze representative studies across five major domains and summarize common usage patterns, particularly in data generation and high-fidelity simulation. We also outline key future directions and challenges, including physics open-world learning, simulation-centric training and practical usability constraints.

AI.tldr: This survey provides a systematic analysis of NVIDIA Isaac Sim, focusing on its architecture, usage patterns, and limitations, while comparing it with other simulators and identifying future research directions.
AI.motivation: Existing surveys treat NVIDIA Isaac Sim as just one among many simulators without systematically analyzing its architectural characteristics, usage patterns, and limitations.
AI.method: The survey reviews Isaac Sim from both system and application perspectives, outlines its architecture, compares it with widely used simulators, analyzes representative studies across five major domains, and summarizes common usage patterns.
AI.result: The survey outlines Isaac Sim's architecture, identifies common usage patterns—especially in data generation and high-fidelity simulation—and highlights key future directions and challenges such as physics open-world learning, simulation-centric training, and practical usability constraints.
AI.conclusion: NVIDIA Isaac Sim is a powerful, GPU-accelerated robotics simulator enabling large-scale parallel training and physics-accurate modeling; however, a deeper understanding of its architecture, usage, and limitations is essential to fully leverage its potential and guide future development.

title: Sample-Size Scaling of the African Languages NLI Evaluation
comment: Accepted at the AfricaNLP Workshop, EACL 2026
summary: African languages have very little labelled data, and it is unclear if augmenting the quantity of annotation data reliably enhances downstream performance. The study is a systematic sample-size scaling study of natural language inference (NLI) on 16 African languages based on the AfriXNLI benchmark. Under controlled conditions, two multilingual transformer models with roughly 0.6B parameters XLM-R Large fine-tuned on XNLI and AfroXLM-R Large are tested on sample sizes of between 50 and 500 labeled examples and average their results across random subsampling runs. As opposed to the usual belief of monotonic increase with increased data, we find a strongly language sensitive and often non-monotonic scaling behavior. Some languages show early saturation or decrease in performance with sample size as well as high variance in low resource regimes. These results indicate that the volume of data is not enough to guarantee stable profits to African NLI, creating the necessity of language sensitive datasets creation and stronger multi-lingual modelling strategies.

AI.tldr: This paper conducts a systematic study on how varying sample sizes affect natural language inference (NLI) performance for 16 African languages, revealing non-monotonic and language-sensitive scaling behaviors—challenging the assumption that more labeled data always improves performance.
AI.motivation: African languages suffer from severe lack of labeled data, and it is unclear whether simply increasing annotation quantity reliably improves downstream NLI performance.
AI.method: A sample-size scaling study on AfriXNLI benchmark across 16 African languages; evaluates XLM-R Large (fine-tuned on XNLI) and AfroXLM-R Large under controlled settings with 50–500 labeled examples per language, averaging over multiple random subsampling runs.
AI.result: Performance scaling is strongly language-dependent and often non-monotonic—some languages saturate early or even degrade with more data, and low-resource regimes show high variance.
AI.conclusion: Data volume alone does not guarantee stable gains in African NLI; language-sensitive dataset curation and improved multilingual modeling strategies are urgently needed.

title: MemoGen: Can Past Experience Improve Future Text-to-Image Generation?
summary: Modern text-to-image models have achieved strong visual synthesis, yet remain unreliable when prompts require implicit visual constraints, relational reasoning, or external knowledge. Existing retrieval-augmented and agentic generation methods mitigate this issue by acquiring external knowledge, references, or refined prompts for the current request, yet they typically treat each generation as an isolated episode and do not systematically preserve past successes or failures for future use. In this work, we ask whether a text-to-image system can continually improve from its own generation experience without updating the underlying generator. We propose MemoGen, a training-free framework that augments existing image generators with an agentic evolution layer. For each task, MemoGen explicitly infers visual requirements, retrieves external evidence and references when necessary, translates them into executable generation constraints, evaluates the generated result, and stores task understanding, reference choices, visual feedback, successful strategies, and failure lessons as reusable experience memory. Across evolution rounds, the agent retrieves relevant experience to improve similar future generations, selectively repairing previously failed cases while preserving successful ones, thereby enabling test-time self-evolution without parameter updates. Extensive experiments on knowledge-intensive and reasoning-oriented benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of this paradigm: after only two evolution rounds, MemoGen built upon the open-source Qwen-Image backbone surpasses strong proprietary systems such as Nano Banana Pro and GPT-Image-1 on WISE and Mind-Bench, showing that explicit experience memory can serve as a powerful continual learning signal for reliable text-to-image generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MemoGen框架，通过在现有图像生成器上添加无训练的智能体进化层，使文本到图像系统能够在测试时通过经验记忆持续自我进化，无需更新模型参数。
AI.motivation: 现代文本到图像模型在处理隐含视觉约束、关系推理或需外部知识的提示时仍不可靠；现有方法未系统保存和复用历史成功/失败经验。
AI.method: MemoGen是一个无训练框架，为图像生成器添加一个智能体进化层：对每个任务显式推断视觉需求、按需检索外部证据与参考、转化为可执行生成约束、评估结果，并将任务理解、参考选择、视觉反馈、成功策略与失败教训存为可复用的经验记忆；在多轮进化中，智能体检索相关经验以改进后续生成，选择性修复失败案例并保留成功案例。
AI.result: 在知识密集型与推理导向基准（WISE、Mind-Bench）上，仅经两轮进化，基于开源Qwen-Image的MemoGen即超越Nano Banana Pro和GPT-Image-1等强闭源系统。
AI.conclusion: 显式经验记忆可作为文本到图像生成中强大的持续学习信号，实现无需参数更新的测试时自我进化，显著提升生成可靠性。

title: Hierarchical RBF-KAN and RBF-SKAN Architectures for Multidimensional Function Approximation and Random Field Learning
summary: In this manuscript, we propose and analyze hierarchical Kolmogorov--Arnold neural network architectures employing radial basis functions as activation functions for approximating deterministic functions and random field models. Specifically, we develop a hierarchical radial-basis-function Kolmogorov--Arnold network (hierarchical RBF-KAN) for multidimensional deterministic function approximation and a hierarchical radial-basis-function stochastic Kolmogorov--Arnold network (hierarchical RBF-SKAN) for random field learning. From a theoretical perspective, we establish universal approximation results for both architectures. In particular, we derive quantitative approximation estimates for the hierarchical RBF-KAN, showing that the proposed framework has the potential to partially alleviate the curse of dimensionality in learning high-dimensional functions by reducing the effective dimensionality of the approximation problem. Furthermore, we show that the hierarchical RBF-SKAN can approximate random field models under the Wasserstein-2 metric. Empirically, we show that our proposed radial-basis-function-based neural network structure could effectively learn multivariate functions and random field models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并分析了基于径向基函数（RBF）的分层Kolmogorov–Arnold神经网络（hierarchical RBF-KAN 和 hierarchical RBF-SKAN），分别用于确定性函数逼近与随机场建模，并在理论上证明其通用逼近性及缓解维数灾难的能力，实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 为克服高维函数逼近中的维数灾难问题，并拓展Kolmogorov–Arnold定理在随机建模中的应用，需设计兼具理论保证与实用性的新型神经网络架构。
AI.method: 构建两种分层网络：hierarchical RBF-KAN（用于确定性多维函数逼近）和hierarchical RBF-SKAN（用于随机场学习），均以径向基函数为激活函数；从理论上推导其通用逼近性、定量误差估计（针对KAN）及Wasserstein-2度量下的收敛性（针对SKAN）。
AI.result: 理论层面：证明了两种网络的通用逼近能力，KAN具有可量化的逼近误差界，能降低有效维数；SKAN可在Wasserstein-2意义下逼近随机场。实验层面：验证了两类网络对多元函数和随机场模型的有效学习能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于RBF的分层Kolmogorov–Arnold网络为高维函数与随机场建模提供了兼具理论严谨性与实践可行性的新范式，有望缓解维数灾难。

title: The Reliability Gap in Benchmark Auditing: Distribution Shift and Scale as Failure Modes of Contamination Detection
summary: Benchmark contamination, where evaluation examples appear in a model's training data, threatens the validity of LLM assessment. Statistical tools for detecting training-data membership exist, but have been validated almost exclusively in controlled academic regimes: large, homogeneous pre-training corpora and transparent, single-stage training pipelines. Whether these methods remain reliable in realistic auditing scenarios remains unclear. We identify two under-studied failure modes: distribution shift, which arises when suspect and validation sets violate the IID assumption, and scale constraints, which arise because benchmarks are orders of magnitude smaller than pre-training corpora. We systematically evaluate three leading paradigms: LLM Dataset Inference, Post-Hoc Dataset Inference, and CoDeC across 27 models from multiple families (including Pythia, OLMo~2, and specialised cultural and medical LLMs) and scales (up to 27B). We then further extend our analysis to frontier industry models. Across 335 evaluations, only 199 yield correct outcomes. LLM Dataset Inference results in false positives under distribution shift, Post-Hoc Dataset Inference is underpowered at benchmark scale, and CoDeC provides only coarse provenance signals that are insufficient to verify individual benchmark splits. Our results reveal a systematic reliability gap between controlled validation and practical benchmark auditing, and show that statistical detection cannot yet replace transparent data provenance. We open-source our benchmark for further research.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型（LLM）评估中基准污染（benchmark contamination）检测方法在真实审计场景下的可靠性，发现现有统计检测方法在分布偏移和数据规模差异下表现不佳，无法替代透明的数据溯源。
AI.motivation: 现有训练数据成员推断方法仅在受控学术环境下验证，其在现实审计场景（如异构训练数据、多阶段训练、小规模基准）中的可靠性尚不明确。
AI.method: 系统评估三种主流检测范式（LLM Dataset Inference、Post-Hoc Dataset Inference、CoDeC），覆盖27个开源模型（Pythia、OLMo~2及领域专用模型）和前沿工业模型，共335次实验；识别并分析分布偏移与规模约束两类失败模式。
AI.result: 仅199/335次评估结果正确：LLM Dataset Inference在分布偏移下产生假阳性；Post-Hoc方法在基准尺度下统计功效不足；CoDeC仅提供粗粒度溯源信号，无法验证具体基准子集。
AI.conclusion: 当前统计检测方法存在从可控验证到实际基准审计的系统性可靠性差距，尚不能替代透明、可验证的数据 provenance。

title: Partially Observable Adversarial Patch Attacks on Vision-Language-Action Models in Robotics
comment: Accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, 2026
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models are gaining attention in robotics, yet their robustness to adversarial attacks remains largely unexplored. Existing work shows that adversarial patches can mislead VLA-based robots but assumes full access to the entire execution trajectory, an unrealistic requirement in practice. We address this limitation by formulating a partially observable threat model, where the adversary can exploit only a short prefix of the trajectory to generate a fixed patch applied to all subsequent frames. Under this setting, we propose a two-phase framework. First, we localize the patch using the model's attention maps to identify visually critical regions that correspond to the full instruction. Then, we optimize the patch to disrupt the semantic grounding of target objects and increase the curvature of action trajectories, thereby compounding failures in both perception and control. Extensive experiments in simulation and real-world robotic environments show that our method sustains adversarial effects under partial observability, inducing long-horizon disruptions and significantly reducing task success rates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对视觉-语言-动作（VLA）机器人模型的新型对抗攻击方法，在部分可观测设定下，仅利用轨迹前缀生成固定对抗补丁，通过注意力定位与语义-控制联合扰动实现长时程任务失败。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型对抗鲁棒性研究不足，且多数假设攻击者能获取完整执行轨迹，不符合实际机器人部署场景。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：第一阶段利用模型注意力图定位与指令相关的视觉关键区域；第二阶段优化固定对抗补丁，以破坏目标物体语义对齐并增大动作轨迹曲率。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实机器人环境中验证了该方法在部分可观测条件下的持续攻击效果，显著降低任务成功率并引发长时程行为失效。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了VLA模型在现实约束下的新脆弱性，并为提升其鲁棒性提供了重要评估基准和改进方向。

title: WebRISE: Requirement-Induced State Evaluation for MLLM-Generated Web Artifacts
summary: Existing benchmarks for MLLM-generated web artifacts assess interaction through local evidence and miss the requirement-induced states and transitions that determine whether a page works. We introduce WebRISE, which compiles task requirements into Interaction Contract Graphs (ICGs) of observable states, user-intent transitions, and DOM/visual assertions for implementation-agnostic browser execution. WebRISE spans 442 tasks across five input modalities (Text, Markdown, Sketch, Image, Video), with 5,495 transitions and 5,271 requirement checks that separate user-stated functions from implicit product-level constraints. Across 14 MLLMs, even the strongest model reaches only 65.6% transition validity and 66.3% requirement coverage, and visual quality is no proxy for behavior (Qwen3.6-35B-A3B on Markdown: V=80.8 yet T=15.5). Video gives the strongest interaction signal (+10.6 pp implicit coverage over Text), while implicit constraints persist; defect injection shows ICG-based scoring detects state errors at 2-16x the rate of checkpoint-style evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WebRISE基准，通过交互契约图（ICG）评估多模态大语言模型（MLLM）生成网页的交互行为有效性，发现现有模型在状态转换与需求覆盖上表现不足，视觉质量不能代表功能正确性。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM网页生成评测仅依赖局部证据，忽视由任务需求驱动的状态与转换，无法真实反映网页是否可用。
AI.method: 构建WebRISE基准，将任务需求编译为交互契约图（ICG），包含可观测状态、用户意图驱动的转换及DOM/视觉断言；覆盖5种输入模态共442个任务、5495次转换和5271项需求检查，支持实现无关的浏览器执行评估。
AI.result: 14个MLLM中最强模型仅达65.6%转换有效性与66.3%需求覆盖率；视觉质量（V）与交互有效性（T）严重脱节（如Qwen3.6-35B-A3B在Markdown上V=80.8但T=15.5）；视频模态提升隐式需求覆盖+10.6个百分点；ICG评分比检查点式评估检出状态错误快2–16倍。
AI.conclusion: WebRISE揭示了当前MLLM在理解与实现网页交互逻辑上的根本局限，强调需以需求驱动的状态-转换建模替代表层视觉评估。

title: MariData: One-Step Unpaired Image Translation for Maritime Environments
summary: The development on robust perception systems for Maritime Autonomous Surface Ships (MASS) is heavily constrained by the scarcity of diverse training data, particularly for adverse weather and low-light conditions. Because collecting paired images in dynamic maritime environments is physically impossible, synthetic data generation via unpaired image-to-image translation offers a critical solution. However, existing generative models suffer from failing to preserve the fine structural details of small navigational objects due to latent compression bottlenecks. In this paper, we introduce a framework for generating synthetic maritime data using CycleGAN-turbo, a one-step unpaired translation architecture. By incorporating zero-convolution skip connections to bypass the Variational Autoencoder (VAE) bottleneck, our approach explicitly preserves small object details (e.g., distant vessels and sea marks) during translation. We compiled a dataset of 7,000 maritime images to train and evaluate models for Day-to-Foggy, Day-to-Sunset, and Day-to-Night domain translations. Qualitative evaluations and variable-strength inference studies demonstrate that our method effectively synthesizes realistic atmospheric conditions while maintaining the underlying semantic structure of the scene. The Day-to-Foggy and Day-to-Sunset models exhibit great structural retention, whereas the Day-to-Night model highlights the challenge of semantic hallucination, such as generating artificial coastal lights, induced by unbalanced training distributions. Ultimately, this work establishes an efficient, structure-aware data synthesis pipeline that directly addresses the data scarcity bottleneck in autonomous maritime navigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于CycleGAN-turbo并引入零卷积跳跃连接以绕过VAE瓶颈的合成 maritime 数据生成框架，显著提升了小目标（如远距离船舶、航标）在恶劣天气与低光条件下的结构保真度，缓解了MASS系统因真实数据稀缺导致的感知鲁棒性瓶颈。
AI.motivation: Maritime Autonomous Surface Ships (MASS) 的鲁棒感知系统受限于恶劣天气和低光条件下多样化训练数据的严重匮乏；而动态海事环境中难以获取成对图像，亟需高质量的无配对图像翻译合成方法。
AI.method: 基于CycleGAN-turbo构建一阶段无配对图像翻译框架，并创新性引入零卷积（zero-conv）跳跃连接，绕过VAE潜在空间压缩瓶颈，显式保留小尺度导航目标的结构细节；在自建7000张海事图像数据集上训练Day-to-Foggy、Day-to-Sunset、Day-to-Night三类域迁移模型。
AI.result: 定性评估与变强度推理实验表明：Day-to-Foggy和Day-to-Sunset模型结构保持优异；Day-to-Night模型存在语义幻觉（如生成虚假海岸灯光），归因于训练分布不平衡；整体实现了更逼真且结构感知更强的合成效果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了高效、结构感知的海事合成数据生成流程，直接应对自主海事导航中的数据稀缺瓶颈，为鲁棒感知提供可靠数据支撑。

title: ERP-XTTN: Interpretable Prototype-Guided Cross-Attention for Cross-Subject ERP Classification
summary: Interpretable brain-computer interface classifiers that generalize across subjects without calibration remain an open challenge. We test whether prototype-based cross-attention can provide competitive, interpretable event-related potential (ERP) classification under deployment-compatible conditions. We propose ERP-XTTN, a cross-attention architecture that routes input EEG patches to fixed difference-wave prototypes via query-key-only cross-attention with no value projection, so classification depends entirely on attention routing and attention faithfulness is structural rather than post-hoc. Prototypes are derived automatically from extrema in the training-fold difference wave. We evaluate across three public sources (BNCI Horizon 2020, HRI Cursor, and ERP CORE) spanning eight ERP components (ERN, LRP, ErrP, N170, P300, N2pc, MMN, N400), using leave-one-subject-out (LOSO) evaluation with causal filtering at two channel counts (3-channel and full montage), against EEGNet and xDAWN with Riemannian geometry (xDAWN+RG). The mean gap between the best baseline and ERP-XTTN was .018 AUROC at 3 channels and .034 at full montage, arising from two largely distinct sources: a temporal-flexibility cost relative to EEGNet and a spatial-exploitation cost relative to xDAWN+RG, the latter driven by signal-to-noise ratio at full montage. Beyond accuracy, the transparent routing reveals cross-subject signal structure that black-box models cannot: false positives resembled true positives more than true negatives did, indicating that classification errors are neurophysiologically explicable. ERP-XTTN generalizes across diverse ERPs under causal, calibration-free conditions with a small interpretability cost at minimal montages. To our knowledge, this is the first epoch-level LOSO benchmark on ERP CORE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ERP-XTTN模型，一种基于原型的跨注意力架构，用于跨被试、免校准、因果滤波条件下的可解释ERP分类，在多个公开数据集上展现出与主流方法相当的性能，并提供结构化的注意力可解释性。
AI.motivation: 开发可解释、跨被试泛化且无需校准的脑机接口（BCI）分类器仍具挑战性；现有黑箱模型缺乏对神经生理机制的可解释洞察。
AI.method: 提出ERP-XTTN：采用仅含query-key（无value投影）的跨注意力机制，将EEG片段路由至由训练差波极值自动提取的固定差异波原型；使用LOSO评估，覆盖3通道与全导联、因果滤波及八大ERP成分。
AI.result: 在3通道和全导联下，AUROC与最佳基线（EEGNet/xDAWN+RG）差距分别为0.018和0.034；错误样本在神经生理上更接近真阳性而非真阴性，表明分类错误具有可解释性；首次完成ERP CORE数据集上的epoch级LOSO基准测试。
AI.conclusion: ERP-XTTN在保持高泛化能力与部署兼容性的同时，实现了结构化的注意力可解释性，为跨被试ERP解码提供了兼具性能与透明性的新范式。

title: The Violation Situation Pattern: A Knowledge-Graph Pattern for Compliance Violations
summary: Compliance pipelines detect violations as transient query results and do not keep the violation itself as a persistent graph object with review state, affected entities, or audit history. The Violation Situation Pattern (VSP) closes this gap. Building on the Situation pattern of Gangemi and Mika, VSP reifies each detected violation as a graph node with a rule identifier, a temporal validity interval, a lifecycle state, and evidence links to the entities involved. Lifecycle transitions are stored as immutable, PROV-O-aligned events, so audit history is a graph traversal. We instantiate VSP in a legal entity and contract lifecycle property graph and operationalize four deontic rules (V1 unauthorized signature, V2 expired mandate, V3 missing confidentiality clause, V4 missing breach-notification clause) through an FCL->Cypher->MERGE pipeline. We check V1 and V2 against BODACC corporate-officer publications, evaluate V4 on 73 GDPRhub enforcement decisions, and run a SHACL cross-formalism check on V3 and V4. The central finding is rule-body independence: extending V4 from clause-presence to deadline checking raises F1 from 0.312 to 0.602, while the pattern's identity, lifecycle, and evidence semantics stay the same. This separates a pattern contribution from a detector contribution, so detection logic can evolve without invalidating accumulated audit history.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Violation Situation Pattern (VSP)，将合规检测中的违规行为建模为具有生命周期、时序有效性及证据链接的图节点，支持可审计的违规管理；实验验证了其在法律实体与合同场景下的适用性，并发现规则逻辑可独立演进而不影响已有审计历史。
AI.motivation: 现有合规检测流水线仅将违规作为瞬态查询结果，缺乏对违规本身作为持久化图对象（含审查状态、影响实体和审计历史）的建模能力。
AI.method: 基于Gangemi和Mika的情境模式，提出VSP，将每个违规实例化为带规则标识、时间有效性区间、生命周期状态及证据链接的图节点；生命周期变迁以符合PROV-O标准的不可变事件形式存储；在法律实体与合同属性图中实现，并通过FCL->Cypher->MERGE流水线操作四条义务规则；结合真实数据（BODACC、GDPRhub）与SHACL跨形式化验证进行评估。
AI.result: 验证了VSP在真实场景中的可行性；关键发现是规则体独立性：仅扩展V4规则从条款存在性检查到截止日期检查，F1值从0.312提升至0.602，而VSP的核心语义（身份、生命周期、证据）保持不变。
AI.conclusion: VSP实现了违规的结构化、可追溯与可演化建模，使检测逻辑升级不破坏已有审计历史，有效分离了模式设计与检测器实现。

title: CANMOT: Class-Aware Noise Modeling for Multi-Object Tracking in Autonomous Driving
comment: submitted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2026)
summary:
Kalman filter (KF)-based multi-object tracking (MOT) remains a strong baseline for autonomous driving due to its strong performance, computational efficiency and interpretability. In most practical systems, the process noise and measurement noise covariances are defined globally and shared across object classes, presuming identical uncertainty characteristics across heterogeneous traffic participants.
  This work revisits this assumption and proposes CANMOT, a class-aware and object-aligned noise modeling framework for KF-based 3D MOT. Class-specific diagonal process and measurement covariance matrices are introduced and optionally expressed in the object coordinate frame to preserve longitudinal-lateral anisotropy.
  Systematic experiments on the nuScenes benchmark show that class-aware and object-aligned noise modeling improves tracking performance and substantially reduces identity switches compared to state-of-the-art (SotA). In addition, the consistency of the estimated uncertainty is analyzed using the Average Normalized Estimation Error Squared (ANEES) and $χ^2$-based violation tests. The results reveal severe overconfidence in standard KF-based MOT baselines. While the proposed formulation improves calibration without modifying the underlying filtering framework, it still exhibits substantial inconsistency, highlighting the need for further research in this area.
  Code is available at https://github.com/rst-tu-dortmund/learned-3d-nms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CANMOT框架，通过为不同交通参与者类别引入类特定、物体对齐的噪声协方差建模，改进卡尔曼滤波（KF）在3D多目标跟踪（MOT）中的性能与不确定性校准。
AI.motivation: 现有KF-based MOT方法通常采用全局共享的、各向同性的过程与观测噪声协方差，忽视了不同类别交通参与者（如车、行人、自行车）在运动和观测不确定性上的异质性与各向异性，导致跟踪性能下降和不确定性估计失准。
AI.method: 提出类感知且物体对齐的噪声建模（CANMOT）：为每类目标学习对角形式的类特定过程噪声与测量噪声协方差矩阵，并可选地将其定义在物体自身坐标系下以保持纵向-横向各向异性；不改变KF基本框架，仅优化噪声参数。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准上显著提升跟踪精度（尤其降低ID切换），并通过ANEES与χ²检验验证其不确定性估计更校准（相比标准KF基线大幅缓解过自信问题），但仍存在残余不一致性。
AI.conclusion: 类特定与物体对齐的噪声建模是提升KF-based 3D MOT性能与不确定性可信度的有效且轻量路径，但当前方法仍未完全解决不确定性校准问题，亟需进一步研究。

title: ARBOR: Online Process Rewards via a Reusable Rubric Buffer for Search Agents
summary: LLM-based search agents are trained predominantly with outcome-only reward, leaving the search process itself unsupervised. This signal degenerates on outcome-homogeneous groups where all sampled trajectories share the same correctness, yielding zero within-group advantage and no gradient. Existing process supervision either trains a costly verifier or generates per-query rubrics that are inconsistent across queries and discarded after one use. We propose ARBOR (Adaptive Rubric Buffer for Online Reward), a reusable process-reward framework that maintains a rubric memory shared across queries. Query-local drafts induced from contrastive trajectories are admitted, consolidated into cross-query common rubrics, and retired as the policy evolves. A small active subset of common rubrics scores trajectories via sparse pairwise judging, and the resulting scores are added to the base reward, providing process-level gradient even when outcome reward is uniform. ARBOR consistently outperforms GRPO and DAPO baselines on four multi-hop QA benchmarks, raising average LLM-judge accuracy by up to 4.2 points and converting up to 42% of otherwise-zero-gradient training groups into informative ones.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARBOR框架，通过构建可复用的跨查询过程奖励机制（自适应评分手册缓冲区），解决大语言模型搜索代理在结果同质化场景下缺乏过程监督信号的问题，显著提升多跳问答性能与训练梯度有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的搜索代理主要依赖结果导向的奖励信号，当多个搜索轨迹结果相同时，无法提供有效的过程监督梯度；而现有过程监督方法存在验证器成本高或评分手册不一致、不可复用等问题。
AI.method: 提出ARBOR（Adaptive Rubric Buffer for Online Reward）框架：利用对比轨迹生成查询局部草稿，将其整合为跨查询通用评分手册，并动态维护一个活跃子集；通过稀疏两两评判为轨迹打分，将该过程得分加入基础奖励中，从而在结果奖励均匀时仍提供过程级梯度。
AI.result: ARBOR在四个多跳问答基准上持续优于GRPO和DAPO基线，LLM裁判准确率平均提升最高达4.2分，并将最多42%原本零梯度的训练组转化为有效梯度组。
AI.conclusion: ARBOR通过可复用、动态更新的跨查询过程奖励机制，有效缓解了结果同质化导致的过程监督失效问题，提升了搜索代理的训练效率与推理性能。

title: FreeStreamGS: Online Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting from Unposed Streaming Inputs
