To address these challenges, we propose Perceptual Processing Direct Preference Optimization (P\textsuperscript{2}-DPO), a novel training paradigm in which the model generates and learns from its own preference pairs, thereby directly addressing the identified visual bottlenecks while inherently avoiding the issues of vision-agnostic and off-policy data. It introduces: (1) an on-policy preference pairs construction method targeting Focus-and-Enhance perception and Visual Robustness, and (2) a well-designed Calibration Loss to precisely align visual signals with the causal generation of text. Experimental results demonstrate that with a comparable amount of training data and cost, P\textsuperscript{2}-DPO outperforms strong baselines that rely on costly human feedback on benchmarks. Furthermore, evaluations on Attention Region Fidelity (ARF) and image degradation scenarios validate the effectiveness of P\textsuperscript{2}-DPO in addressing perceptual bottleneck in attended regions and improving Visual Robustness against degraded inputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出P²-DPO方法，通过模型自生成的on-policy偏好对，聚焦提升视觉注意力区域的感知能力与图像退化下的鲁棒性，并引入校准损失对齐视觉信号与文本生成因果关系，有效缓解LVLM中的幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: 现有DPO方法未针对性解决LVLM中注意力区域的感知瓶颈和图像退化下的视觉鲁棒性不足问题，且依赖视觉无关、离策略的人类偏好数据，限制学习效果。
AI.method: 提出Perceptual Processing Direct Preference Optimization（P²-DPO）：（1）构建面向‘聚焦-增强’感知与视觉鲁棒性的on-policy偏好对；（2）设计校准损失（Calibration Loss），精准对齐视觉信号与文本生成的因果过程。
AI.result: 在同等训练数据量与成本下，P²-DPO在多个基准上超越依赖高成本人工反馈的强基线；ARF指标与图像退化实验验证其显著提升注意力区域保真度与视觉鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: P²-DPO通过模型自驱动的on-policy偏好学习范式，有效克服传统DPO在视觉感知与鲁棒性上的局限，为缓解LVLM幻觉提供了新思路。

title: Exact equivariance, kept through training, buys zero-shot generalisation across the symmetry group
comment: 92 pages, 11 figures. Core paper plus an extended results-log appendix and a forward-looking theory supplement. All experiments are laptop-scale (CPU/MPS), fully seeded and deterministic
summary: A latent world model built from an equivariant encoder $E$ and an equivariant predictor $f$ inherits a provable symmetry of its training loss: when the world's dynamics genuinely carries a group $G$ acting on latents by an orthogonal representation $ρ(g)$, the one-step prediction relMSE is exactly invariant across the whole group, so fitting the dynamics on a restricted slice of orientations mathematically determines it on the entire orbit (jǔ yī fǎn sān). We verify this end-to-end at laptop scale (CPU/MPS, fully seeded). [A] The symmetry survives a real Muon/AdamW + EMA + VICReg run -- composed encode-then-predict residual $\sim 10^{-6}$ after optimisation, not just at initialisation, and under any optimiser. [B] One-step error is flat to five digits across the group, while a same-hypothesis-class non-equivariant baseline fits the slice but breaks out-of-distribution (VN $\times 1.00$ vs baseline $\times 13.8$ in 2D, $\times 17.2$ in 3D, $\times 157$ over the full $\mathrm{SE}(3)$ ladder), with the equivariant model $4.5$-$7.4\times$ smaller. [C] The same isometry argument lifts to closed loop: under a matching equivariant planner the control trajectory at orientation $g$ is exactly $ρ(g)$ applied to the seen one, so closed-loop error is invariant across the group -- float-floor-exact in 2D/$\mathrm{SO}(2)$ on real PushT and statistically flat in 3D/$\mathrm{SE}(3)$ (disjoint 95% CIs). We stress-test the prior against Sutton's Bitter Lesson: augmentation, brute-force scale, and soft-equivariance each close at most the across-group task metric, never the float-floor exactness. Because equivariance is closed under composition, the $H$-fold rollout stays flat ($\times 1.00$, $\le 2\times 10^{-7}$) at every horizon, while the baseline's residual compounds with $H$. Out of scope: task-success sweeps, planner-free invariance, and scaling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于等变编码器和等变预测器的潜在世界模型，证明了其训练损失在群作用下具有严格对称性，并通过实验验证了该对称性在实际训练、多步预测与闭环控制中均保持高精度不变性，显著优于非等变基线。
AI.motivation: 解决世界模型在分布外（OOD）方向泛化能力差的问题，利用物理系统的内在对称性（如旋转、平移）构建具备严格数学保证的等变模型，以提升泛化性与参数效率。
AI.method: 构建由等变编码器E和等变预测器f组成的潜在世界模型；理论证明当真实动力学具有群G作用时，一阶预测相对均方误差（relMSE）在G上严格不变；在PushT等真实任务上进行端到端训练（MuJoCo/AdamW+EMA+VICReg），并对比非等变基线；扩展至闭环控制，结合等变规划器验证轨迹的群作用一致性。
AI.result: 等变模型在一阶预测误差上在群G上五位小数内平坦（误差~10⁻⁶）；OOD泛化性能远超基线（2D/3D/SE(3)下误差放大倍数分别为1.00 vs 13.8/17.2/157）；模型体积小4.5–7.4倍；闭环控制轨迹严格满足群作用变换；H步展开误差恒为×1.00（≤2×10⁻⁷），而基线误差随H累积增长。
AI.conclusion: 等变性不仅提升泛化与效率，更带来可证明的、浮点级精确的跨方向不变性，这是数据增强、扩大规模或软等变等替代方法无法达到的本质优势；等变结构因其对复合运算的封闭性，天然适用于长时序与闭环控制。

title: SAGE: A Quantitative Evaluation of Socialized Evolution in Agent Ecosystems
summary: Self-improving language agents are typically evaluated in isolation: an agent attempts a task, receives feedback, and iteratively refines its own behavior. Yet agents increasingly operate alongside peers whose strategies and outcomes are publicly visible. This raises an under-studied question: when does shared experience produce improvements that self-improvement alone cannot achieve? We introduce SAGE (Social Agent Group Evolution),an evaluation framework that compares two compute-matched conditions: SocialEvo, where agents from five distinct model families co-evolve with access to all peers' histories; and SelfEvo, where each agent receives the same number of task attempts but sees only its own past, which is conventional in self-improving agent studies. We instantiate SAGE in three arenas: open-ended ML research, long-horizon economic planning, and strategic multiplayer play, evaluated across multiple evolutionary rounds. We find that group history is not a universal amplifier: the strongest agent does not exceed its self-evolution ceiling. However, agents that plateau under self-improvement can achieve significant breakthroughs when peer experience is available. In competitive settings, counterfactual controls reveal that agents improve generally rather than developing opponent-specific strategies. Across different forms of shared history, filtered peer traces and reflective summaries often outperform raw logs, indicating that social gains depend on abstraction rather than exposure volume. These findings reveal that peer-history gains are agent-specific, arena-dependent, and contingent on the capacity to abstract transferable knowledge from public traces.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAGE框架，对比社会协同进化（SocialEvo）与个体自我进化（SelfEvo），发现共享同伴经验可在特定条件下突破个体瓶颈，但效果依赖于智能体能力、任务场景及对共享历史的抽象能力，而非简单增加数据量。
AI.motivation: 探究当语言智能体在公开可见的同伴环境中运行时，共享经验是否能带来个体自我改进无法实现的提升，填补该方向研究空白。
AI.method: 构建SAGE评估框架，设计SocialEvo（五类模型家族协同进化、共享全部历史）与SelfEvo（仅用自身历史、计算资源匹配）两种对照条件，在ML研究、经济规划和多人博弈三个领域开展多轮进化实验，并控制变量分析共享历史形式（原始日志、过滤轨迹、反思摘要）的影响。
AI.result: 最强智能体在SocialEvo中未超越其SelfEvo上限；但部分停滞智能体借助同伴经验实现显著突破；竞争性场景中提升具有一般性而非对手特异性；经抽象处理的共享历史（如过滤轨迹、反思摘要）比原始日志更有效。
AI.conclusion: 同伴历史带来的增益具有智能体特异性、场景依赖性和抽象依赖性——关键不在于接触多少信息，而在于能否从中提炼可迁移知识。

title: Let the Dynamics Flow: Stable Flow Matching Dynamical Systems
summary: Flow matching has recently emerged as a powerful approach for imitation learning, enabling scalable, expressive, and multimodal motion policies. However, incorporating formal stability guarantees into these generative models, a prerequisite to ensure safe and generalizable robot behaviors, remains a significant challenge. While modeling robot motions as dynamical systems allows for such stability-based inductive biases, existing frameworks struggle to capture the rich action distributions inherent in complex robotic tasks. This paper introduces Stable Flow Matching Dynamical Systems (SFMDS), a novel framework that bridges the gap between high-capacity generative modeling and formal Lyapunov stability guarantees. SFMDS parametrizes dynamical systems via flow matching while simultaneously constraining the model to a family of stable solutions. We propose two variants: a soft constraint based on a penalty term, and a hard structural constraint embedded directly in the model architecture. We further extend both formulations to Lie groups. Experiments on benchmark datasets, in simulation, and on a humanoid robot show that SFMDS learns stable, scalable, and multimodal dynamical systems in low- and high-dimensional state spaces, enabling safe and expressive robot motion generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为稳定流匹配动力系统（SFMDS）的新框架，将高容量生成建模与李雅普诺夫稳定性保证相结合，通过软约束和硬结构约束两种方式确保机器人运动策略的稳定性、可扩展性与多模态性，并在仿真与真实人形机器人上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于流匹配的模仿学习方法缺乏形式化的稳定性保证，而稳定性是实现安全、泛化机器人行为的前提；同时，将机器人运动建模为动力系统虽能引入稳定性先验，但难以刻画复杂任务中丰富的动作分布。
AI.method: 提出SFMDS框架，利用流匹配参数化动力系统，并施加稳定性约束：一是基于惩罚项的软约束，二是嵌入模型架构的硬结构性约束；进一步将两种变体推广至李群空间。
AI.result: 在基准数据集、仿真环境及真实人形机器人上实验表明，SFMDS能在低维与高维状态空间中学习到稳定、可扩展且多模态的动力系统，实现安全且富有表现力的机器人运动生成。
AI.conclusion: SFMDS成功弥合了生成式建模能力与形式化稳定性保障之间的鸿沟，为安全可靠的具身智能提供了新范式。

title: From Script to Semantics: Prompting Strategies for African NLI
comment: Accepted at the RAIL Workshop, LREC 2026
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly evaluated in multilingual settings, yet their inference behavior in low-resource African languages remains underexplored especially under pure prompting without fine-tuning. We present a systematic study of prompting strategies for Natural Language Inference (NLI) in Swahili, Yoruba, and Hausa using the AfriXNLI benchmark. We evaluate five prompting strategies Baseline (zero-shot), Script-Aware, Language Specific, Contrastive, and Native-Label Self-Translation (NL-STP) across two mid-sized open weight models (Llama3.2-3B and Gemma3-4B). To isolate the effect of prompt design, the effect of few-shot examples and Chain-of-Thought reasoning is eliminated in our study. We find a significant difference in performance of class wise across strategies with highly neutral class collapse and high prediction skew in some configurations. Contrastive prompting proves to be the most reliable and steadily improving strategy over language and model and has better balance of class behavior and balance of overall accuracy gains. Notably, well-constructed prompts are sufficient to beat more powerful baselines that are provided with few-shot prompts and Chain-of-Thought prompts. We have found that prompt formulation is essential to multilingual NLI with low-resource languages and that language aware decision structuring can be used to meaningfully enhance robustness in resource challenged settings.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了在斯瓦希里语、约鲁巴语和豪萨语等低资源非洲语言中，不同提示策略对自然语言推理（NLI）任务的影响，发现对比式提示（Contrastive prompting）最稳健有效，且无需少样本或思维链即可超越更强基线。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在多语言场景下的推理行为，尤其在低资源非洲语言中、纯提示（无微调）条件下的表现尚缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 基于AfriXNLI基准，在Swahili、Yoruba、Hausa三种语言上评估五种提示策略（Baseline、Script-Aware、Language Specific、Contrastive、NL-STP），使用Llama3.2-3B和Gemma3-4B两个开源中等规模模型，并排除少样本和思维链干扰以聚焦提示设计本身。
AI.result: Contrastive提示在各类别平衡性与整体准确率上表现最优且跨语言跨模型稳定；精心设计的提示可超越含少样本和思维链的更强基线；存在显著的中性类坍塌与预测偏斜现象。
AI.conclusion: 提示构建对低资源语言多语言NLI至关重要；语言感知的决策结构化能有效提升资源受限场景下的模型鲁棒性。

title: Towards Characterizing Scientific Image Utility and Upgradability
summary: Scientific images function as critical evidence in research communication, yet their integrity faces unprecedented threats from AI-generated content that introduces subtle but consequential errors. Existing evaluation paradigms prove inadequate: perceptual quality metrics poorly correlate with scientific validity, while language models lack domain-specific verification capabilities. To address this gap, we propose the \textbf{S}cientific \textbf{I}mage \textbf{U}tility and \textbf{U}pgradability \textbf{A}ssessment (\textbf{SIU$^2$A}) framework, which introduces two complementary dimensions for scientific image evaluation. \textbf{Utility} encompasses \textit{error detection} (identifying scientific inaccuracies) and \textit{correction feasibility} (assessing whether errors can be reliably repaired). \textbf{Upgradability} measures the quality of correction. We categorize scientific image corruption into four fundamental types: Detail Distortion, Incompleteness, False Content, and Entity Confusion. Based on this taxonomy, we construct SIU$^2$A-Benchmark, a dataset with expert annotations for error identification and repair. The framework implements a two-stage evaluation protocol: the \textit{Utility} stage evaluates error detection capability and repair instruction generation, while the \textit{Upgradability} stage assesses whether corrections faithfully restore scientific validity without compromising existing accurate information. Experiments reveal that current multimodal systems exhibit significant limitations in both scientific error assessment and faithful correction, exposing a fundamental gap between visual perception and scientific usability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIU²A框架，从实用性和可升级性两个维度评估科学图像的AI生成内容真实性，构建了包含四类图像失真类型的基准数据集SIU²A-Benchmark，并揭示当前多模态系统在科学错误识别与保真修复方面存在显著缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有评估范式（如感知质量指标和通用语言模型）无法有效衡量科学图像的科学有效性，AI生成内容引入的细微但关键的科学错误亟需专门评估方法。
AI.method: 提出SIU²A框架，定义‘实用性’（含错误检测与修正可行性）和‘可升级性’（修正质量）两个评估维度；建立四类科学图像失真分类体系（细节失真、不完整性、虚假内容、实体混淆）；构建专家标注的SIU²A-Benchmark数据集；设计两阶段评估协议（实用性阶段评估错误检测与修复指令生成，可升级性阶段评估修正是否忠实恢复科学有效性）。
AI.result: 实验表明当前多模态系统在科学错误识别与保真修复两方面均存在显著局限，暴露了视觉感知能力与科学可用性之间的根本差距。
AI.conclusion: SIU²A为科学图像AI内容真实性评估提供了首个面向科学效度的结构化框架，强调评估必须兼顾错误识别、可修复性及修正保真度，推动AI生成内容在科研场景中的可信应用。

title: MOSAIC: Efficient Mixture-of-Agent Scheduling via Adaptive Aggregation and Inference Concurrency
summary: Mixture-of-Agents (MoA) systems improve reasoning accuracy by routing each query to multiple expert LLMs and aggregating their outputs. Efficiently executing this workload on limited GPU resources has bottlenecks. Skill-based routing creates skewed expert demand, and combining instruction-tuned LLMs with long-reasoning models results in extreme variability in generation lengths. Consequently, traditional scheduling strategies suffer from significant GPU idling and throughput collapse due to load imbalances. We present MOSAIC, a scheduling framework to accelerate MoA workloads. First, we formulate an Integer Linear Program (ILP) based scheduler that jointly optimizes expert placement and per-worker prompt assignment from offline-profiled costs, replicating reasoning experts across workers while pinning lightweight ones. Second, MOSAIC uses confidence-aware adaptive aggregation, leveraging inter-expert agreement to bypass the heavy final aggregator LLM for consensus queries. In our 4-GPU system, MOSAIC achieves up to 2.5x expert-stage, 4.23x aggregator-stage and 1.7~2.3x end-to-end speedups over the baseline scheduler, while matching accuracy within 0.1pp.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOSAIC调度框架，通过整数线性规划优化专家模型部署与提示分配，并结合置信度感知的自适应聚合策略，显著提升混合专家（MoA）系统在有限GPU资源下的推理吞吐量，同时保持精度几乎不变。
AI.motivation: 现有MoA系统在有限GPU资源下存在负载不均衡问题：技能路由导致专家需求倾斜，不同长度推理模型混合使用造成生成长度差异大，传统调度器因此出现GPU空闲和吞吐崩溃。
AI.method: 1) 基于离线性能分析构建整数线性规划（ILP）调度器，联合优化专家放置与每工作节点的提示分配，对推理型专家进行跨节点复制、轻量级专家固定部署；2) 提出置信度感知的自适应聚合机制，在专家间达成共识时跳过重型聚合LLM。
AI.result: 在4-GPU系统中，相比基线调度器，MOSAIC实现专家阶段最高2.5倍、聚合阶段4.23倍、端到端1.7~2.3倍加速，精度损失仅0.1个百分点。
AI.conclusion: MOSAIC通过协同优化模型部署与动态聚合策略，有效缓解MoA系统中的资源瓶颈，在保持高精度前提下大幅提升GPU利用率与端到端吞吐。

title: From Prompt to Service: An SLM-Based Agent Orchestration Gateway for AI-Driven Virtual Worlds
summary: As generative AI capabilities expand, AI-driven virtual worlds face a growing architectural challenge. Users interact through in-world interfaces in multimodal ways, yet their requests demand fundamentally different AI backend models and computational resources. Embedding these capabilities directly into virtual world systems reduces extensibility, complicates maintenance, and limits the ability to coordinate services distributed across edge and cloud infrastructure. This paper presents an SLM-based Agent Orchestration Gateway, a lightweight runtime coordination mechanism that decouples a virtual world client from heterogeneous AI backends through intent-driven service routing. An edge-deployed SLM classifies the semantic intent of each user prompt, a configurable service registry validates and resolves the routing decision, and the selected backend is invoked transparently, enabling new AI capabilities to be introduced in the virtual world without modifying the client application. The gateway is implemented and evaluated within the InterwovenXR virtual museum testbed. The evaluation shows that compact SLMs can serve as reliable intent routers on edge hardware, and that task-specific fine-tuning can transform sub-billion-parameter models into practical, low-latency routers. A layered configuration pairing a fine-tuned sub billion-parameter model as router with a larger SLM for conversational response generation is shown to be deployable on mid-range edge hardware and more efficient than delegating both responsibilities to a single model. The findings show that SLMs can support practical AI service orchestration in virtual worlds and the work contributes an evaluated architecture for scalable, extensible, and edge-supported AI interaction, enabling virtual agents become access points to distributed generative AI services.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于小型语言模型（SLM）的代理编排网关，用于解耦虚拟世界客户端与异构AI后端，通过意图驱动的服务路由实现轻量级、边缘可部署的AI服务协调。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式AI能力扩展，AI驱动的虚拟世界面临架构挑战：用户多模态交互请求需调用不同AI后端和计算资源，直接嵌入AI能力会降低可扩展性、增加维护难度，并限制边缘-云协同服务调度能力。
AI.method: 设计并实现一个SLM-based Agent Orchestration Gateway：边缘部署的SLM对用户提示进行语义意图分类；可配置的服务注册中心验证并解析路由决策；透明调用选定后端。在InterwovenXR虚拟博物馆测试平台中部署与评估。
AI.result: 实验表明：紧凑型SLM可在边缘硬件上可靠充当意图路由器；任务特定微调可将参数低于十亿的SLM转化为低延迟实用路由器；分层配置（微调小模型作路由 + 较大SLM作对话响应）比单一大模型更高效且可部署于中端边缘设备。
AI.conclusion: SLM能有效支撑虚拟世界中的实用AI服务编排；本工作贡献了一个经过实证的、可扩展、可扩展、支持边缘部署的AI交互架构，使虚拟代理成为接入分布式生成式AI服务的入口点。

title: Denoising Tells When to Replan: Denoising-Variance Adaptive Chunking for Flow-Based Robot Policies
summary: Action chunking has become a common inference strategy for flow-based robot policies, improving action coherence by modeling multi-step temporal dependencies in demonstrations. However, the execution horizon is still typically set as an empirical fixed value, overlooking that predictable free-space motions and precision-critical interaction phases often require different replanning frequencies. In this work, we first show that the denoising process of flow-based policies contains an intrinsic signal of task phases: clean-action estimates remain stable during predictable motion phases, but fluctuate more strongly around contact-rich or precision-sensitive operations. Motivated by this observation, we propose DVAC (Denoising-Variance Adaptive Chunking), a test-time method that adaptively determines how many actions to execute from each predicted chunk. DVAC measures the variance of clean-action estimates over the final denoising steps, executes the stable low-variance prefix, and replans before high-variance future actions are committed. To transfer across tasks and rollouts, DVAC further calibrates the threshold with a rolling estimate of the local variance scale. Experiments on LIBERO, RoboTwin, CALVIN, and real-world manipulation show that DVAC improves task success while reducing replanning frequency. With a $π_{0.5}$-based policy, DVAC improves LIBERO success from 94.75% to 98.00% and reduces replanning by 43.0%, while also yielding aggregate gains on RoboTwin and CALVIN and improving real-world execution efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DVAC方法，通过自适应地根据去噪过程中的动作估计方差来决定每个预测块的执行步数，从而在保证任务成功率的同时减少重规划次数。
AI.motivation: 现有基于流的机器人策略通常采用固定的动作分块长度，忽略了不同任务阶段（如自由空间运动与接触密集操作）对重规划频率的不同需求。
AI.method: DVAC利用去噪过程中干净动作估计的方差作为任务阶段信号：低方差对应可预测运动阶段，高方差对应接触/高精度操作阶段；据此自适应执行低方差前缀并提前重规划；同时引入滚动局部方差尺度校准阈值以提升跨任务泛化性。
AI.result: 在LIBERO、RoboTwin、CALVIN及真实世界操作任务上，DVAC显著提升任务成功率并降低重规划频率；例如在LIBERO上使用π₀.₅策略时，成功率从94.75%提升至98.00%，重规划次数减少43.0%。
AI.conclusion: DVAC是一种有效的测试时自适应分块策略，能依据内在去噪信号动态调整执行步长，在多个基准和真实场景中实现性能与效率的双重提升。

title: Beyond Ideal Instruction: A Comprehensive Framework for Evaluating LLMs in Realistic Interactions
summary: Despite great advances in tool-use capabilities of large language models (LLMs), existing evaluation benchmarks struggle to fully align with real-world scenarios. Such benchmarks mostly rely on simulated idealized user assumptions and lacks experience-oriented evaluation. These limitations fail to account for the ambiguity, uncooperative behaviors, and shifting intentions characteristic of real-world users. To fill this gap, we propose RUT-Bench, a dedicated benchmark designed to assess LLMs under diverse Real-world User Tool calling scenarios. RUT-Bench supports high-fidelity simulations covering both ideal rational patterns and heterogeneous non-ideal behaviors across single-turn and multi-turn dialogues. We conduct comprehensive evaluations on 19 widely adopted open-source and proprietary LLMs using our benchmark. Experimental results reveal that no tested LLMs achieve an overall success rate above 40%, and nearly all of them experience noticeable performance drops when facing more complicated non-ideal user inputs. Our code and data is available at https://github.com/TorresYangX/RUT-Bench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RUT-Bench，一个面向真实用户工具调用场景的新型基准，用于评估大语言模型（LLMs）在理想与非理想用户行为下的工具使用能力；实验表明现有LLM在此类现实场景中表现普遍不佳，整体成功率低于40%。
AI.motivation: 现有工具使用评测基准多基于理想化、模拟化的用户假设，缺乏对现实用户模糊性、不合作性及意图动态变化等特征的建模，难以反映真实场景下的LLM性能。
AI.method: 构建RUT-Bench基准，支持高保真模拟，涵盖单轮与多轮对话中理想理性用户及多种非理想用户行为（如模糊指令、反复修改意图、故意误导等），并在19个主流开源与闭源LLM上进行系统评测。
AI.result: 所有测试LLM在RUT-Bench上的整体成功率均未超过40%；面对复杂非理想用户输入时，几乎所有模型性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM的工具调用能力在贴近真实用户行为的场景下仍严重不足，RUT-Bench为更务实的评估和后续改进提供了新标准与数据支持。

title: Mamba-Enhanced Implicit Motion Learning for Audio-Driven Portrait Animation
summary: Audio-driven human motion video generation aims to synthesize realistic and temporally coherent human animations from a single static image, with applications in talking-head synthesis, co-speech gesture generation, and dynamic presentations. Moving beyond conventional keypoint-based methods that often struggle to capture subtle motion dynamics, We propose a novel implicit-motion framework for generating realistic and temporally coherent human motion videos from a single static image and audio. Our approach uses a two-stage pipeline that decouples motion prediction from rendering. The first stage integrates appearance priors and hierarchical depth cues into a region-aware attention mechanism to model latent motion features. The second stage employs a Mamba-enhanced diffusion model to directly predict these features from audio and the source image, enabling unsupervised learning of fine-grained motion patterns. This decoupled architecture enhances flexibility and efficiency. Trained on a new 380-hour high-quality dataset, our method outperforms prior work across multiple public benchmarks and our collected data in accuracy, naturalness, and temporal coherence, setting a new state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于隐式运动建模的音频驱动人体动作视频生成方法，采用两阶段解耦架构（运动预测+渲染），结合区域感知注意力与Mamba增强扩散模型，在新构建的380小时高质量数据集上实现了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 传统关键点方法难以捕捉细微运动动态，且缺乏对整体外观与深度信息的联合建模能力；需更灵活、高效、端到端可学习的隐式运动建模范式。
AI.method: 提出两阶段隐式运动框架：第一阶段通过融合外观先验与分层深度线索的区域感知注意力机制建模潜在运动特征；第二阶段采用Mamba增强的扩散模型，以音频和源图像为条件直接预测运动特征，实现无监督细粒度运动学习。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准及自建数据集上，本方法在准确性、自然度和时序一致性方面均超越先前方法，达到新SOTA；模型在380小时高质量数据集上训练。
AI.conclusion: 解耦运动预测与渲染的隐式框架显著提升了音频驱动人体动作生成的质量与灵活性，验证了Mamba与扩散模型结合在时序建模中的有效性，为talk-head与协同语音手势生成提供了新范式。

title: ConTraIRL: Factorized Contrastive Abstractions for Transferable IRL
summary: Reward transfer in Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) is unreliable when policies must generalize to unseen combinations of environment dynamics and task goals. We propose Factorized Contrastive Abstractions for Transferable IRL (ConTraIRL), a framework that enables compositional reward transfer by learning decoupled latent representations of these two factors. ConTraIRL uses a dual-encoder architecture that maps observations into separate dynamics and goal latent spaces, trained with a dual contrastive objective. Temporal alignment encourages the dynamics encoder to learn goal-invariant structure, while the goal encoder captures dynamics-invariant features. This factorization supports reward inference under recombined dynamics-goal settings. Experiments on continuous control benchmarks demonstrate effective few-shot transfer to unseen dynamics-goal pairings, improving sample efficiency and reward recovery over transfer IRL baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConTraIRL框架，通过解耦环境动力学与任务目标的潜在表示，实现可组合的奖励迁移，提升逆强化学习在未见动力学-目标组合下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有逆强化学习（IRL）中的奖励迁移在策略需泛化至未见过的环境动力学与任务目标组合时不可靠。
AI.method: 提出Factorized Contrastive Abstractions for Transferable IRL（ConTraIRL），采用双编码器架构分别映射观测到动力学和目标潜在空间，并通过双重对比学习目标（含时间对齐）实现解耦表征学习。
AI.result: 在连续控制基准实验中，ConTraIRL在未见的动力学-目标配对上实现了有效的少样本迁移，提升了样本效率和奖励恢复性能，优于现有迁移IRL基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 解耦动力学与目标的潜在表示可显著增强IRL中奖励迁移的可组合性与泛化性，ConTraIRL为复杂、动态变化任务下的可迁移奖励建模提供了新范式。

title: Cross-Lingual Token Arbitrage: Optimizing Code Agent Context Windows via Local LLM Preprocessing
summary:
AI-assisted coding agents are bottlenecked by input-token cost. Two pathologies of raw human input drive much of this overhead: tokenization inefficiency for non-English text and structural entropy in conversational prompts. Existing approaches act reactively by compressing already-bloated contexts or intervening after failures occur.
  We introduce a pre-flight, edge-side prompt-rewriting middleware that operates between the developer and the cloud agent. A local Llama 3.2 (3B) model performs cross-lingual translation into English, structural rewriting into a compact task-oriented format, and regex-validated rewrite-with-fallback safeguards to ensure the optimized prompt is never larger than the original.
  We evaluate on OMH-Polyglot, a multilingual coding benchmark spanning Turkish, Arabic, Chinese, and code-switched specifications. Across three commercial LLM backends, the middleware reduces prompt tokens by 34-47 percent and total tokens by up to 18.8 percent while preserving or improving task accuracy. Ablation studies show that gains arise primarily from the rewriting stage rather than simple function-name extraction. Compared with LLMLingua-2 at matched compression rates, our method consistently achieves superior OckScore performance across all evaluated backends. These results demonstrate that proactive prompt optimization can substantially reduce inference costs without sacrificing coding quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种预检式边缘端提示重写中间件，利用本地小型模型对开发者输入进行跨语言翻译、结构化重写和安全验证，在不降低代码任务准确率的前提下显著减少输入token消耗。
AI.motivation: AI辅助编程代理受限于输入token成本，而原始人类输入存在非英语文本分词效率低和对话式提示结构熵高等两大问题，现有方法多为被动压缩或事后干预。
AI.method: 设计一个运行在开发者与云端代理之间的边缘侧提示重写中间件，使用本地Llama 3.2（3B）模型完成三步操作：跨语言翻译为英文、重写为紧凑任务导向格式、正则校验的重写-回退保障机制（确保优化后提示不比原提示更长）。
AI.result: 在OMH-Polyglot多语言编码基准（含土耳其语、阿拉伯语、中文及语码转换）上测试，该中间件在三个商用大模型后端上将提示token减少34–47%，总token减少最多18.8%，同时保持或提升任务准确率；消融实验表明收益主要来自结构重写而非简单函数名提取；相比LLMLingua-2，在相同压缩率下OckScore持续更优。
AI.conclusion: 主动式提示优化可在不牺牲编码质量的前提下显著降低推理成本，为AI编程代理提供高效、鲁棒、低成本的前端处理范式。

title: Semantic-weighted ICP for LiDAR Odometry: Class-Aware Residual Reweighting for Robust Scan Registration
summary: LiDAR odometry is a fundamental component of autonomous robotic systems, relying on geometric registration between consecutive point clouds to estimate ego-motion. However, traditional geometric approaches often degrade in dynamic or unstructured environments due to unreliable correspondences caused by moving objects, sparse geometric features, vegetation, and semantically ambiguous structures. Existing works have shown that, some of these limitations can be addressed by introducing semantic information from the environment in the registration process. In this work, we build on this, and show that not all elements in the environment are equally relevant for registration. Hence, we propose a semantic class-weighted ICP for LiDAR odometry. Instead of strictly filtering out points belonging to specific semantic classes, the proposed approach weights the residuals of points belonging to semantic categories based on their expected geometric stability. This strategy enables informative but potentially unstable structures, to contribute to the registration process while mitigating the influence of dynamic objects. The experimental evaluation was conducted on the SemanticKITTI and RELLIS-3D datasets, which include urban, highway, rural, and off-road environments. The empirical results show that the proposed Semantic-weighted ICP improves pose estimation, especially in challenging off-road scenarios where conventional rigid features are scarce. Furthermore, the analysis reveals that the effectiveness of this weighting strategy is highly environment-dependent, influenced by the structural and semantic composition of the scene.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种语义类别加权的ICP算法，通过为不同语义类别的点云赋予不同权重来提升LiDAR里程计在动态或非结构化环境中的位姿估计精度，尤其在越野等缺乏刚性特征的场景中效果显著。
AI.motivation: 传统几何配准方法在动态或非结构化环境中因移动物体、稀疏几何特征、植被及语义模糊结构导致对应关系不可靠而性能下降；引入语义信息可缓解部分问题，但并非所有语义元素对配准同等重要。
AI.method: 提出语义类别加权ICP：不直接滤除特定语义类别的点，而是根据各类别点的预期几何稳定性为其残差赋予权重，使信息丰富但可能不稳定的结构仍能参与配准，同时抑制动态物体影响。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和RELLIS-3D数据集（涵盖城市、高速、乡村及越野环境）上的实验表明，该方法提升了位姿估计精度，尤其在越野场景中优势明显；且加权策略的有效性高度依赖于场景的结构与语义组成。
AI.conclusion: 语义加权策略比简单语义滤除更有效，能自适应地平衡信息性与稳定性，但其性能受环境语义分布影响显著，需结合具体场景设计权重。

title: Evaluating LLMs' Effectiveness on Real-World Consumer Device Repair Questions
summary: Consumer device repair is an important but underexplored testbed for large language models (LLMs). Repair tasks require reasoning over incomplete problem descriptions, hardware-specific diagnostics, actionable troubleshooting, and safety-critical decisions, where incorrect advice can cause device damage, battery hazards, or permanent data loss. We introduce a benchmark of 991 real-world repair questions from Reddit spanning phone repair, computer repair, and data recovery, each paired with technician-written reference solutions, and provide Bangla translations to evaluate cross-lingual performance. We evaluate six state-of-the-art LLMs in English and Bangla using four repair-specific criteria: correctness, completeness, practicality, and safety. Our results show that while LLMs can provide useful repair assistance, they remain unreliable for high-risk real-world repair tasks without rigorous evaluation and explicit safety safeguards. Phone repair is the most difficult and safety-sensitive domain, and all models make substantial errors in board-level diagnosis, repair prioritization, and safe recovery procedures. Across domains and models, Bangla responses consistently perform worse than English responses. Among the evaluated models, GPT-5.4 performs best overall.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个包含991个真实维修问题的基准数据集，涵盖手机、电脑维修和数据恢复，并提供英文与孟加拉语版本，用于评估大语言模型在消费电子设备维修任务中的表现；结果表明当前LLM在安全性、实用性及跨语言能力上仍存在显著不足，尤其在手机维修等高风险场景中错误频发。
AI.motivation: 消费电子设备维修是一个重要但未被充分探索的大语言模型应用场景，其任务涉及不完整信息推理、硬件诊断、可操作排障及安全关键决策，而错误建议可能导致设备损坏、电池危险或数据永久丢失。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含991个来自Reddit的真实维修问题基准（覆盖手机、电脑维修与数据恢复），每个问题配有技术人员撰写的参考答案，并提供孟加拉语翻译以评估跨语言性能；在英语和孟加拉语上评估6个SOTA LLM，采用四个维修专属指标：正确性、完整性、实用性与安全性。
AI.result: 所有模型在高风险维修任务中仍不可靠，尤其在手机维修领域表现最差，普遍存在板级诊断错误、维修优先级误判和安全恢复流程缺陷；孟加拉语响应整体劣于英语；GPT-5.4在所有模型中综合表现最优。
AI.conclusion: 当前大语言模型尚不能独立承担高风险现实维修任务，需结合严格评估与显式安全机制方可实用化；跨语言能力（尤其低资源语言）仍是显著瓶颈。

title: SAMatcher: Co-Visibility Modeling with Segment Anything for Robust Feature Matching
summary: Reliable correspondence estimation is a fundamental problem in image processing, underpinning applications such as Structure from Motion, visual localization, and image registration. Existing learning-based methods have significantly improved local feature representations, yet most still operate at the pixel or patch level and lack explicit modeling of regions that are jointly visible across views. We propose SAMatcher, a feature matching framework that formulates correspondence estimation through co-visibility modeling. Instead of directly matching local features, SAMatcher first predicts co-visible region masks and bounding boxes as structured priors for correspondence estimation. Built upon the Segment Anything Model (SAM), it introduces a symmetric cross-view interaction mechanism that enables bidirectional feature exchange and cross-view semantic alignment. We further develop a unified supervision scheme that jointly optimizes mask prediction and box localization through mask learning, box regression, and mask-box consistency constraints. Extensive experiments on challenging benchmarks demonstrate substantial improvements over existing matching pipelines, particularly under large viewpoint and scale variations. Our results show that foundation models originally designed for monocular segmentation can be effectively extended to multi-view correspondence reasoning through explicit co-visibility modeling, offering a new perspective on structured representation learning for image matching. Code and project page: https://xupan.top/Projects/samatcher

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAMatcher，一种基于共可见性建模的特征匹配框架，利用Segment Anything Model（SAM）预测共可见区域掩码和边界框作为结构化先验，并通过双向跨视图交互与统一监督机制提升多视角对应估计性能，尤其在大视角和尺度变化下效果显著。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的方法虽提升了局部特征表示，但大多停留在像素或图像块级别，缺乏对跨视角联合可见区域的显式建模，限制了复杂几何变化下的匹配鲁棒性。
AI.method: SAMatcher基于SAM构建，首先预测跨视角共可见区域掩码和边界框作为结构化先验；引入对称跨视图交互机制实现双向特征交换与语义对齐；并设计统一监督方案，联合优化掩码预测、边界框回归及掩码-框一致性约束。
AI.result: 在多个挑战性基准上显著优于现有匹配方法，尤其在大视角差和尺度变化场景下提升明显；验证了单目分割基础模型可经共可见性建模有效迁移到多视角匹配任务。
AI.conclusion: 显式共可见性建模为图像匹配提供了新思路，表明基础模型可通过结构化表征学习拓展至多视图几何推理任务。

title: Will Accurate Fields Mislead Photonic Design? FromGlobal Accuracy to Port Readout
summary: Neural field surrogates can accelerate photonic design loops, but a surrogate that looks accurate in global field error can still mis-rank candidate devices when the final decision depends on localized output-port readouts. This risk is acute in propagation-dominated MMI splitters and couplers, where port power, splitting, phase, and coupling are determined by accumulated modal interference and output-window aggregation rather than by average field similarity alone. We study this field-to-design mismatch through a Field/Mediator/Readout view that separates dense complex-field error from propagation-profile and output-window errors before port aggregation. To align the surrogate with this chain, we propose PaNO, a propagation-aligned neural operator that keeps the full-field prediction interface while organizing latent states around local boundary structure, transverse modal content, axial propagation, and cross-mode interaction. We also evaluate PaNO-R2, an output-aware feedback variant for residual field components near the port region. On a 15-wavelength tunable $3{\times}3$ MMI benchmark with 4608 held-out fields, PaNO lowers NeurOLight's port-power error from 0.2018 to 0.0739 despite slightly higher cMAE, showing that global field accuracy alone is not sufficient for design-relevant readout fidelity. PaNO-R2 attains the best cMAE, propagation-profile error, output-profile error, and port-power error, reducing NeurOLight's port-power and output-profile errors by 72.7\% and 72.5\%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PaNO和PaNO-R2两种神经算子，旨在解决光子器件设计中全局场误差与端口读出精度不一致的问题，尤其针对MMI分束器和耦合器；通过分离场误差、传播轮廓误差和输出窗口误差，并在潜空间建模边界结构、横模内容、轴向传播及模间相互作用，显著提升端口功率等设计关键指标的预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有神经场代理模型虽在全局场误差上表现良好，但常无法准确排序候选器件，因其最终设计决策依赖于局部输出端口读出（如功率、相位、耦合），而这些由累积模干涉和输出窗口聚合决定，而非平均场相似性。
AI.method: 提出Field/Mediator/Readout分析框架，将误差分解为场误差、传播轮廓误差和输出窗口误差；设计PaNO（Propagation-aligned Neural Operator），在保持全场预测接口的同时，使潜变量显式建模局部边界结构、横模成分、轴向传播和模间相互作用；进一步提出PaNO-R2，在端口区域对残差场进行输出感知反馈校正。
AI.result: 在15波长可调3×3 MMI基准测试（4608个保留样本）中，PaNO将NeurOLight的端口功率误差从0.2018降至0.0739；PaNO-R2进一步将端口功率误差和输出轮廓误差分别降低72.7%和72.5%，同时取得最优cMAE、传播轮廓误差和输出轮廓误差。
AI.conclusion: 全局场精度不能保证设计相关读出精度；显式对齐传播物理机制的神经算子（如PaNO/PaNO-R2）可显著提升光子逆设计中端口级指标的保真度与可靠性。

title: Bridging Auxiliary Constraints to Resolve Instruction Following in Large Reasoning Models
summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in many tasks, yet they struggle with reliably following multiple instructions, either by failing to satisfy individual constraints or by struggling to balance competing constraints simultaneously. We formalize this challenge as the Constraint Adherence Problem (CAP). This paper introduces a novel framework that addresses CAP by representing instructions as a structured knowledge graph of constraints. Our approach, Constraint Relationship Graph Completion (CRGC), explicitly models relationships between constraints, identifies adherence challenges, and discovers ``bridge constraints'' that help the model better focus on and reconcile requirements. Bridge constraints act as auxiliary instructions that make primary constraints more salient and compatible. Unlike existing approaches that enhance instruction following through general training methods, CRGC specifically improves constraint satisfaction by leveraging the model's own knowledge to create better pathways for generation. Experiments across three popular instruction following datasets demonstrate that our approach reduces constraint violations by 39% compared to standard prompting while maintaining reasoning abilities of large reasoning models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Constraint Relationship Graph Completion (CRGC)框架，通过构建约束关系图并引入‘桥接约束’来提升大推理模型对多指令、多约束的遵循能力，在多个数据集上将约束违反率降低39%。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型（LRMs）在多指令遵循任务中难以可靠满足多个甚至相互冲突的约束，亟需系统性建模和解决该约束遵循问题。
AI.method: 将指令形式化为结构化的约束知识图谱，提出CRGC方法显式建模约束间关系，识别遵循难点，并自动生成能增强主约束显著性与兼容性的‘桥接约束’。
AI.result: 在三个主流指令遵循数据集上，CRGC相比标准提示方法减少39%的约束违反，同时保持模型原有推理能力。
AI.conclusion: CRGC通过利用模型自身知识构建更优生成路径，是一种针对约束遵循问题的高效、可解释且无需额外训练的新型指令优化框架。

title: Multi-Robot Bearing-only Pose Estimation via Angle Rigidity
summary: This letter proposes a novel distributed bearing-based pose estimator for time-varying multi-robot systems. The method uses angles computed from body-frame bearings to estimate the robots' positions in $\mathbb{R}^3$ without knowledge of their orientations. The orientations in $\mathrm{SO}(3)$ are recovered from the estimated positions, the bearings, and the bearing derivatives. The proposed observer only requires the (directed) sensing topology to be \textit{angle-rigid}, a weaker condition than the commonly used ones like bearing rigidity. Local uniform exponential stability of the proposed observer is established under the assumption of persistently exciting motions for a subset of robots. Simulations are presented and discussed to evaluate the scheme's effectiveness and practicality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型分布式基于角度的位姿估计器，用于时变多机器人系统，仅利用机体坐标系下的角度测量，在未知机器人朝向的情况下估计其三维位置，并从位置、角度及角度导数中恢复朝向；该方法仅要求传感拓扑满足较弱的‘角度刚性’条件，并在部分机器人持续激励运动假设下证明了观测器的局部一致指数稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于角度的位姿估计方法通常依赖较强的拓扑条件（如角度刚性），且难以在未知朝向情况下实现三维位置与朝向联合估计；本文旨在设计一种更弱拓扑要求、无需先验朝向信息、适用于时变系统的分布式估计方案。
AI.method: 提出一种分布式观测器，利用机体坐标系下测得的方位角及其时间导数，通过几何约束建模，在R^3中估计机器人位置；再结合估计位置、原始方位角及方位角导数，反解SO(3)中的朝向；理论分析采用李雅普诺夫方法证明局部一致指数稳定性，条件为部分机器人运动持续激励且传感拓扑满足角度刚性。
AI.result: 所提观测器在角度刚性拓扑和持续激励运动条件下实现了局部一致指数稳定；仿真验证了其在时变多机器人系统中对三维位置与朝向的联合估计有效性及鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法降低了对传感拓扑的刚性要求，实现了无需初始朝向信息的分布式三维位姿估计，为动态多机器人协同定位提供了新思路与理论保障。

title: Lingo_Research_Group at SemEval-2026 Task 9: Evaluating Prompt Variants for Polarization Detection
comment: Accepted at the SemEval Workshop, ACL 2026
summary: Our submission presented in this paper is for SemEval-2026 Task 9: Multilingual Text Classification Challenge - Polarization Detection and it covers all three subtasks: (1) binary polarization detection, (2) polarization type classification and (3) polarization manifestation identification. We adopt a systematic approach of research on short designed prompts by considering twelve designed prompts that are different in terminology clarity, detail of the definition, guidance of reasoning and in-context examples use. The experiments are conducted using aya-101 and Gemma3-27B, with the latter chosen for the submission at the end of the development through performance considerations. Our system has an average macro level F1-score of 0.762 on Subtask 1, 0.587 on Subtask 2 and 0.444 on Subtask 3 with the average accuracy of 0.819, 0.678 and 0.498, respectively, on the official test set averaged among 22 languages, respectively. With cross-task and cross-lingual analysis, we demonstrate that prompt-based approaches can be used effectively to detect coarse grained polarization but encounter more and more difficulties as far as fine-grained and multi-label sociolinguistic classification is concerned.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于精心设计提示（prompt）的多语言极化检测方法，参与SemEval-2026 Task 9，涵盖二分类极化检测、极化类型分类和极化表现识别三个子任务；使用aya-101和Gemma3-27B模型，最终提交采用后者，在22种语言平均上取得F1分别为0.762、0.587、0.444的成绩；分析表明提示法适用于粗粒度极化检测，但在细粒度、多标签社会语言学分类中效果下降。
AI.motivation: 解决多语言环境下细粒度极化检测（尤其是类型与表现识别）的挑战，探索提示工程在跨语言、跨任务场景下的有效性与局限性。
AI.method: 系统性研究12种短提示设计，差异体现在术语清晰度、定义详尽程度、推理引导强度及上下文示例使用；采用aya-101和Gemma3-27B进行实验，最终选用性能更优的Gemma3-27B提交；开展跨任务与跨语言分析。
AI.result: 在官方测试集22种语言平均结果：子任务1（二分类）宏F1=0.762，准确率=0.819；子任务2（类型分类）宏F1=0.587，准确率=0.678；子任务3（表现识别）宏F1=0.444，准确率=0.498。
AI.conclusion: 提示工程对粗粒度极化检测有效，但面对细粒度、多标签的社会语言学分类任务时性能显著下降，凸显其当前局限性。

title: Enginuity: A Dataset and Benchmark for Vision-Language Understanding of Engineering Diagrams
summary: Engineering diagrams pose a distinct challenge for vision-language models: unlike natural images or general documents, they encode information through dense spatial layouts, domain-specific symbols, and cross-references between visual callouts and structured parts tables. Despite their centrality to service, repair, and design workflows, there is no public benchmark for measuring VLM capabilities in this domain; existing datasets primarily focus on flowcharts, scientific figures, or business documents. To address this gap, we introduce Enginuity, the first open dataset and benchmark for evaluating VLMs on complex engineering diagrams. We define two tasks over a corpus of U.S. military service and repair manuals: structured parts-table extraction (Task 1) and free-form visual diagram question answering (VQA)(Task 2) for benchmarking. We evaluate four frontier VLMs (GPT-5.2 Chat, Claude Opus 4.7, Gemma 4, Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct) under zero-shot and chain-of-thought prompting. On Task 1, models reach Recall@all of 0.61-0.87 but Token F1pen of only 0.03-0.18, exposing a systematic gap between part identification and description fidelity. Task 2 reveals a consistent factual-reasoning gap across all models. A supporting analysis shows that token-overlap metrics under-report model capability on technical descriptions by 2-6x relative to semantic similarity, motivating LLM-as-judge calibration for domain-specific evaluation. We release the dataset, annotations, evaluation harness, and per-sample model outputs to support a reproducible study of VLM capability on engineering content.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Enginuity，首个面向工程图纸的公开数据集与评测基准，定义了结构化零件表抽取和自由式视觉问答两项任务，并评测了多个前沿多模态大模型，揭示了其在技术描述准确性和事实推理能力上的显著不足。
AI.motivation: 工程图纸在服务、维修和设计流程中至关重要，但现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）缺乏专门针对其密集空间布局、领域符号和图文交叉引用特点的评测基准；当前公开数据集主要覆盖流程图、科学图表或商业文档，无法反映真实工程场景挑战。
AI.method: 构建Enginuity数据集——基于美国军用维修手册，定义两项任务：（1）结构化零件表抽取（Task 1），（2）自由式工程图纸视觉问答（Task 2）；采用零样本与思维链提示，在GPT-5.2 Chat、Claude Opus 4.7、Gemma 4、Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct四个前沿VLM上进行评测；引入LLM-as-judge校准评估，以弥补传统token重叠指标在技术语义评估中的严重低估问题。
AI.result: Task 1中模型零件识别召回率（Recall@all）达0.61–0.87，但描述精度（Token F1pen）仅0.03–0.18；Task 2暴露出所有模型一致的事实推理缺陷；分析表明，传统token重叠指标比语义相似度评估低2–6倍，验证了LLM-as-judge校准的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 工程图纸理解对VLM构成独特挑战，现有模型在结构化信息提取的描述保真度和开放问答的事实推理上均存在系统性短板；Enginuity为该领域提供了首个可复现、可扩展的评测基础设施，并呼吁发展面向技术文档的细粒度、语义感知评估范式。

title: What Do Students Learn? A Feature-Level Analysis of Dark Knowledge
summary: Knowledge Distillation (KD) is a powerful tool for model compression, yet the precise mechanisms by which student models acquire feature representations remain underexplored. In this work, we analyze student feature learning using the Interaction Tensor framework. Our analysis reveals that effective KD acts as a regularizer that prunes low-frequency, sample-specific features, encouraging the student to rely on a compact set of highly reusable features. Crucially, we observe that the dataset-level confusion matrix contains structural information analogous to the teacher's "Dark Knowledge." Leveraging this insight, we propose Confusion Distillation (CD), a teacher-free self-distillation method that utilizes the model's own evolving confusion patterns as dynamic soft targets. CD achieves competitive performance on ResNet-34 and ResNet-50 for CIFAR-100, outperforming existing self-distillation methods like CS-KD and PS-KD by 1.2% while offering a computationally efficient alternative to standard KD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需教师模型的自蒸馏方法Confusion Distillation（CD），利用模型自身演化的混淆矩阵作为动态软目标，在CIFAR-100上超越现有自蒸馏方法，且计算高效。
AI.motivation: 知识蒸馏中学生模型如何学习特征表示尚不明确，且现有方法依赖教师模型，限制了应用灵活性和计算效率。
AI.method: 基于Interaction Tensor框架分析学生特征学习机制，发现有效蒸馏具有正则化作用；进一步发现数据集级混淆矩阵蕴含类似教师‘暗知识’的结构信息，据此提出无需教师的Confusion Distillation（CD）方法，以模型自身演化混淆模式为动态软目标。
AI.result: CD在CIFAR-100上ResNet-34/50上性能优于CS-KD和PS-KD约1.2%，且计算开销低于标准知识蒸馏。
AI.conclusion: 学生模型可通过自身混淆模式实现高效自蒸馏；混淆矩阵是可挖掘的‘暗知识’来源，CD为轻量、可扩展的知识蒸馏提供了新范式。

title: TSQAgent: Rating Time Series Data Quality via Dedicated Agentic Reasoning
summary: Assessing the quality of time series (TS) data is fundamental yet inherently challenging due to the multifaceted nature of quality dimensions. Recently, large language models (LLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for TS quality assessment via pairwise comparison and per-dimension evaluation. However, existing approaches rely on manually predefined quality dimensions and purely text-based reasoning, leaving it unknown whether LLMs can identify truly relevant quality dimensions or perform grounded and quantitative quality comparisons. To investigate this, we construct TSQBench, a dedicated benchmark for evaluating LLMs on two progressive capabilities: (i) understanding and identifying relevant quality dimensions, and (ii) performing quality comparison under specific dimensions. Our analysis reveals that current LLMs consistently struggle with both dimension identification and evidence-grounded quality comparison. To address these limitations, we propose TSQAgent, a novel agentic reasoning framework for TS quality rating consisting of three collaborative roles: Perceiver for focused dimension selection, Inspector for dimension-wise quantitative analysis, and Adjudicator that aggregates and refines the final judgment. In particular, we introduce an agentic reasoning strategy that instills the ability to identify and prioritize the most relevant quality dimensions, and further propose an agent workflow equipped with external analytical tools to enable precise quantitative comparisons over selected dimensions. Experiments on both the proposed benchmark and eleven real-world datasets demonstrate that our framework not only substantially improves LLMs' capabilities in quality understanding and quantitative comparison but also effectively translates these improvements into better quality-aware data selection, leading to enhanced downstream performance and data efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TSQBench基准测试和TSQAgent框架，旨在提升大语言模型在时间序列数据质量评估中的维度识别与定量比较能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的时间序列质量评估方法依赖人工预定义质量维度且仅进行文本推理，难以识别真正相关维度或开展有依据的定量比较。
AI.method: 构建TSQBench基准（评估维度理解与特定维度下质量比较能力），并提出TSQAgent多角色代理推理框架（Perceiver、Inspector、Adjudicator），结合外部分析工具实现维度选择与定量分析。
AI.result: 实验表明TSQAgent显著提升LLMs在质量理解与定量比较上的能力，并在真实数据集上验证其能提升下游任务性能与数据效率。
AI.conclusion: TSQAgent通过引入代理式推理与外部工具协同，有效解决了LLM在时间序列质量评估中维度识别不准与缺乏定量依据的问题，为数据质量驱动的智能分析提供了新范式。

title: PointAction: 3D Points as Universal Action Representations for Robot Control
summary: Video-Action Models (VAMs) leverage the broad visual dynamics captured by pre-trained video diffusion models, offering a promising path toward generalizable robot manipulation. However, RGB-only video rollouts are not directly actionable: they leave metric 3D motion, contact geometry, and fine-grained spatial constraints under-specified, making action grounding ambiguous. Meanwhile, scaling action supervision across diverse tasks and embodiments remains costly. We present PointAction, a framework that bridges video predictions to robot actions through explicit point-based 4D modeling. PointAction fine-tunes a foundation video generation model to jointly predict future RGB frames and dynamic 3D pointmaps, producing temporally consistent 3D motion of task-relevant scene geometry. These point dynamics serve as a structured, embodiment-agnostic action interface, which a diffusion-based action decoder maps to executable robot actions. By using metric 3D point dynamics as the interface between video prediction and control, PointAction reduces the ambiguity of RGB-only action grounding and supports transfer across tasks and embodiments with limited action supervision. Experiments show that PointAction achieves state-of-the-art 4D generation quality on robot scenes, outperforms existing baselines in simulation, and generalizes to two real robot arms unseen during pretraining.

AI.tldr: PointAction 提出了一种通过显式点基4D建模将视频预测桥接到机器人动作的新框架，利用RGB视频与动态3D点图联合预测，提升动作泛化性与可执行性。
AI.motivation: RGB-only视频预测无法直接提供可执行的机器人动作，因其缺乏度量3D运动、接触几何和精细空间约束；同时，跨任务和本体的动作监督获取成本高。
AI.method: PointAction微调基础视频生成模型，联合预测未来RGB帧和动态3D点图，生成任务相关场景几何的时序一致3D运动；再通过扩散式动作解码器将点动力学映射为具体机器人动作。
AI.result: 在机器人场景4D生成质量上达到SOTA；仿真中优于现有基线；并成功泛化至两个预训练未见的真实机械臂。
AI.conclusion: 以度量3D点动力学作为视频预测与控制之间的接口，PointAction有效缓解了RGB动作接地的歧义性，并支持低监督下的跨任务与跨本体迁移。

title: The Unsampled Truth: Psychometrics in SLMs Measure Prompt Artifacts, Not Psychological Constructs
summary: When prompting SLMs for psychometric assessments, researchers assume the outputs reflect semantic reasoning. We evaluate this premise across 13 open-weights models (0.6B to 14B parameters) using a prompt variation framework that separates semantic signals from prompt artifacts. By systematically varying personas, instructions, items, and option symbols, we find that artifactual variance frequently overpowers the semantic signal. In these cases, models predominantly reflect prompt compliance rather than simulated psychological traits. While these findings limit SLM utility in psychometrics, our framework provides a diagnostic tool to identify destructive artifacts and isolate semantic understanding for future frontier-model research.

AI.tldr: 本文通过提示词变化框架评估小语言模型（SLMs）在心理测量评估中的语义推理能力，发现提示词人工痕迹常压倒语义信号，模型更多体现提示遵从性而非心理特质模拟。
AI.motivation: 研究者在使用小语言模型进行心理测量评估时，默认其输出反映语义推理，但该前提缺乏验证。
AI.method: 构建提示词变化框架，系统改变角色设定、指令、题目和选项符号，在13个开源权重模型（0.6B–14B参数）上分离语义信号与提示人工痕迹。
AI.result: 人工痕迹变异常显著强于语义信号；模型输出主要由提示结构驱动，而非内在心理特质模拟。
AI.conclusion: 当前SLMs在心理测量中可靠性受限；所提框架可作为诊断工具识别有害人工痕迹，并助力未来大模型的语义理解研究。

title: A unified multi-task framework enables interpretable chest radiograph analysis
summary: While multimodal deep learning has advanced medical imaging analysis, existing black-box systems \textcolor{black}{may remain confined to isolated tasks, often overlooking} the trust-sensitive nature of clinical diagnosis as a multi-task process. We propose IMT-CXR (Interpretable Multi-task Transformer for Chest X-ray Analysis), a framework that emulates radiologists' diagnostic workflow through three evidence-driven stages: 1) Disease recognition; 2) Attribute characterization (e.g., size, location, severity quantification); 3) Evidence-integrated report generation with traceable decision pathways. The framework employs a unified transformer architecture optimized via medical-domain instruction tuning, sequentially executing four clinical tasks: multi-label disease classification, lesion localization, anatomical segmentation, and radiology report generation. Experimental validation demonstrates competitive performance on ten CXR benchmarks under direct inference and fine-tuning settings. In a blinded evaluation of 160 historical reports from four medical centers, three radiologists rated 66\% of AI-generated reports as comparable to or surpassing original clinical reports in diagnostic clarity, highlighting the framework's translational potential. By establishing traceable diagnostic pathways from anatomical findings to conclusions, this work bridges the gap between AI technical metrics and clinical utility, advancing trustworthy AI systems in medical imaging.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IMT-CXR框架，一种可解释的多任务Transformer模型，模拟放射科医生诊断流程，分三阶段（疾病识别、属性刻画、证据整合报告生成）完成四项临床任务，在多个CXR基准上表现优异，并获放射科医生高度评价。
AI.motivation: 现有医学影像多模态黑箱模型局限于单任务，忽视临床诊断作为多任务、高可信度需求过程的本质，缺乏可追溯的决策路径。
AI.method: 提出IMT-CXR：基于统一Transformer架构，经医学领域指令微调，按三阶段（疾病识别→属性刻画→报告生成）执行四任务（多标签分类、病灶定位、解剖分割、报告生成），强调证据驱动与路径可解释性。
AI.result: 在十个CXR基准上性能领先；盲评中66%的AI生成报告被三位放射科医生评为等同或优于原始临床报告。
AI.conclusion: IMT-CXR通过构建从解剖发现到诊断结论的可追溯路径，弥合了AI技术指标与临床实用性的鸿沟，推动医学影像中可信AI的发展。

title: Rethinking Molecular Text Representations for LLMs: An Empirical Study
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for molecular tasks, but it remains unclear which molecular representation to use. We present a systematic benchmark evaluating LLM molecular competence across nine representations and eight chemical tasks. We benchmark 16 LLMs across five model families, including reasoning and non-reasoning variants, chemistry-specialized LLMs, and closed frontier models. Performance is strongly representation-dependent and no single representation wins across tasks, though CML is the best, followed by MolJSON, InChI, and then canonical SMILES. Explicit structured text representations (CML and MolJSON) dominate structural tasks; IUPAC dominates semantic tasks, winning molecule retrieval for all 16 LLMs; and SMILES variants are rarely optimal despite their prevalence in pretraining. Chemistry-specialized models perform well with SMILES at the cost of large degradations with structured text representations, suggesting SMILES-only evaluation rewards specialization that does not generalize. Using LLM-as-a-judge, we find that IUPAC produces the highest fraction of correct molecule generations. A mechanistic study via tokenization audits, linear probes and attention shows that representations are encoded differently inside the model; for example, structured representations require higher attention across the molecular span. Our results argue against representation-invariant evaluation and motivate task-aware representation routing for LLM-based chemistry.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了16个大语言模型在8种化学任务中对9种分子表示法的表现，发现没有单一表示法在所有任务中都最优；CML和MolJSON等结构化文本表示在结构任务中表现最佳，IUPAC在语义任务（如分子检索）中全面胜出，而广泛使用的SMILES并非最优；研究还揭示了不同表示法在模型内部编码机制上的差异，并主张采用任务感知的表示路由而非统一评估。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在分子任务中日益普及，但尚不清楚应选用何种分子表示法；现有评估多依赖SMILES，可能片面奖励化学专用模型而忽略泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建涵盖9种分子表示（CML、MolJSON、InChI、SMILES等）和8种化学任务的系统性基准；评测16个LLM（含推理/非推理、化学专用、闭源前沿模型）；结合LLM-as-a-judge评估生成质量；通过分词审计、线性探针和注意力分析探究表征机制。
AI.result: CML整体最优，其次为MolJSON、InChI和canonical SMILES；结构化表示（CML/MolJSON）主导结构任务，IUPAC主导语义任务（尤其分子检索）；SMILES在多数任务中非最优；化学专用模型在SMILES上表现好但在结构化表示上显著退化；IUPAC生成正确率最高；结构化表示需更高跨分子跨度注意力。
AI.conclusion: 分子表示选择高度依赖具体任务，不存在普适最优表示；当前基于SMILES的评估存在偏差，易高估专用模型；应摒弃表示无关的统一评估范式，转向任务感知的表示路由机制。

title: Gender-Dependent Diagnostic Substitution in LLM Medical Triage: Same Symptoms, Unequal Urgency
comment: 7 pages, 3 tables. Multi-model replication across Gemini, Claude, and GPT. Code and data: https://github.com/wongqihan/ai-behavioral-experiments
summary: We investigate whether large language models produce different medical triage recommendations for identical neurological symptoms when only the patient's stated gender and age vary. Using three model families--Gemini 3.5 Flash, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and GPT-5.4-mini--we present a standardized symptom profile (persistent headache, blurred vision, morning nausea, visual disturbances) across seven demographic conditions: three age groups (25, 38, 65) x two genders (male, female), plus a gender-unspecified baseline (n = 30 per condition per model, 630 total trials). We find a stark, systemic gender-dependent triage disparity: young women receive significantly lower emergency room (ER) referral rates than age-matched men (Gemini: 0% vs. 23.3%; Claude: 6.7% vs. 96.7%; GPT: 6.7% vs. 66.7%, all p < 0.001). The disparity disappears at age 65 for all models. The primary mechanism is diagnostic substitution: the models anchor on a gender-associated diagnosis, preferentially classifying young women with Idiopathic Intracranial Hypertension (IIH)--a condition epidemiologically linked to women of childbearing age--while diagnosing men with generic increased intracranial pressure with space-occupying lesions in the differential. This diagnostic closure routes female patients to lower-urgency care (outpatient doctor appointments) despite comparable severity ratings (7-9/10). Our findings demonstrate that clinical LLMs replicate documented human clinical biases by using epidemiological priors to suppress triage urgency, suggesting that AI triage engines must decouple urgency assessment from probabilistic diagnostic priors. We release all code, prompts, and raw results.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现大型语言模型在处理相同神经系统症状时，会因患者性别和年龄不同而给出不同的医疗分诊建议，尤其对年轻女性显著低估急诊需求，主要原因是模型基于流行病学先验进行诊断替代，将年轻女性症状归因为特发性颅内高压（IIH），从而降低分诊紧迫性。
AI.motivation: 探究大语言模型是否在医疗分诊中复现人类临床中的性别与年龄偏见，特别是在神经系统症状评估中是否存在系统性偏差。
AI.method: 使用Gemini 3.5 Flash、Claude Sonnet 4.6和GPT-5.4-mini三个模型家族，对同一标准化神经系统症状组合（持续头痛、视力模糊、晨起恶心、视觉障碍）在七种人口统计条件（3个年龄×2个性别+1个无性别标注基线）下进行630次分诊测试，分析ER转诊率及诊断倾向。
AI.result: 年轻女性（25岁、38岁）的急诊室转诊率显著低于同龄男性（p<0.001），而65岁时差异消失；模型普遍将年轻女性症状锚定于IIH诊断，男性则更常被归为需紧急排查占位性病变的颅内压增高，导致女性被导向低紧迫性门诊处置，尽管症状严重度评分相当（7–9/10）。
AI.conclusion: 临床大语言模型会复制并放大已知的人类临床偏见，其根源在于将诊断概率先验错误地耦合进紧迫性判断；因此AI分诊系统必须将紧迫性评估与诊断先验解耦。

title: Preference-Calibrated Human-in-the-Loop Reinforcement Learning for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Human-in-the-loop reinforcement learning (HIL-RL) improves sample efficiency in real-robot manipulation through online human intervention. However, successful trajectories may include suboptimal actions that deviate from the desired task-execution path and force human intervention. Existing HIL-RL methods typically apply the consistent credit assignment principle to all transitions, uniformly propagating discounted terminal rewards through suboptimal segments, ignoring the actual contribution of each transition to task success. This overestimates Q-values for critic learning and indirectly misguides actor updates toward suboptimal behavior patterns. To this end, we propose PACT, a Preference-calibrated Actor-Critic Training framework that leverages the implicit preference signals induced by intervention to perform credit reassignment on identified suboptimal segments while directly guiding policy training for unbiased critic-actor learning. Specifically, we first design a progress model that learns from human demonstration and identifies suboptimal segments for credit correction. Then, from the human action and resampled policy action at the intervention state, we build preference pairs to define a counterfactual advantage that penalizes Bellman targets of the identified suboptimal segment, enabling directional credit calibration. Moreover, we directly align the policy with human corrective actions in the bounded mean space, providing an additional signal beyond critic-guided updates. Across five real-robot manipulation tasks, PACT improves the average success rate by 24.5% and achieves 1.3 times faster convergence, thereby improving both RL sample efficiency and performance. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/HILRL-A1X-BC05.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PACT框架，通过利用人类干预隐含的偏好信号，对次优动作片段进行信用重分配，并直接引导策略训练，从而提升人机协同强化学习在真实机器人操作任务中的样本效率和成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有HIL-RL方法对所有转移统一进行信用分配，忽略各转移对任务成功的实际贡献，导致Q值高估和策略学习偏差。
AI.method: 提出PACT框架：1）构建进度模型识别次优片段；2）基于干预时刻的人类动作与策略动作构建偏好对，定义反事实优势以惩罚贝尔曼目标；3）在有界均值空间中将策略直接对齐人类修正动作。
AI.result: 在五个真实机器人操作任务上，PACT平均成功率提升24.5%，收敛速度加快1.3倍。
AI.conclusion: PACT通过偏好校准实现更精准的信用分配和策略更新，在真实机器人HIL-RL中显著提升样本效率与性能。

title: EntSQL: A Benchmark for Grounding Text-to-SQL in Long-Context Enterprise Knowledge
summary: Text-to-SQL enables natural language access to databases, and recent LLMs have substantially advanced its capabilities. Existing benchmarks such as Spider, BIRD, and Spider~2.0 evaluate schema generalization, large-scale databases, and realistic workflows, but largely overlook enterprise scenarios where SQL generation depends on private business knowledge, such as internal metrics, reporting conventions, and organizational rules. We introduce EntSQL, an enterprise-oriented Text-to-SQL benchmark for evaluating long-context grounding over proprietary business documents. EntSQL contains 1,066 aligned Chinese-English semantic examples across five business domains, with most examples requiring domain knowledge beyond the question and schema and involving complex SQL structures. On English inputs, the best evaluated system reaches only 15.9\% when long-form documents are provided, highlighting the difficulty of grounding SQL generation in enterprise knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向企业场景的Text-to-SQL基准EntSQL，聚焦于长上下文下对私有业务文档的知识 grounding，揭示了现有模型在利用企业内部知识生成SQL方面的严重不足。
AI.motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL基准（如Spider、BIRD）未充分覆盖企业场景，而企业SQL生成高度依赖私有业务知识（如内部指标、报表规范、组织规则），亟需专门评估基准。
AI.method: 构建EntSQL基准：包含1066个中英双语语义对齐样本，覆盖五大业务领域；强调需结合问题、数据库schema及长篇私有业务文档才能正确生成SQL。
AI.result: 在英文输入下，当前最优系统在提供长文档时准确率仅为15.9%，显著低于通用基准表现，验证了企业级Text-to-SQL任务的高难度。
AI.conclusion: EntSQL填补了企业级Text-to-SQL评估的空白，凸显了大模型在长上下文知识 grounding 方面的重大挑战，为后续研究提供了新方向和严格评测标准。

title: IDO: Incongruity-aware Distribution Optimization for Multimodal Fake News Detection
summary: Multimodal fake news detection aims to identify the authenticity of news. Existing multimodal fake news detection methods mainly focus on cross-modal consistency, but often fail to explicitly model the semantic incongruity that characterizes deceptive multimodal content. However, misinformation often contains semantic information incongruity with the facts. To address these challenges, we propose Incongruity-aware Distribution Optimization (IDO) to improve the performance of fake news detection from the perspectives of factual incongruity and modality incongruity. For factual incongruity, we introduce a channel-wise reweighting strategy to obtain semantically discriminative embeddings and utilize gaussian distribution to model the uncertain correlation caused by factual incongruity. For modality incongruity, we utilize incongruity contrastive learning to learn cross-modal semantic information. Experiments demonstrate that IDO achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Incongruity-aware Distribution Optimization (IDO)的方法，用于提升多模态假新闻检测性能，通过建模事实不一致性与模态不一致性来增强语义判别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要关注跨模态一致性，却未能显式建模虚假多模态内容中典型的语义不一致性（即与事实不符或模态间语义冲突），而该不一致性恰恰是误导性信息的关键特征。
AI.method: 提出IDO框架：1）针对事实不一致性，采用通道级重加权策略获取判别性嵌入，并用高斯分布建模其不确定性；2）针对模态不一致性，引入不一致性对比学习以增强跨模态语义理解。
AI.result: 实验表明IDO在多个基准数据集上达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模语义不一致性（包括事实与模态两个层面）能有效提升多模态假新闻检测的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: Learn When and Where to Connect: Adaptive Virtual Nodes for Dynamic Message Passing on Graphs
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, 10 tables, 32nd ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD 2026)
summary: While Virtual Nodes (VNs) are often utilized in Message Passing Neural Networks (MPNNs) to facilitate effective message passing, existing VN-based methods have limitations, such as constraining all nodes to connect to the same number of VNs, fixing the connections before applying MPNNs, and connecting a node to a VN independently of the other nodes that connect to the same VN. We propose MAVN, an end-to-end differentiable MPNN framework that allows non-constrained connections between nodes and VNs and dynamically introduces VNs on demand in response to evolving node representations across layers. Specifically, MAVN learns to adaptively determine when (at which layer) and where (to which nodes) to introduce and connect VNs based on the relative importance of connections. From a pool of candidate VNs, MAVN selects the necessary VNs in each layer, where each selected VN is connected to a nonempty subset of nodes, guided by a dual-perspective scoring mechanism that jointly captures the nodes' preferences for VNs and the VNs' preferences for nodes. We theoretically prove that for any node-VN connectivity pattern, there exists a set of MAVN's parameters that can simulate the pattern. Experiments on nine real-world datasets demonstrate that MAVN consistently improves the performance of backbone MPNNs, achieving up to 46.5% improvement over the backbones and outperforms the baselines.

AI.tldr: MAVN是一种端到端可微的MPNN框架，通过动态、自适应地引入和连接虚拟节点（VNs），克服了现有VN方法的诸多限制，在多个数据集上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于虚拟节点（VNs）的消息传递神经网络（MPNNs）方法存在连接约束固定、预设连接、节点间独立连接等局限性，限制了模型表达能力与灵活性。
AI.method: MAVN提出一种端到端可微框架：在每一层从候选VN池中按需选择必要VNs；采用双视角打分机制联合建模节点对VN和VN对节点的偏好；动态决定在何层、向哪些节点引入VN，并理论证明其可模拟任意节点-VN连接模式。
AI.result: 在九个真实世界数据集上实验表明，MAVN持续提升各类骨干MPNN性能，最高相较骨干模型提升46.5%，且全面优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MAVN通过动态、自适应、可学习的虚拟节点引入与连接机制，显著增强了MPNN的建模能力与泛化性能，为图神经网络中虚拟节点的设计提供了新范式。

title: Towards Non-Monotonic Entailment in Propositional Defeasible Standpoint Logic
summary: Recent work in defeasible reasoning has seen notions of preferential semantics and entailment in the style of Kraus et al. applied to modal logics. However, work in this field has focussed primarily on satisfiability checking, and monotonic notions of entailment, which may be inferentially weak. One particular modal logic where this has been introduced is propositional standpoint logics, where modalities can express the views of different viewpoints. This has resulted in the formalisation of propositional defeasible standpoint logic (PDSL). In this paper, we propose a means of lifting the class of (non-monotonic) rational entailment relations from traditional KLM-style reasoning to a fragment of PDSL. In order to do so, we extend the expressivity of PDSL via situated standpoint conditionals, allowing us to talk about a defeasible conditional holding in the context of a given standpoint. This allows us to re-characterise the syntax of PDSL in terms of situated conditionals, and shows that a large fragment of PDSL is expressible as a set of situated conditionals. We then focus on characterising non-monotonic entailment in this fragment, defining a method to transport any ranking-based entailment relation from the propositional case into the PDSL case. This is first described in the general case and then considered in the specific cases of rational and lexicographic closures, providing a faithful translation of each inference into PDSL. We also show that entailment-checking in this fragment of PDSL can be done largely using algorithms from the propositional case, while preserving complexity bounds.

AI.tldr: 本文将KLM风格的非单调有理蕴含关系扩展到命题立场逻辑（PDSL）的一个片段，通过引入情境化立场条件句重构PDSL语法，并实现基于排序的蕴含关系在PDSL中的迁移，同时保持计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有立场逻辑中的非单调推理研究主要集中在可满足性检查和单调蕴含，推理能力较弱；需增强其非单调蕴含表达能力。
AI.method: 引入情境化立场条件句以扩展PDSL表达力，重构其语法；将命题逻辑中基于排序的非单调蕴含（如有理闭包、词典闭包）迁移到PDSL片段；复用命题逻辑算法进行蕴含判定。
AI.result: 证明了PDSL一大片段可等价表示为情境化条件句集合；实现了任意排序型蕴含关系向PDSL的忠实迁移；蕴含判定可在保持复杂度的前提下复用原有命题算法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作成功将经典 defeasible 推理的非单调语义拓展至多视角模态逻辑框架，提升了立场逻辑的推理表现力与实用性。

title: Self-Refining Agentic Reinforcement Learning for Vision-Conditioned UAV Navigation
summary: Deep reinforcement learning has shown strong potential for enabling autonomous robots to learn complex navigational tasks. However, its practical use still depends heavily on human designed reward functions and repeated manual fine tuning, which is time consuming and does not guarantee high success in the desired task. This paper presents AgenticRL, agent guided reinforcement learning framework that increases autonomy in reward design, policy refinement, and real world deployment for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAV) navigation tasks. AgenticRL uses a multimodal generative pre-trained tansformer (GPT) agent to interpret task information and visual scene observations, generate task specific reward functions, train policies using Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm, and then act as a critic by evaluating the trained policy through diagnosis packets to generate feedback. Based on this feedback, the agent identifies failure modes and refines the reward function in a closed loop self improvement process. To further leverage the multimodal GPT agent during inference, AgenticRL uses real world images and natural language task information to automatically identify the active scenario and select the appropriate trained policy for execution. The framework is evaluated on multiple navigational tasks, including gate traversal, obstacle avoidance, wall barrier crossing with landing, trajectory following, and motion behavior learning. Experimental results show that the closed loop refinement process improves policy behavior compared with initial rewards by 71%. We also demonstrate sim-to-real transfer of the proposed framework, achieving a real world success rate of 91% and a sim-to-real accuracy of 94%.

AI.tldr: AgenticRL是一个利用多模态GPT代理增强自主性的强化学习框架，用于无人机导航任务，通过自生成奖励函数、闭环策略优化和场景自适应策略选择，显著提升仿真与真实环境中的导航性能。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在无人机导航中应用受限于人工设计奖励函数和反复手动调参，耗时且效果难以保证。
AI.method: 提出AgenticRL框架：使用多模态GPT代理解析任务与视觉信息，自动生成任务特定奖励函数；用PPO训练策略；GPT作为批评者生成诊断反馈，闭环识别失败模式并优化奖励；推理阶段结合真实图像与自然语言自动识别场景并选择对应策略。
AI.result: 闭环奖励优化使策略性能比初始奖励提升71%；仿真到真实的迁移实现实测成功率91%，仿真-真实准确率94%。
AI.conclusion: AgenticRL显著提升了强化学习在无人机导航中的自动化程度与实际部署能力，验证了大语言模型驱动的自主RL框架在复杂导航任务中的有效性与泛化性。

title: See, Infer, Intervene: Proactive World Modeling for Goal-Oriented Social Intelligence
summary: Multimodal retail agents should not only recognize what a customer is doing, but also decide whether and how to assist before an explicit request is made. We study this setting through the See--Infer--Intervene (SII) framework, where a device must see pre-interaction behavior, infer latent customer intent, and act by selecting an appropriate service intervention or choosing to wait. We instantiate SII with the Proactive Intent World Model (PIWM), which represents customer state with AIDA (Attention, Interest, Desire, Action) purchasing phases and BDI (belief, desire, intention) psychological fields, predicts action-conditioned intent transitions, and selects from five response classes: Greet, Elicit, Inform, Recommend, and Hold. We further construct GuidanceSalesBench, a smart-retail benchmark containing state manifests, pre-interaction videos, candidate responses, action-conditioned outcomes, and best-action labels. When conditioned on ground-truth customer state to isolate action selection, PIWM achieves 0.641 macro F1 on 30 held-out target videos, outperforming a zero-shot Qwen2.5-VL-7B baseline and training variants without balanced action supervision; end-to-end video-only selection drops to 0.295, below the 5-class balanced random baseline of 0.414, identifying video-to-state grounding as the dominant deployment-time bottleneck. A preliminary staged real-store pilot (recorded with paid participants performing scripted customer behaviors) reaches 0.579 action macro F1 on 20 fully annotated videos, with 10 additional accessible videos released with index-level labels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出See-Infer-Intervene (SII)框架与Proactive Intent World Model (PIWM)，旨在让多模态零售智能体在顾客明确请求前，基于其预交互行为主动推断意图并选择最优服务干预动作；通过新构建的GuidanceSalesBench基准验证，PIWM在状态已知条件下达0.641宏F1，但端到端视频输入性能显著下降（0.295），揭示视频到状态建模是主要瓶颈；真实店铺试点初步达到0.579宏F1。
AI.motivation: 现有零售智能体多依赖显式用户请求，缺乏对顾客预交互行为的理解与前瞻性干预能力，亟需能‘看见—推断—干预’的主动式多模态代理框架。
AI.method: 提出SII框架及其实例化模型PIWM，融合AIDA购买阶段与BDI心理模型表征顾客状态，建模动作条件下的意图转移，并从Greet、Elicit、Inform、Recommend、Hold五类响应中决策；构建GuidanceSalesBench基准，含预交互视频、状态标注、候选响应及最优动作标签；开展仿真评估与真实店铺试点。
AI.result: PIWM在状态已知条件下宏F1达0.641，显著优于Qwen2.5-VL-7B零样本基线及无平衡监督的变体；端到端视频输入性能降至0.295（低于随机基线0.414）；真实店铺试点达0.579宏F1，并开源20+带索引标签视频。
AI.conclusion: 主动意图建模需深度融合认知心理学结构（如AIDA/BDI）与动作条件推理，当前最大挑战在于视频到隐状态的有效接地；GuidanceSalesBench为该方向提供了首个系统性评估基准，推动零售AI向真正前瞻性服务演进。

title: PHAF-Personalized Hand Avatars in a Flash
summary: We present PHAF-Personalized Hand Avatars in a Flash, a personalized photo-realistic hand avatar which provides high quality multi-view renders from just two images (dorsal and palmar views).Unlike slow optimization-based techniques, PHAF generates fast personalized textures for real-time deployment on edge devices. Our approach combines semantic guided mesh alignment and densified texture extraction to transfer high-frequency details efficiently. A view-based inpainting network refines textures ensuring smooth, continuous appearance. PHAF generalizes to novel viewpoints and leverages a parametric hand model for accurate articulations, making it compatible with standard graphics engines. Experiments show it is comparable to existing methods in visual fidelity while drastically reducing texture generation time by 30 times, enabling practical AR/VR applications.

AI.tldr: PHAF是一种仅需两张手部图像（背侧和掌侧）即可快速生成个性化、照片级真实感手部虚拟形象的方法，显著提升了纹理生成速度，适用于AR/VR等实时应用。
AI.motivation: 解决现有基于优化的手部虚拟形象生成方法速度慢、难以在边缘设备实时部署的问题，满足AR/VR对高效、轻量、高质量手部建模的需求。
AI.method: 结合语义引导的网格对齐、稠密纹理提取与基于视角的纹理修复网络，在参数化手模型基础上实现快速个性化纹理生成与高保真渲染。
AI.result: 在视觉质量上媲美现有方法，纹理生成时间减少30倍，支持多视角渲染、自然关节运动，并可在边缘设备实时运行。
AI.conclusion: PHAF实现了速度与质量的平衡，为实时交互式手部建模提供了实用、高效的解决方案。

title: ASymPO: Asymmetric-Scale Policy Optimization for Asynchronous LLM Post-Training Without Behavior Information
summary: Asynchronous reinforcement learning can improve language-model post-training throughput by decoupling response generation from policy optimization, but stale responses introduce distribution drift. Standard behavior-corrected methods control this drift with behavior-policy probabilities, importance ratios, or clipping, which requires token-aligned, versioned, and numerically consistent behavior log-probabilities across rollout and learner systems. We ask whether asynchronous group-relative RL can instead be stabilized using only current-policy probabilities. We identify a scale-imbalance failure mode: when stale responses are evaluated under the current policy, positive and negative loss terms can appear at different negative log-probability scales, so zero-sum advantages no longer imply balanced loss contributions. We propose Asymmetric-Scale Policy Optimization (ASymPO), which normalizes each response's token loss by its current average token negative log-probability. ASymPO requires no behavior-policy probabilities, restores response-level zero-sum balance, and preserves a nonzero learning signal. We also introduce Scaled Policy Optimization (SPO), a fixed negative-scaling baseline, and evaluate both current-policy-only objectives in asynchronous mathematical reasoning post-training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASymPO和SPO两种仅依赖当前策略概率的异步强化学习方法，解决因陈旧响应导致的分布漂移问题，无需行为策略概率，恢复响应级零和平衡并保持学习信号。
AI.motivation: 异步强化学习虽能提升语言模型后训练吞吐量，但陈旧响应引发分布漂移；传统基于行为策略概率的校正方法对系统一致性要求高，本文探索仅用当前策略概率实现稳定优化的可行性。
AI.method: 识别出陈旧响应在当前策略下评估时存在的尺度失衡失效模式，提出ASymPO（不对称尺度策略优化）：按每个响应的当前平均token负对数概率归一化token损失；同时引入固定负缩放基线的SPO。二者均不依赖行为策略概率。
AI.result: ASymPO恢复响应级零和平衡、保留非零学习信号；SPO作为简化基线亦被验证；两者在异步数学推理后训练任务中完成评估。
AI.conclusion: 仅使用当前策略概率即可有效稳定异步组相对强化学习，ASymPO是一种无需行为策略日志概率、具备理论保障且实用的新优化目标。

title: Diagnosing Knowledge Gaps in LLM Tool Use: An Agentic Benchmark for Novel API Acquisition
summary: Large language models for code generation often need to use APIs that are absent from their pretraining data. This requires more than recalling a function name: models must coordinate signatures, module paths, input-output contracts, semantics, and executable usage patterns. Existing novel-API benchmarks are typically static, rely on coarse pass/fail metrics, or use synthetic APIs that may not reflect real library evolution. We introduce NovelAPIBench, a fully automated dynamic benchmark that, for any base model and target library, discovers novel APIs, extracts decomposed knowledge bundles, generates executable coding tasks, and assigns failed samples to six diagnostic categories. Across about 1.9K tasks, four base models, and five domains, we compare knowledge injected through retrieval with knowledge internalized through parametric adaptation. We find that knowledge components are not interchangeable: usage examples are the strongest standalone signal, while the best two-component setting pairs signatures with either mechanisms or examples depending on the domain and backbone. Adding more context, especially source code, can hurt by increasing import-path errors. Parametric adaptation also does not replace retrieval once external knowledge is removed; rather, fine-tuning mainly teaches models how to use provided bundles, and this ability transfers to held-out libraries. These results suggest that retrieval and tuning play complementary roles: retrieval supplies volatile API content, while tuning improves procedural integration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NovelAPIBench，一个全自动动态基准，用于评估大语言模型在面对训练数据中未见API时的代码生成能力，并揭示检索与参数化适配在API知识利用中的互补作用。
AI.motivation: 现有新型API基准多为静态、依赖粗粒度通过/失败指标或使用不反映真实库演化的合成API，难以准确评估模型对新API的理解与应用能力。
AI.method: 构建NovelAPIBench动态基准：自动发现新API、提取分解的知识单元（如签名、用法示例、机制等）、生成可执行编码任务，并将失败样本归入六类诊断类别；在约1.9K任务、4个基础模型、5个领域上对比检索增强与参数化微调的效果。
AI.result: 使用示例是最强的独立知识信号；最优双组件组合依领域和模型而异（签名+机制 或 签名+示例）；增加上下文（尤其源码）反而可能加剧导入路径错误；微调不替代检索，而是提升模型对所提供知识单元的使用能力，且该能力可迁移到未见库。
AI.conclusion: 检索与微调具有互补角色：检索提供易变的API内容，微调提升程序性整合能力。

title: Humanoid-GPT: Scaling Data and Structure for Zero-Shot Motion Tracking
summary: We introduce Humanoid-GPT, a GPT-style Transformer with causal attention trained on a billion-scale motion corpus for whole-body control. Unlike prior shallow MLP trackers constrained by scarce data and an agility-generalization trade-off, Humanoid-GPT is pre-trained on a 2B-frame retargeted corpus that unifies all major mocap datasets with large-scale in-house recordings. Scaling both data and model capacity yields a single generative Transformer that tracks highly dynamic behaviors while achieving unprecedented zero-shot generalization to unseen motions and control tasks. Extensive experiments and scaling analyses show that our model establishes a new performance frontier, demonstrating robust zero-shot generalization to unseen tasks while simultaneously tracking highly dynamic and complex motions.

AI.tldr: Humanoid-GPT 是一个基于十亿级运动数据预训练的GPT式Transformer模型，用于全身运动控制，具备卓越的零样本泛化能力和动态行为跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 解决以往浅层MLP追踪器受限于数据稀缺及敏捷性与泛化性权衡的问题。
AI.method: 构建包含20亿帧动作数据的大规模统一对齐动作语料库，预训练具有因果注意力机制的Transformer模型。
AI.result: 在零样本泛化至未见动作和控制任务方面取得突破，在高度动态复杂动作跟踪上表现鲁棒且领先。
AI.conclusion: 扩大数据规模与模型容量可显著提升生成式运动控制模型的泛化性与表现力，Humanoid-GPT确立了该领域新性能前沿。

title: Causal Evidence of Stack Representations in Modeling Counter Languages Using Transformers
summary: Formal languages have proven to be effective conduits to understand the inner mechanisms of transformers. Past work has shown that transformers trained on next token prediction over counter languages learn representations consistent with an underlying stack structure. Beyond representational analysis, this paper investigates the causal role of these representations. Linear probes are trained to predict the stack depth at each token from the model's hidden states, and a principal representation direction is extracted from the probe. Ablation of this direction from the model causes sequential accuracy to collapse to near 0%, providing strong empirical evidence that the stack representation is not just learned, but is causally necessary for model performance.

AI.tldr: 本文通过线性探针和方向消融实验证明，transformer在处理计数语言时学到的栈表示不仅是表征性的，更是因果性地必要于模型性能。
AI.motivation: 探究transformer中学习到的栈结构表征是否具有因果作用，而不仅仅是相关或表征性存在。
AI.method: 在计数语言上训练transformer，用线性探针预测每步栈深度，提取主表征方向，并对该方向进行隐藏状态消融。
AI.result: 消融该主表征方向后，模型序列准确率骤降至接近0%，表明该栈表示对任务性能具有因果必要性。
AI.conclusion: transformer中学习到的栈结构不是偶然副产物，而是完成计数语言任务所依赖的关键因果机制。

title: PRISM: Synergizing Vision Foundation Models via Self-organized Expert Specialization
summary: Unifying the complementary strengths of diverse Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) into a single efficient model is highly desirable but challenged by the negative transfer inherent in monolithic distillation. To address these feature conflicts, we introduce \textbf{PRISM}, a novel dual-stream Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework that synergizes VFMs via modular specialization. We propose a two-stage paradigm: (1) expertise deconstruction, where a teacher-conditional router guides experts to specialize in distinct representational subspaces to mitigate interference, followed by (2) dynamic recomposition, where the router learns to assemble these experts into tailored computational pathways for downstream tasks. Experiments on PASCAL-Context and NYUD-v2 show that \textbf{PRISM} establishes a new state of the art, validating that sparse, emergent specialization is a scalable approach for integrating diverse visual knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRISM框架，通过双流混合专家（MoE）结构实现多视觉基础模型的协同融合，避免单一大型蒸馏中的负迁移问题，在PASCAL-Context和NYUD-v2上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 统一多种视觉基础模型（VFMs）的优势面临负迁移挑战，尤其在单体蒸馏中特征冲突严重。
AI.method: 提出PRISM：一种双流MoE框架，包含两阶段——（1）专家解构：教师条件路由器引导各专家专精于不同表征子空间；（2）动态重组：路由器学习为下游任务定制化组合专家路径。
